name: Jim Jordan
subject: I need 11 conservatives to endorse me today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've come to the decision that as it pertains to the next chapter in my public service, the best move is no move at all. I'm running for reelection an It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e6afc7e93eb94a5587b8e1179d694cee&_e=xsEu-WT8HTYIMe5vKpToZDOQJtUVxKgwzqd6emS7-sySXN8LovC-esG5X7-hGNdp82wa_7MQf1wvlnc_Y6mqJY9dr8jiU4helcbAHHJCllqoDuwbGe_dHWpsgS0Jmn8qEUIdpmghQUNvxwZ6BjUe5E6UzXw-TraYpHITU83VboleV9QR2b2nseyX6SccndXWAzZt8Zarvj6V-e9GiGojx9uoddZ82nLIgfa5j5YhSInN1eDrEDsn-wGIS9B0IuJBOQUvPHNgYyV181R8C3i0GAPrnsP0s8yN2_DfH_E4eSWaLQxFIgkdbBUqoDSbbL7kkk4Z20_bjiC0dn89PrKy1g_3aUckJFxccCTEg1velFXPRBj3f-z_SMNtE-3ROT-zpfsMSNBpGGwnIIfRh7bVVU8ybI4-G74_fYIjReNaqsiYC7R3jDcMuZJ2vguMubHYVanj9SUJlNskYdPRKUu4h0ZbIX-e-M4iK0RKQoUM4J0zVr9ih7YthXf5cCbgQuMVzYKXWDRzq3uQcPNSapuMEQ%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e6afc7e93eb94a5587b8e1179d694cee&_e=xsEu-WT8HTYIMe5vKpToZDOQJtUVxKgwzqd6emS7-sySXN8LovC-esG5X7-hGNdp82wa_7MQf1wvlnc_Y6mqJY9dr8jiU4helcbAHHJCllqoDuwbGe_dHWpsgS0Jmn8qEUIdpmghQUNvxwZ6BjUe5E6UzXw-TraYpHITU83VboleV9QR2b2nseyX6SccndXWAzZt8Zarvj6V-e9GiGojx9uoddZ82nLIgfa5j5YhSInN1eDrEDsn-wGIS9B0IuJBOQUvPHNgYyV181R8C3i0GAPrnsP0s8yN2_DfH_E4eSWaLQxFIgkdbBUqoDSbbL7kBbM4MUvDYBNB7Mu9-MO8wJVdAu4x0xl3y9s2UOYP0Mwhg1bEay3dAHYbceYBS5svr5tg27gcjTYBQuXKc5bw2MnkOgGQjh4_107xMibclqtMTiBHQ6yLKCCtuufRtQ4ZofBogOwx-kh9mx7X5XTsd5P5BqNzYw5xcLJBev92ENUyAlzZbqsuqgvb7uohs5McrYy7GYYzhVbD-dTFfk4NiQ%3D%3D)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e6afc7e93eb94a5587b8e1179d694cee&_e=xsEu-WT8HTYIMe5vKpToZDOQJtUVxKgwzqd6emS7-sySXN8LovC-esG5X7-hGNdp82wa_7MQf1wvlnc_Y6mqJY9dr8jiU4helcbAHHJCllqoDuwbGe_dHWpsgS0Jmn8qEUIdpmghQUNvxwZ6BjUe5E6UzXw-TraYpHITU83VboleV9QR2b2nseyX6SccndXWAzZt8Zarvj6V-e9GiGojx9uoddZ82nLIgfa5j5YhSInN1eDrEDsn-wGIS9B0IuJBOQUvPHNgYyV181R8C3i0GAPrnsP0s8yN2_DfH_E4eSWaLQxFIgkdbBUqoDSbbL7kFmxR-CP68h090etvcXxErO8wGffvCi6B4MRRk-TmoLG4aU11EXFZhc4LjoweWoMyHhNnGHvjetNxvSn_poPSlbMejeJmKFUv4-7ZSVPdSXYjPI7XgXGCZlUv_xTyUIenWnG2EU3OTPOjr0ig9-aKzbAsB3DzCMjjmFlw4jrItpUD5vSQctUFzDXYskkYPtJUCuu5nFEvrgz9GoSbWSwn5w%3D%3D)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e6afc7e93eb94a5587b8e1179d694cee&_e=xsEu-WT8HTYIMe5vKpToZDOQJtUVxKgwzqd6emS7-sySXN8LovC-esG5X7-hGNdp82wa_7MQf1wvlnc_Y6mqJY9dr8jiU4helcbAHHJCllqoDuwbGe_dHWpsgS0Jmn8qEUIdpmghQUNvxwZ6BjUe5E6UzXw-TraYpHITU83VboleV9QR2b2nseyX6SccndXWAzZt8Zarvj6V-e9GiGojx9uoddZ82nLIgfa5j5YhSInN1eDrEDsn-wGIS9B0IuJBOQUvPHNgYyV181R8C3i0GAPrnsP0s8yN2_DfH_E4eSWaLQxFIgkdbBUqoDSbbL7kz5C4Ot9sU0yNKc0CL1Onzw_EhtD3Gy2A21YQnnoJDVCOsDFlSMd4vb8vr3PuPUS1EUg0A-BKtu7v5T8SqdEtVsTn_jo3QyfMhDNtvF3khnmRsplXpmyXJaW8CYjZ59xFKw1WDXns4bIoOZypbHWkAqafGuQ4aUNqkFhOYvGjW7Sp79XZu0TyEarcxfztLliIrCUk1rHv7cBJG5q4wkeERA%3D%3D)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e6afc7e93eb94a5587b8e1179d694cee&_e=xsEu-WT8HTYIMe5vKpToZDOQJtUVxKgwzqd6emS7-sySXN8LovC-esG5X7-hGNdp82wa_7MQf1wvlnc_Y6mqJY9dr8jiU4helcbAHHJCllqoDuwbGe_dHWpsgS0Jmn8qEUIdpmghQUNvxwZ6BjUe5E6UzXw-TraYpHITU83VboleV9QR2b2nseyX6SccndXWAzZt8Zarvj6V-e9GiGojx9uoddZ82nLIgfa5j5YhSInN1eDrEDsn-wGIS9B0IuJBOQUvPHNgYyV181R8C3i0GAPrnsP0s8yN2_DfH_E4eSWaLQxFIgkdbBUqoDSbbL7kWkwqjb9NF3hZfDeSr8uAqRa0sxkmSq-SnpxNoCgYcszy0JnABr9CaRp-4MnEHt2j9cDqr5F7FswsQcDElZULm1WG-7UxNsucDxM3B1XMhR7P1LCwJzmuTaKZ8nIsoMF54pk9SeuqdswDBhgepRAkQnv1mCja24AdZEOkmvXbj0PFGJfcMwrL1UqnS9IaqMvyFiWcq58xa2oMGxGHG_YPJg%3D%3D)**.

name: Tim Aalders
subject: Tomorrow is the Utah Republican Party’s Nominating Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Aalders for Congress
body:
As the only conservative in the race that has the funds necessary to beat John Curtis, I have personally sought to contact and talk to every single delegate in the Third Congressional District.

| | |
---
[Unsubscribe](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/unsubscribe.php?M=24009358&C=d500a4ef62eb9afcc1122a554a4ecbdb&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=1097&N=152626&AGENCY=PMI)
[ |
--- ](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=152626&L=82765&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT0mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TmV3c2xldHRlciZ1dG1fdGVybT0=)
| [ ](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=152626&L=82765&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT0mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TmV3c2xldHRlciZ1dG1fdGVybT0=)
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow Utah Republican,

Tomorrow is the Utah Republican Party’s Nominating Convention. As the only conservative in the race that has the funds necessary to beat John Curtis, I have personally sought to contact and talk to every single delegate in the Third Congressional District. I want them to know I am unquestionably conservative, believe in solid free market fundamentals, and am always accessible to the voters.

That is why my campaign phone number is my cell phone. I want every delegate to meet me and have an honest and in depth discussion of the issues that face America right now.

You may have seen my [TV spot on tapping America’s abundant energy](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=152626&L=83347&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZXMvdGltLWFhbGRlcnMtZW5lcmd5LXR2LWFkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3Rlcm09) resources and putting them to use to increase supply, decrease prices, and bring back American Energy Independence. It was just a few years ago when America was an energy exporter.

Or maybe you saw my [in-depth interview with Ben Ferguson of Fox News](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=152626&L=83033&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZXMvdGltLWFhbGRlcnMtc2l0cy1kb3duLXdpdGgtZm94LW5ld3M/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT0mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TmV3c2xldHRlciZ1dG1fdGVybT0=) where we covered over 20 issues facing Utah taxpayers.

My conservative values run deep. For years I have been on talk radio talking about the free market, American excellence, and the principles of the Constitution and our Founding Fathers. That is why when it comes to supporting concepts like the Second Amendment [I have the endorsement of Provo native and NRA Law Officer of the Year Sheriff Richard Mack.](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=152626&L=83702&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZXMvc2hlcmlmZi1yaWNoYXJkLW1hY2stZW5kb3JzZXMtdGltLWFhbGRlcnMtZm9yLWNvbmdyZXNzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3Rlcm09) As the nation's leading advocate for Constitutional authority in law enforcement, Sheriff Mack challenged the constitutionality of Bill Clinton’s Brady Bill and ultimately won his landmark case at the United States Supreme Court.

Or when it comes to issues like securing our border I hold strong disagreements with Congressman Curtis on amnesty. His long held belief in amnesty are why he allowed Provo to be a Sanctuary City, and why he continues to support and even sponsor legislation giving amnesty to those that entered our country illegally. Just this past February Congressman Curtis sponsored a bill that would give 11.5 illegals American citizenship. I have countered that policies like this will only aggravate the situation at the border, and that we must stop financial enticements for illegals to cross our border.

Some of you may have even joined with the Minuteman Project back in 2005 when Jim Gilchrist created the “world’s largest neighborhood watch” and joined him in lawn chairs, binoculars, and satellite phones to help the understaffed US Border Patrol in protecting our nation. [I am pleased to have Jim’s endorsement in this race as well.](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=152626&L=83703&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZXMvbWludXRlbWFuLWZvdW5kZXItZW5kb3JzZXMtdGltLWFhbGRlcnMtZm9yLXVzLWNvbmdyZXNzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3Rlcm09)

And lastly, the voters of the Third District deserve a Congressman who works for them. We don’t need a self-serving individual who cares more about his personal stock portfolio when he is supposed to be working for us. Insider Trading is banned in corporate America, but members of Congress can (and do!!) get to trade on all of the information they learn in secret hearings. The House Ethics Committee has long recommended that all members of Congress put their finances in the hands of a blind trust, and there is bipartisan legislation right now banning the trading of individual stocks by members of Congress. John Curtis refuses to follow any of these ethics rules.

In fact, John Curtis is an active trader with almost 350 individual stock transactions in his last financial report – and some of those were pandemic stocks during COVID, and defense contractors when war in Ukraine broke out. Isn’t he supposed to be working for us? I don’t begrudge him building his new 10,000 square foot mansion with hard earned success, but I do care when our Congressman makes more money on Wall Street than Nancy Pelosi.

No wonder Washington DC is a mess. We keep sending the wrong people to Congress!!

So I hope that all of the voters of Utah agree with me that we have to change Washington DC if we want to live in a better America. We need a conservative to represent the values of Utah in Congress. The voters of Utah deserve a full time Congressman working to lead our nation, not one that spends all of his time padding his retirement plan.

I am grateful that I live in a nation that has allowed me to live the American dream. As a small business owner, rancher, and patriot – I have been blessed. But our nation is at risk of losing that opportunity for all who want to fully embrace that dream. And Congress is to a great deal to blame.

I humbly ask that you [take a look at what I have said, written, and posted on our webpage and social media pages.](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=152626&L=82766&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3Rlcm09) The issues facing our nation deserve someone who fully is committed to making America a better place, and fully capable of leading a change in Washington DC.
We don’t need a Congressman who looks at the office as a stepping stone to higher political office. Nor do we need someone who thinks the office is a great place to build a retirement account. We need a full time Congressman that will lead a change in direction of our nation to fully embrace free market principles, defend the Constitution, and commit to following a conservative limited government philosophy.

My name is Tim Aalders, and I hope to meet and personally talk with you at convention tomorrow.

**P.S. Come by our booth tomorrow and meet Sheriff Mack and Jim Gilchrist. Both have flown into town to support our campaign!**

[_www.VoteTimAalders.com_](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=152626&L=82766&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3Rlcm09)

clean_body: As the only conservative in the race that has the funds necessary to beat John Curtis, I have personally sought to contact and talk to every single delegate in the Third Congressional District. | | | = | = | | Dear Fellow Utah Republican, Tomorrow is the Utah Republican Party’s Nominating Convention. As the only conservative in the race that has the funds necessary to beat John Curtis, I have personally sought to contact and talk to every single delegate in the Third Congressional District. I want them to know I am unquestionably conservative, believe in solid free market fundamentals, and am always accessible to the voters. That is why my campaign phone number is my cell phone. I want every delegate to meet me and have an honest and in depth discussion of the issues that face America right now. You may have seen my resources and putting them to use to increase supply, decrease prices, and bring back American Energy Independence. It was just a few years ago when America was an energy exporter. Or maybe you saw my = where we covered over 20 issues facing Utah taxpayers. My conservative values run deep. For years I have been on talk radio talking about the free market, American excellence, and the principles of the Constitution and our Founding Fathers. That is why when it comes to supporting concepts like the Second Amendment As the nation's leading advocate for Constitutional authority in law enforcement, Sheriff Mack challenged the constitutionality of Bill Clinton’s Brady Bill and ultimately won his landmark case at the United States Supreme Court. Or when it comes to issues like securing our border I hold strong disagreements with Congressman Curtis on amnesty. His long held belief in amnesty are why he allowed Provo to be a Sanctuary City, and why he continues to support and even sponsor legislation giving amnesty to those that entered our country illegally. Just this past February Congressman Curtis sponsored a bill that would give 11.5 illegals American citizenship. I have countered that policies like this will only aggravate the situation at the border, and that we must stop financial enticements for illegals to cross our border. Some of you may have even joined with the Minuteman Project back in 2005 when Jim Gilchrist created the “world’s largest neighborhood watch” and joined him in lawn chairs, binoculars, and satellite phones to help the understaffed US Border Patrol in protecting our nation. And lastly, the voters of the Third District deserve a Congressman who works for them. We don’t need a self-serving individual who cares more about his personal stock portfolio when he is supposed to be working for us. Insider Trading is banned in corporate America, but members of Congress can (and do!!) get to trade on all of the information they learn in secret hearings. The House Ethics Committee has long recommended that all members of Congress put their finances in the hands of a blind trust, and there is bipartisan legislation right now banning the trading of individual stocks by members of Congress. John Curtis refuses to follow any of these ethics rules. In fact, John Curtis is an active trader with almost 350 individual stock transactions in his last financial report – and some of those were pandemic stocks during COVID, and defense contractors when war in Ukraine broke out. Isn’t he supposed to be working for us? I don’t begrudge him building his new 10,000 square foot mansion with hard earned success, but I do care when our Congressman makes more money on Wall Street than Nancy Pelosi. No wonder Washington DC is a mess. We keep sending the wrong people to Congress!! So I hope that all of the voters of Utah agree with me that we have to change Washington DC if we want to live in a better America. We need a conservative to represent the values of Utah in Congress. The voters of Utah deserve a full time Congressman working to lead our nation, not one that spends all of his time padding his retirement plan. I am grateful that I live in a nation that has allowed me to live the American dream. As a small business owner, rancher, and patriot – I have been blessed. But our nation is at risk of losing that opportunity for all who want to fully embrace that dream. And Congress is to a great deal to blame. I humbly ask that you The issues facing our nation deserve someone who fully is committed to making America a better place, and fully capable of leading a change in Washington DC. We don’t need a Congressman who looks at the office as a stepping stone to higher political office. Nor do we need someone who thinks the office is a great place to build a retirement account. We need a full time Congressman that will lead a change in direction of our nation to fully embrace free market principles, defend the Constitution, and commit to following a conservative limited government philosophy. My name is Tim Aalders, and I hope to meet and personally talk with you at convention tomorrow. P.S. Come by our booth tomorrow and meet Sheriff Mack and Jim Gilchrist. Hey there,

I know you’re busy so I just wanted to bump this email because of how important races like mine are.

[**The future of our nation rests on Americans like us standing up for what is right, and standing up against those who want to corrupt or dilute what America represents.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=0c4118d045434e0daa70a2f45989d1b1&_e=Fddn2QMmPHD5on4nWp8fkHLCSiIIfL4Id_sCDUW8BG53c3aHy-FSOxw6Sm1c1CyHrxYIjH9fNW6dJRNF1h5AIqykZVSms5W8N3oFetKUxl4PPATqGDA_G7UpTPhaG9YaSRKQ6ts7iZbbKYF_4cnr0WFk0dAjxzf33tpASF1aDlkUYyzTzY4BuC5AKnLd2K_Une_kzjzTOXo4gDSflU3tsJXnks4I_J61yxrXZ35rR63v-XVqGXo8JcCNBUamA63rflLAQOZ_if9zOCzPQq2vHDwLNUCGiRgwZtNNMAOxSQhYEheXJG648Fkyj5oguN6wgFWV7LH8vbm1olSOODLzcnRi4vcmwaPhTNFL5cr2pWqEmUyzC5skpEueHWRF9kJ2FNjNq6_jULPewasEpTnde9UeQmjwk5a9sv75ScIbr-s%3D)

A better America cannot weaken itself for radical policies that endanger our neighbors, our children, our nation, or jeopardize the future of what America stands for.

We are one nation under God, and we have to make sure we don’t back down from the radicalism that is creeping into our schools, our local governments, and our everyday lives.

[**I’m fighting for the future of my community and if you believe in a cause like that, then I urge you to please stand with me and support my campaign, even if it’s just with $1 because anything helps.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=0c4118d045434e0daa70a2f45989d1b1&_e=Fddn2QMmPHD5on4nWp8fkHLCSiIIfL4Id_sCDUW8BG53c3aHy-FSOxw6Sm1c1CyHrxYIjH9fNW6dJRNF1h5AIqykZVSms5W8N3oFetKUxl4PPATqGDA_G7UpTPhaG9YaSRKQ6ts7iZbbKYF_4cnr0WFk0dAjxzf33tpASF1aDlkUYyzTzY4BuC5AKnLd2K_Une_kzjzTOXo4gDSflU3tsFM43YX7f5oU98wU5rhmKRG6cFkNPSrLKlwTGgqWvKTPdWZFLGJ1TRbLGVkbYFJAYsJWliXRR_VP-SXtjA-dj05aPUXC1JrrlspxvYhLe18u92nVt8dkP8bC-6s1VqlYhGooJovb1Gfs0GdYGCcU9TSbTWyLOQk6-Bm_ENRM8gIEk9s4EQumK09cif0qlHTYWcsNBopFHQx09NBWjlS_B50%3D)

Your fight is my fight, so I hope we’re on the same side on this.

Thank you,

\- Joe Arpaio

**Sent:** Thursday, April 19, 2022 9:05 PM
**To:** [<dpwillis67@gmail.com>](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=0c4118d045434e0daa70a2f45989d1b1&_e=Fddn2QMmPHD5on4nWp8fkHLCSiIIfL4Id_sCDUW8BG53c3aHy-FSOxw6Sm1c1CyHrxYIjH9fNW6dJRNF1h5AIqykZVSms5W8N3oFetKUxl4PPATqGDA_G7UpTPhaG9YaSRKQ6ts7iZbbKYF_4cnr0WFk0dAjxzf33tpASF1aDlkUYyzTzY4BuC5AKnLd2K_Une_kzjzTOXo4gDSflU3tsK2RCg8pFI4xxHgLTNQWrTg_Oybp1NYqybp3z3LJEYGnew1d__oad6TmD0GHSn4Q0jNcHA0031E5U7Uus00Hcl8mNODiMMYqgkCy0_ktlmjTmaFp_RlZaH1-L2asgrl5fKOw9xMfPwDlwfww4RpRbyx947meLMfp3lIrlIxNOZNY_2qMw_C7a529K4aFoxK3u5NKkkm4WwMWk8LKeyPbks0%3D)
**Subject:** I need your help

Fellow American,

I know I’ve said this before, but this race is about what small-town America is fighting against, big-government liberals pushing radical left-wing policies on small businesses and everyday Americans.

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Ron Johnson called climate change "bullsh*t"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
It's Earth Day, and if there's one thing I hope you know about me, it's my love for my beautiful state and deep appreciation for our country's natural resources. Happy Earth Day! If there's one thing I hope you know about me, it's my love for my beautiful state of Wisconsin and deep appreciation for our country's natural resources.

Growing up in the Chippewa Valley — the home of Earth Day founder and Wisconsin U.S. Senator Gaylord Nelson — enjoying the great outdoors wasn't just an activity, it's who we are.

My parents always taught me the importance of our treasured outdoor spaces. Every summer, we'd pack up the camper to visit our Great Lakes, public lands, and forests in Wisconsin and across the country. (Keep scrolling for more photos!) After I was elected State Treasurer, one of my first acts was to lift a Republican gag order preventing us from even talking about climate change. And as Chair of the Board of Commissioners of Public Lands, I've managed 77,000 acres of public lands and led a $1.3 billion fund — investing millions of dollars in renewable energy projects.

As a mom, I believe we have a moral obligation to tackle the climate crisis and fight to protect the future of our planet for our children. That’s why I decided to run for U.S. Senate. It’s also why combating climate change is a top priority of mine so that kids like my son, Hartley, can continue to enjoy our outdoor spaces. **I have fought hard to protect our natural resources and preserve our environment for future generations as State Treasurer, and I’ll keep up the fight as Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator — because Ron Johnson couldn’t be more different.**

He’s too busy denying science and calling climate change "bullsh*t" to notice that our water levels are rising, our storms are getting more intense, and the amount of carbon in our atmosphere keeps increasing.

The people of my state deserve a U.S. Senator who will tackle the climate crisis and fight like hell to protect our environment for future generations to enjoy — just as I did. That's why I'm running to replace Ron Johnson, but I need your support.

**[Will you make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate to help me defeat Ron Johnson so we can finally work to combat the urgent threat of climate change? Thank you, as always, for your support.

— Sarah Godlewski

clean_body: It's Earth Day, and if there's one thing I hope you know about me, it's my love for my beautiful state and deep appreciation for our country's natural resources. Happy Earth Day! If there's one thing I hope you know about me, it's my love for my beautiful state of Wisconsin and deep appreciation for our country's natural resources. Growing up in the Chippewa Valley — the home of Earth Day founder and Wisconsin U.S. Senator Gaylord Nelson — enjoying the great outdoors wasn't just an activity, it's who we are. My parents always taught me the importance of our treasured outdoor spaces. Every summer, we'd pack up the camper to visit our Great Lakes, public lands, and forests in Wisconsin and across the country. (Keep scrolling for more photos!) After I was elected State Treasurer, one of my first acts was to lift a Republican gag order preventing us from even talking about climate change. And as Chair of the Board of Commissioners of Public Lands, I've managed 77,000 acres of public lands and led a $1.3 billion fund — investing millions of dollars in renewable energy projects. As a mom, I believe we have a moral obligation to tackle the climate crisis and fight to protect the future of our planet for our children. That’s why I decided to run for U.S. Senate. It’s also why combating climate change is a top priority of mine so that kids like my son, Hartley, can continue to enjoy our outdoor spaces. I have fought hard to protect our natural resources and preserve our environment for future generations as State Treasurer, and I’ll keep up the fight as Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator — because Ron Johnson couldn’t be more different. He’s too busy denying science and calling climate change "bullsht" to notice that our water levels are rising, our storms are getting more intense, and the amount of carbon in our atmosphere keeps increasing. The people of my state deserve a U.S. Senator who will tackle the climate crisis and fight like hell to protect our environment for future generations to enjoy — just as I did. That's why I'm running to replace Ron Johnson, but I need your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = As Wisconsin's next U.S. Senator, I will always work to preserve our Great Lakes, protect our natural resources, and stand up to the special interests that are seeking to take away our rights to clean air and clean water. You have my word. Thank you, as always, for your support. — Sarah Godlewski P.S. Here are a few of my favorite childhood photos that I think you'll enjoy! Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin

name: Tobias Read HQ
subject: what a debate!
body:
Tobias asked former Speaker Tina Kotek to defend her record as Speaker.
---
| | Did you see the debate today, Peter?

Tobias asked former Speaker Tina Kotek to defend her record as Speaker. The fact is under her leadership homelessness, crime, and education all got worse.

Here’s the reality check. The Speaker is the most powerful person in our legislature. For the past ten years Tina Kotek’s job as Speaker was to hold Governors and state agencies accountable. **And she didn’t.**

[**We don’t need more of the same. Oregonians deserve better. Now we need your help to make sure Tobias can lead us in a different direction.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44450201/341663087/680707785?refcode=422&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDM0OTMwYS1hOGMyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LWkP6pmiHOO4z2Yga-lq1s_4nvms7w5AmO58ial-g3s=)

If you watched the debate, you saw Tina Kotek equivocate: claiming all the credit on housing but then saying she was powerless to get anything done. Tobias put it best, **“If the former Speaker wants to take all the credit for working on housing, I think it’s reasonable to ask how it’s going.”** Right now we have tens of thousands of our neighbors living on the street. We have tent cities in our parks and along our highways. **The answer is clear – it’s not going well.**

And that’s our message to voters. If you think the state is doing a good job on homelessness, you should vote for Tina. If you think it’s time for a change, vote Tobias.

[**We have 25 days until the election and we need your support to win this race. Please consider a $25 contribution today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44450202/341663088/680707785?refcode=422&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDM0OTMwYS1hOGMyLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LWkP6pmiHOO4z2Yga-lq1s_4nvms7w5AmO58ial-g3s=)

Thank you,
Team Tobias

name: Herschel Walker
subject: “Any old Black person will do.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
While I’m personally very offended, I’m genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece. While I'm personally very offended, I'm genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4cbdf74767a54e15aa2b00057b529d17&_e=ikdYr6abCT4JQqtZRrpYxD5fkjFdWassU-PzRWWWpxrLrMRRL2Zc1W6llizwQU00eaMuQrje19MPA6rwepPLci8z2uS5zjUjScCArJO4cKkezAyususn-TNw48gA6ebXzZzMZTW655h8tJQwxBS1bJ3QqffyzJnzmvuGtt6DsZ7T3TST_H9_4YpfipRKEsj-wg0VFrb2PVdK7OB-A3OXCcOAZESt6MvvJTssTZPOpU5i0E4hyzF8XKz4bIe4IhCryhN0ptAZLvU8e2f0it-_yQXKBHeFpQ9UBXb_QHaFUk4D6S52YsLt0qHcpQbYXrs5V9_M-dyAJLd49HmaVJoO0K9_Iflhk_dQWvfibr-wjcrTxfQh6IuuTjrDsEoarTmueEyN5J8yzK4MhrNBOGCW_T3X1y489Db9Hh9KvNrGwWTcGPHNio2hj2Lzi2w5UCDVQfX714Fwj8AYO2XIAgs9habMhQtxfP2A3laQmIbo9mQ%3D)

---
Fellow American,

I have to admit - I hadn't heard of the far-left publication called _The Nation_ before last week. Now, I'll never forget it.

They published an attack piece against me - based on the color of my skin - that is beyond ridiculous and insulting.

While I'm personally very offended, I'm genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece.

There are a lot of nasty things said about me in this article simply because I'm a Black Republican. Like this:

"Herschel Walker, the football star turned Georgia Senate candidate, is an animated caricature of a Black person drawn by white conservatives."
Or maybe this line:

"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."
It's shameful.

But the writer doesn't just take aim at me. He questions the support from folks like you, too:

"Most white people in the South vote 'R' like their entire white supremacist project depends on it."
Fellow American, I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign. However, can you imagine the reaction from the mainstream media if these things had been said about a Black Democrat? The outrage! There would be calls for the writer to be fired and the publication cancelled.

But I'm not calling for a protest of the author or a boycott of the publication's advertisers. Nothing like that.

_**I think the best answer is to prove them wrong at the ballot box.**_

clean_body: While I’m personally very offended, I’m genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece. While I'm personally very offended, I'm genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece. | Fellow American, I have to admit - I hadn't heard of the far-left publication called The Nation before last week. Now, I'll never forget it. They published an attack piece against me - based on the color of my skin - that is beyond ridiculous and insulting. While I'm personally very offended, I'm genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece. There are a lot of nasty things said about me in this article simply because I'm a Black Republican. Like this: "Herschel Walker, the football star turned Georgia Senate candidate, is an animated caricature of a Black person drawn by white conservatives." Or maybe this line: "Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people." It's shameful. But the writer doesn't just take aim at me. He questions the support from folks like you, too: "Most white people in the South vote 'R' like their entire white supremacist project depends on it." Fellow American, I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign. However, can you imagine the reaction from the mainstream media if these things had been said about a Black Democrat? The outrage! There would be calls for the writer to be fired and the publication cancelled. But I'm not calling for a protest of the author or a boycott of the publication's advertisers. Nothing like that. I think the best answer is to prove them wrong at the ballot box. The media has been against our campaign since we launched last summer, but they have rarely been so brazen to say things as this: "Georgia Republicans want Walker because he's Black and Warnock is Black, and they think they can defeat Warnock in November if they can shave just a little of the Black vote..." I'm not "any old Black person" as the author of the article asserts. I'm Herschel Walker - a proud Georgian and a proud Republican - who has lived the American Dream and wants to secure that dream for the next generation of Americans from all walks of life. The best way to deal with racist tropes like these are to call them out, reject them, and prove them wrong. I hope you'll stand with me against the political hit jobs that the far-left media keep throwing our way. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Hunter/Joe Biden Scandal Update
body:
Judicial Watch Exposes Critical Race Theory

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES STATE DEPARTMENT FOR HUNTER BIDEN DOCUMENTS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27209&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1oN24ta3RNODBoNCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
The Hunter/Joe Biden scandal isn’t going away. We just filed a
FOIA lawsuit against the U.S. State Department for messages sent
through the SMART
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27181&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZHNhaW5jLmNvbS9leHBlcnRpc2UvY2FzZS1zdHVkaWVzL3NtYXJ0LWRlcGFydG1lbnQtb2Ytc3RhdGUtKGRvcyktbWVzc2FnaW5nLWFuZC1hcmNoaXZlLXJldHJpZXZhbC10b29sc2V0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
(State Messaging and Archive Retrieval Toolkit) system that mention
Hunter Biden (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27182&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtaHVudGVyLWNvbW1zLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTA2Ni8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
(No. 1:22-cv-01066)).

We sued after State failed to reply to a February 11, 2022, FOIA
request for:

All cables/teletypes and email messages sent via the SMART system that
reference Hunter Biden, excluding any records that consist solely of
media articles or compilations.
In an email dated February 16, 2022, the State Department on February
16, 2022, acknowledged receipt of the request and asserted that the
agency was invoking FOIA’s ten-day extension of time provision due
to “unusual circumstances.” As of April 15, State failed to comply
with our request.

Hunter Biden continues to be the subject of a federal criminal
investigation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27183&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjIvMDMvMTcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLXBhaWQtb2ZmLXRheC1iaWxsLWluLTIwMjEtYnV0LWludmVzdGlnYXRpb24tY29udGludWVkLXJlcG9ydC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
in Delaware.

Here is the history of our Biden corruption investigation:

In December 2020, we uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27184&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdWtyYWluZS1oaWxsYXJ5LWNsaW50b24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
Obama-era
State Department records showing that the Ukraine prosecutor general
was pitched “high-level” access to Hillary Clinton’s
presidential campaign by a firm linked to Burisma Holdings, a
Ukrainian energy firm.

We also uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27185&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYnVyaXNtYS1pbXBlYWNobWVudC15b3Zhbm92aXRjaC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
records showing that former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie
“Masha” Yovanovitch had specifically warned in 2017 about
corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27186&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvYnVyaXNtYS1ob2xkaW5ncy11a3JhaW5lLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==].
During her November 2019 testimony in the impeachment proceedings
against President Donald Trump, Yovanovitch told lawmakers that she
knew little about Burisma.

In an October production from the State Department, we received
records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=21053&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZGVtLWxvYmJ5aW5nLWZpcm0tdWtyYWluZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
that included a briefing checklist of a February 2019 meeting in Kyiv
between Yovanovitch and Sally Painter, Burisma’s lobbyist at Blue
Star Strategies, and a Burisma executive. The briefing checklist noted
that Painter also planned to meet with Foreign Commercial Service
(FCS) Officer Martin Claessens “regarding the Burisma Group energy
company.”

At the time of the meeting, Hunter Biden, son of President Joe Biden,
was serving on the board of directors for Burisma Holdings
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27187&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjEvMDUvMjYvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVucy11a3JhaW5lLXNhbGFyeS13YXMtY3V0LWFmdGVyLWpvZS1iaWRlbi1sZWZ0LW9mZmljZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=],
despite having no previous experience in the energy industry. Biden
served on the board of Burisma until his term expired in April 2019.

In September 2020, we made public
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=20566&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcnVzc2lhbnMtdHJvbGxpbmctam9lLWJpZGVuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
records that show George Kent, the Obama administration’s deputy
assistant secretary of state in charge of Ukraine policy, which was
copied to Yovanovitch, highlighting Russia-linked media “trolling”
Joe Biden over “his son’s business.” An email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=20501&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtYnVyaXNtYS1zZXB0LTIwMjAtcHJvZC0wMDIyOS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
was sent four days prior to the inauguration of President Donald Trump
to a redacted recipient and CCd to Yovanovitch with the subject line
“medvedchuk-linked vesti trolls Biden.” Kent writes: “Burisma
– gift that keeps on giving. (With medvedchuk affiliated Vesti
pushing the troll-like storyline on visit day)”

The State Department is unlawfully ignoring FOIA law to protect Hunter
and Joe Biden. We have no doubt, given our prior finds, that the State
Department has many secrets about Biden corruption tucked away.

UNIVERSITY OF PITTSBURGH ASKED NIH FOR HELP WITH CRITICISM OF FETAL
ORGAN EXPERIMENTS

Our work exposing fetal organ experiments and trafficking, using your
tax dollars, has generated national outrage. And those involved in
this barbaric practice are desperate to quell the criticism so they
can continue inhumane experiments.

We obtained 34 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27151&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL25paC11LXBpdHQtYmFieS1wYXJ0cy1odW1hbml6ZWQtbWljZS1hcHJpbC0yMDIwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
of new records revealing that the Associate Senior Vice Chancellor for
Science Strategy and Planning in the Health Sciences at the University
of Pittsburgh Dr. Jeremy Berg contacted then-Director of the National
Institutes of Health (NIH) Francis Collins, requesting help to combat
“efforts to undermine important science using fetal tissue.”

Additionally, the records include a scientific report containing
information about grafting human scalp and other tissues onto mice.
(Through a related FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27165&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmV3LWZkYS1yZWNvcmRzLWh1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
in
September 2021 we uncovered records and communications from the FDA
involving “humanized mice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=17668&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXd0bi5jb20vY2F0aG9saWNpc20vbGlicmFyeS9mZXRhbC1leHBlcmltZW50YXRpb24tZnJhbmtlbnN0ZWluLXJldmlzaXRlZC05NjEwXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==
research with human fetal heads, organs, and tissue.)

We obtained the records in response to FOIA suit against the U.S.
Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for records of
communication related to a September 21, 2021, letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27210&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGFua2ZvcmQuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9pbW8vbWVkaWEvZG9jL1VuaXZlcnNpdHlvZlBpdHRzYnVyZ2hMZXR0ZXIucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
sent by Sen. James Lankford and nearly 100 members of Congress
demanding an investigation into the University of Pittsburgh’s
potentially illegal fetal tissue research (_Judicial Watch v. U.S.
Department of Health and Human Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27153&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXBpdHQtZmV0YWwtcGFydHMtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwMjk2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
(No. 1:22-cv-00296)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
HHS and its component, the National Institutes of Health (NIH), failed
to respond to November 16, 2021, FOIA request for:

All records of communication, including emails and text messages,
regarding the September 21, 2021 letter co-authored by Sen. James
Lankford and other congressmen to Director Francis Collins, demanding
an investigation into the University of Pittsburgh’s program of
fetal body parts procurement and experimentation (copy attached), sent
to and from the following NIH officials: Director Collins, Principal
Deputy Director Lawrence A. Tabak, Acting Chief of Staff John T.
Burklow, and Acting Associate Director Renate H. Myles.
In August 2021, we and the Center for Medical Progress through a
separate FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27154&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGhzLWRvY3VtZW50cy1vcmdhbi1oYXJ2ZXN0aW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
uncovered HHS documents that revealed nearly $3 million in federal
funds were spent on the University of Pittsburgh’s quest to become a
“Tissue Hub” for human fetal tissue ranging from 6 to 42 weeks
gestation. Among other findings, the records revealed:

* The aims of the project listed in the original 2015 proposal were
to “develop a pipeline
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=25492&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZy0xNjgvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
to the acquisition, quality control and distribution of human
genitourinary [urinary and genital organs and functions] samples
obtained throughout development (6-42 weeks gestation). ... [and]
generate an ongoing resource to distribute fresh developmental human
genitourinary samples from various stages (6-42 weeks) to the GUDMAP
[GenitoUrinary Development Molecular Anatomy Project] Atlas
projects.”
* In the proposal
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=25493&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZy0xNjkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz],
Pitt notes that it has been “collecting fetal tissue for over 10
years ... include[ing] liver, heart, gonads, legs, brain,
genitourinary tissues including kidneys, ureters and bladders.”
* Pitt noted in 2015 “we have disbursed over 300 fresh samples
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=25494&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZ3MtMTI3LTE0NC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
collected from 77 cases. The collections can be significantly ramped
up as material could have been accrued from as many as 725 cases last
year.”
* The Health Sciences Tissue Bank at Pitt is “embedded
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=25492&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZy0xNjgvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
within the Department of Pathology ... thus providing rapid access to
very high quality tissue and biological specimens.”
* Pitt boasts it has a number of internal connections as well as a
“strong working relationship with UPMC [University of Pittsburgh
Medical Center] and the Department of Pathology” as well as three
“laboratories in the flagship UPMC hospitals.” This includes a lab
boasting a “ButcherBoy band saw
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=25495&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZ3MtMTM1LTEzNi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
for sectioning bone,” and a “frozen section room has digital video
feed to and from the operating rooms. This also allows for
instantaneous discussions with the surgeons as well [as] immediate
‘show and tell’ for them.” The proposal ironically also boasts
about the laboratories at the “Children’s Hospital of Pittsburgh
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=25496&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZy0xMzgvXS7igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=
* Later in the proposal, Pitt states that it records the “warm
ischemic time on our samples and take steps to keep it at a minimum to
ensure the highest quality biological specimens.” [The “warm
ischemic time” refers to the amount of time an organ remains at body
temperature after blood supply has been cut off. Warm ischemic time
differs from cold ischemic time which refers to the amount of time the
organ is chilled. Pitt’s statement suggests the time between the
abortion and collection is minimal.]

BIDEN AGENCY THAT REGULATES CREDIT UNIONS PROMOTES CRITICAL RACE
THEORY

Another federal agency has gone fully woke at your expense.

We received 15 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27193&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL25hdGlvbmFsLWNyZWRpdC11bmlvbi1hc3NuLW5jdWEtbWFyY2gtMjAyMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
of records from the National Credit Union Association (NCUA) in
response to a FOIA request that shows the government agency
responsible for regulating credit unions required “inclusion and
unconscious bias training” for the agency’s employees and
contractors and offered advice on how to recognize and address alleged
“microaggressions” in the workplace.

The NCUA
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27194&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmN1YS5nb3YvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
is, “an independent federal agency
that insures deposits at federally insured credit unions, protects the
members who own credit unions, and charters and regulates federal
credit unions.”

A February 25, 2021, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27195&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL25hdGlvbmFsLWNyZWRpdC11bmlvbi1hc3NuLW5jdWEtbWFyY2gtMjAyMi1wZ3MtNS02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
from the Office of Minority and Women Inclusion (OMWI) to “All NCUA
Staff” with the subject line “Inclusion and unconscious bias
training now available” notes that an attached memo provides
information about a “new, required training course” called
“Inclusion at Work: Managing Unconscious Bias at the Office.”

The accompanying memo notes that the training unit was required for
“All employees and contractors” as part of “required annual
diversity and inclusion training.”

The memo states: “The NCUA is committed to building the diversity
and inclusion competencies of employees to advance NCUA’s Strategic
Objective 3.1 – to attract, engage and retain a highly skilled,
diverse workforce, and cultivate an inclusive environment.”

In a February 10, 2022, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27196&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL25hdGlvbmFsLWNyZWRpdC11bmlvbi1hc3NuLW5jdWEtbWFyY2gtMjAyMi1wZy00Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
to “All NCUA Staff” from the Office of Minority and Women
Inclusion (OMWI), all employees are invited to attend a “virtual
OMWI Talk” where they will “watch a video and discuss the role our

the film “Race: The House We Live In,” which is the “first film
about race to focus not on individual attitudes but on the ways our
institutions and policies advantage some groups at the expense of
others. Its subject is the ‘unmarked’ race. We see how benefits
quietly and often invisibly accrue to [the majority], not necessarily
because of hard work, but because of the racialized nature of our
laws, courts, customs, and perhaps most pertinently, housing.” The
email describes OMWI Talks as a “safe place to have difficult
conversations about race, identity, privilege, unconscious bias,
cultural appropriation and a host of other thought-provoking
topics.”

A July 12, 2021, OMWI email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27197&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL25hdGlvbmFsLWNyZWRpdC11bmlvbi1hc3NuLW5jdWEtbWFyY2gtMjAyMi1wZy03Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]

In an internal NCUA newsletter, called VIBE

The article “Microaggressions at work: Recognizing & overcoming our
biases,” published
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27201&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY3VsdHVyZWFtcC5jb20vYmxvZy9taWNyb2FnZ3Jlc3Npb25zLWF0LXdvcms/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
by
“Culture Amp,” states that “microaggressions” can include
“Asking a lesbian co-worker, ‘Who’s the man in your
relationship,’ ” “Mispronouncing someone’s name because
‘it’s too difficult to say,” “Mistaking a Latinx colleague for
a service worker,” and “Naming all the buildings or rooms after
White men.”

Americans should be disturbed that the Biden administration is using
the agency responsible for regulating credit unions to subject
employees and the public to an extremist and discriminatory Critical
Race Theory ideology that attacks individuals based on race.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FDA RECORDS ABOUT PFIZER/BIONTECH VACCINE

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit against the
Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for FDA emails and
records about the Pfizer/BioNTech for COVID-19 vaccine (_Judicial
Watch v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27174&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLWNvbWlybmF0eS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDA3MzMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
(No. 1:22-cv-00733)).

We sued after HHS failed to reply to our August 24, 2021, FOIA request
for:

Any and all records submitted by Pfizer and/or BioNTech for the
SARS-CoV-2 vaccine known as Comirnaty, which received approval from
the FDA on August 23, 2021.

All emails related to the vaccine that became known as Comirnaty sent
to and from the following FDA officials: Acting FDA Commissioner Janet
Woodcock; Deputy Commissioner Andi Lipstein Fristedt; Deputy
Commissioner James Sigg; Chief of Staff Julia C. Tierney, J.D.;
Associate Commissioner Judith A. McMeekin, Pharm.D.; Associate
Commissioner Lauren Roth, J.D.; and Acting Assistant Commissioner
Michael Felberbaum.

All internal FDA studies, analyses, memoranda and reports related to
the drug known as Comirnaty.
According to Pfizer’s website
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27175&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGZpemVybWVkaWNhbGluZm9ybWF0aW9uLmNvbS9lbi11cy9wYXRpZW50L3BmaXplci1iaW9udGVjaC1jb3ZpZC0xOS12YWNjaW5lP3RhYj1waV06JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz
“Comirnaty [COVID-19 Vaccine, mRNA] is FDA-approved as a 2-dose
series for prevention of COVID-19 in individuals 16 years of age and
older. It is also authorized under EUA to provide a two-dose primary
series in individuals 12 through 15 years. Pfizer-BioNTech COVID-19
Vaccine has received EUA from FDA to provide a two-dose primary series
in individuals 12 years of age and older and to provide a two-dose
primary series to individuals 5 through 11 years of age.”

In violation of FOIA law the FDA is covering up complete details on
its approval of the controversial Pfizer COVID vaccine. The public
deserves to know everything possible – as soon as possible – about
a vaccine that is currently impacting tens of millions of people.

In January, a federal judge in Texas ordered the FDA
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27176&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmV1dGVycy5jb20vbGVnYWwvZ292ZXJubWVudC9wYXJhbW91bnQtaW1wb3J0YW5jZS1qdWRnZS1vcmRlcnMtZmRhLWhhc3Rlbi1yZWxlYXNlLXBmaXplci12YWNjaW5lLWRvY3MtMjAyMi0wMS0wNy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
to make the data it relied on to license Pfizer’s COVID-19 vaccine
available to the public. The judge imposed a schedule that should
result in the release of all information by September 2020. The court
concluded
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27213&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9maW5nZngudGhvbXNvbnJldXRlcnMuY29tL2dmeC9sZWdhbGRvY3MvZ2R2enlrZGxscHcvUGl0dG1hbkZPSUFPcmRlci5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=],
“that this FOIA request is of paramount public importance.”

The judge denied
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27178&F=T&]
the FDA’s attempt to have 75 years to complete the FOIA request made
by a group of doctors and scientists who asked for information about
the vaccine. The FDA claimed it could only manage to release 500 pages
of records per month of its 450,000 pages that are responsive to the
Texas case.

We recently filed a lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27059&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY292aWQtMTktYm9vc3RlcnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
against HHS for
records about its subagency Biomedical Advanced Research and
Development Authority (BARDA) research into COVID-19 boosters, and for
communications related to adverse events
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=27179&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmFjY2luZS1zaWRlLWVmZmVjdHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
caused by
COVID-19 vaccines.

In January through a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58701&L=26571&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd2FsZW5za3ktY2RjLXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
we uncovered
records from the CDC that show Director Rochelle Walensky’s request
for details about the death of a teenager who died days after
receiving a coronavirus vaccination.

Until next week ...
