name: John Gomez  - Campaign Manager
subject: Chabot for Congress - Update from the Campaign Trail 4/22
body:
The latest from Congressman Steve Chabot on the campaign trail!
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tyjilha-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyjilha-kujkulhluu-r/)
# Update from the Campaign Trail 4/22/22
Good evening,Congressman Chabot is working hard to deliver results for the working families of Ohio's 1st Congressional District. The Congressman has been traveling the district, speaking to voters about the dangers of Biden's inflation, his border crisis, and the state of the country. **_Congressman Chabot on the Trail_** _Wrapping Up Fish Fry Season_ Throughout the Lenten season, Congressman Chabot traveled across the district to spend time with constituents at local Fish Frys. Stops along the tour included events in Mt. Washington, Anderson Township, Lebanon, and others!We're thankful for the hospitality and all of the great folks we met along the way! _Local GOP Clubs_ Over the last few weeks, Congressman Chabot has been making the rounds and speaking to local GOP clubs about the state of the race, the future of the country, and why it's so important to be involved this year. The turnout at all of these meetings has been great with all of the crowds enthusiastic to get to work and take back the House and the country! _Cincinnati Right to Life - Heartbeats for Life 5k_ Last Saturday, Congressman Chabot attended the Cincinnati Right to Life Heartbeats for Life 5k. It was cold and rainy but the crowd was energized and motivated! It was encouraging to see so many people brave the elements to support a great cause.Congressman Chabot is proud to be an endorsed pro-life candidate and the author of the ban on partial-birth abortion. _Congressman Chabot on Mike Allen 700WLW_ Congressman Chabot spoke with Mike Allen on 700WLW last week about the Biden Border Crisis, Title 42, Ukraine, and the other issues of the day. _" The fact is, we're all border states now. [...] It's absolutely outrageous and this needs to stop."_ - Congressman Chabot.You can listen to the full interview [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyjilha-kujkulhluu-y/) at the 1 hour and 23 minute mark. _This Week 's Blog - "What They Need Now"_This week's blog is about the War in Ukraine and what we should do to support the effort against Putin and Russia, _" The reality is, the Ukrainians are fighting for the Ukrainians. For their homeland; for their families; for their freedom; for their very survival. Now even though they're fighting for themselves, their success is also our success. We have a common foe - naked aggression. Authoritarianism. Barbarism. Vladimir Putin."_Read the blog post [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyjilha-kujkulhluu-j/). As a reminder - **Early voting for the May 3rd primary has started!** You can vote early in person at your local Board of Elections, absentee via mail, or in person on May 3rd!Have a great weekend.Yours truly,John GomezCampaign Manager - Chabot for Congress [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyjilha-kujkulhluu-t/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyjilha-kujkulhluu-i/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyjilha-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyjilha-kujkulhluu-h/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyjilha-kujkulhluu-k/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyjilha-kujkulhluu-u/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-tyjilha-kujkulhluu-b/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-tyjilha-kujkulhluu-n/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-tyjilha-l-p) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. [Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-tyjilha-961825B2-kujkulhluu-z) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-tyjilha-kujkulhluu-v/)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: My Lawsuit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Peter: The Deep State is trying to kick me off the ballot. Despite donating millions to my opponents, they know they can't beat me in a fair election. So, they do what Deep State Elites do best - they try to change the rules to benefit them. They're trying to prevent me from winning before the election starts! All because I supported the right to peacefully protest the election stolen from Donald Trump in 2020. Frankly, I'm worried that without your help, they might succeed. **[That's why I'm asking for your help today with a donation of $25, $50, or $100 so I can fight back and continue to run for re-election as a Member of the United States Congress.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60210128:JokzuwosN:m:1:3317145305:6F6B65E556521561B07C3169F2C842D0:r "That’s why I’m asking for your help today with a
donation of $25, $50, or $100 so I can fight back and continue to run for re-election as a Member of the United States Congress.")** Believe me when I say this is a coordinated effort from the D.C. Lobbyists and Washington elites who fear that I'm encouraging freedom-loving Americans to question every spending bill, unconstitutional mandate, and the socialist program they try to force upon us. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60210128:JokzuwosN:m:1:3317145305:6F6B65E556521561B07C3169F2C842D0:r "Video")I'm fighting to stop the border invasion, their defund agenda, and their new gun control measures, and this is how they intend to stop me. The deck has been so stacked against me that I had to file a lawsuit to stop this charade. I will probably have to take it all the way to the Supreme Court to win. **Fighting their fraudulent lawsuit could cost me hundreds of thousands of dollars.** That's money I won't be able to use to get my message out to the voters in my district. And I'm worried even if I'm successful in stopping their charade, I won't have enough to ensure victory at the ballot box. **[I'm not going to lie - the D.C. Cabal and their minions have got me over a barrel. That's why I desperately need your help today to ensure I can defend my right to be on the ballot AND then win the November election. Can you chip in $50, $100, or $500 to help me fend off this new attack?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60210128:JokzuwosN:m:1:3317145305:6F6B65E556521561B07C3169F2C842D0:r "I’m not going to lie – the D.C. Cabal and their minions have got me over a barrel. That’s why I desperately need your help
today to ensure I can defend my right to be on the ballot AND then win the November election. Can you chip in $50, $100, or $500 to help me fend off
this new attack?")** It should worry you how hard they are trying to keep America First Conservatives like me off the ballot. These Leftists know we're making a difference in Congress, and it frightens them. Other states have blocked this type of ridiculous lawsuit, but I'm the Left's number one target, so I have to keep fighting. **[If you value the work that I've been able to accomplish, then I need you to dig deep. If I'm going to fend off this legal challenge AND win my election, it's going to require you to help me with a donation of $100, $500, or $1,000.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60210128:JokzuwosN:m:1:3317145305:6F6B65E556521561B07C3169F2C842D0:r "If you value the work that I’ve been able to accomplish, then I need you to dig deep. If I’m going to fend off this legal
challenge AND win my election, it’s going to require you to help me with a donation of $100, $500, or $1,000.")** The one silver lining I can see is that if they're working this hard to stop me from returning to Congress, then they're scared of what I might expose next--like how much Joe Biden is indebted to China. Our America First agenda is resonating and will bring true change to our country which is why I must continue to remain a Member of Congress. But it's only going to work if I can stop this legal challenge IMMEDIATELY. **[Please help me today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60210128:JokzuwosN:m:1:3317145305:6F6B65E556521561B07C3169F2C842D0:r "Please help
me today.")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---

body:

name: Liz (Team Benson)
subject: People are taking notice about Jocelyn's award
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

If you haven't heard the news already, Jocelyn was just awarded the JFK Profile in Courage award for her work defending democracy! Jocelyn was honored alongside important leaders such as Ukrainian President Volodmyr Zelenskyy and Congresswoman Liz Cheney. I've been tracking some of the news coverage of the award and I wanted to share with you some of what I've been seeing!

- Liz

Read Detroit Free Press here >> https://www.freep.com/story/news/politics/elections/2022/04/21/michigan-jocelyn-benson-jfk-profile-courage-award/7393682001/] https://www.axios.com/zelensky-cheney-jfk-profiles-courage-337c4b85-82a8-4d36-83e8-62220ebe3b08.html

Read the Axios piece here>> https://www.axios.com/zelensky-cheney-jfk-profiles-courage-337c4b85-82a8-4d36-83e8-62220ebe3b08.html https://www.msnbc.com/11th-hour/watch/profile-in-courage-award-138286661772

Watch the MSNBC Piece here>> [https://www.msnbc.com/11th-hour/watch/profile-in-courage-award

name: Team Cooper
subject: Roy supports Val Applewhite for state Senate. Will you join him?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44453626/341675514/105898166?refcode=ea.3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzI0MTA0YS0wNWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flYm35keE0gVNNgaTxNQIzbG28kSVzNp2_cJrhpQ4Bo=&emci=0cb4b840-42c2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176) Peter, From fighting to expand Medicaid so North Carolinians have access to the health care they need and deserve, to securing voting rights to ensure we all have a say in our government, Roy and his allies in Raleigh are hard at work for us. But if we are to achieve progress on these critical issues and more, Roy needs partners who are _all in_ and ready to work with him for our state’s best interests. **That’s why Roy was proud to endorse former Fayetteville City Councilor and Air Force Veteran Val Applewhite for state Senate.** Roy is confident she is the right candidate to serve her community in Raleigh and he knows she’ll be a strong advocate for the priorities we share. **[But if she’s going to win her primary election in less than a month, Val needs your immediate support as well. Click here to donate to Val’s campaign — 100% of your donation will go directly to Val>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44453627/341675521/105898166?refcode=ea.3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzI0MTA0YS0wNWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flYm35keE0gVNNgaTxNQIzbG28kSVzNp2_cJrhpQ4Bo=&emci=0cb4b840-42c2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)** | [DONATE TO VAL APPLEWHITE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44453628/341675528/105898166?refcode=ea.3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzI0MTA0YS0wNWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flYm35keE0gVNNgaTxNQIzbG28kSVzNp2_cJrhpQ4Bo=&emci=0cb4b840-42c2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
---
Peter, Val has already dedicated her life to public service. After serving in the Air Force and at the Pentagon, she advocated for her community at home on the city council and through nonprofit work dedicated to making sure elections are free, fair, and accessible.
She fought against partisan gerrymandering and legislation designed to make it harder for some of us to vote. During the pandemic, Val worked to make sure marginalized communities had access to the resources they needed. She is committed to creating a state where every North Carolinian has an equal chance to prosper.
**Peter, Roy needs legislators who aren’t afraid to stand up to the radical right-wing and will help him continue moving North Carolina forward. He needs Val Applewhite working with him in Raleigh.**
**[Donate directly to her campaign today to help her win this May primary and succeed in the general election in November!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44453629/341675538/105898166?refcode=ea.3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzI0MTA0YS0wNWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flYm35keE0gVNNgaTxNQIzbG28kSVzNp2_cJrhpQ4Bo=&emci=0cb4b840-42c2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)**
[DONATE TO VAL APPLEWHITE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44453630/341675563/105898166?refcode=ea.3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzI0MTA0YS0wNWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flYm35keE0gVNNgaTxNQIzbG28kSVzNp2_cJrhpQ4Bo=&emci=0cb4b840-42c2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3c24104a-05c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: Trump's pal Putin

Hello,
Right now, Ukrainians are bravely defending their country with Iowa-made weapons. Russian armored columns are getting stopped in their tracks with American Javelin missiles – crucial parts of which are made right here in Iowa.
**But if it were up to Donald Trump, Ukraine would be on its own against his pal Putin – still waiting for American military aid until President Zelensky agreed to open a sham investigation into Joe Biden.**
And my opponent Chuck Grassley was one of 52 Republican senators who chose blind loyalty to Trump over helping Ukraine defend itself against Russia.
When I defeat Chuck Grassely this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the Senate. I understand the real threat Russia poses and the importance of NATO, and I’ll ensure Iowa continues to help Ukraine against Putin’s war-crime invasion.
If our campaign is successful in turning Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our majority in the Senate. But the polls are showing a very close race, and McConnell’s Super PACs are about to spend millions against me.
**We need to raise $50,000 before midnight tonight, and right now we’re still falling short. The only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Senate majority is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important. Please, will you give $5 or more right now – no amount is too small – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44453778/341675897/-42398318?refcode=em20220423am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzI0MTA0YS0wNWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhfbDbLTnyOp-hA9tVHDbis-ZZbOFjzNH1fNBiMg2Hg=)

body:
Do you stand with the 21 GOP Governors trying to eliminate the federal mask mandate?
**FIRST:** Biden canceled President Trump's border wall project...
**THEN:** Illegal migrant crossings from the Southern border went through the roof...
**AFTER:** Texas officials pleaded for help...
**AND:** Border agents were left defenseless...
**NOW:** Texas Governor Greg Abbott sent buses of illegal immigrants to Joe Biden's doorstep in Washington, DC.
We're doing everything we can to bring back Trump's border wall and reinstate his America First agenda. The only way we have any hope of restarting building the border wall is to get 1,500 signatures by tonight!
[**Can you be one of the signatures we desperately need?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60210211:JD0oEwoN5:m:1:3317145305:BAA8E6BBEFA367C968FC941C2F481DBF:r)

Folks,

_I’ve got something to ask you._

My Midterm election will be here before you know it. This means everyone from our party has got to work together so we can all make a difference for our great country this year.

**_The Radical Left is like the person who brings SPAM to the crawfish boil. We don’t want any more SPAM showing up at our kitchen table next year._**

But we can restore American greatness by ensuring conservatives like yourself get out and vote in the midterm elections and help us reclaim the Majority during this critical Midterm election!

name: American Action News
subject: The 500,000
body:
I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservativ
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs1fughigar0tgp4h3rpq0iaq1odncu7elj5lec0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cti61o75cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6pbkmcob9o30carjatlh6kob5dpi6eondcb0m5q71otj63jjecpkehp72otlm3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coorecr561r60pjmciqr6ptgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0h0auiij6gsmovltbsr2ld4pvil71f7tossf860_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cti61o75cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5q82s4qp7s86ocfa8sjrm8rsasvf0o929tjt9hg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cti61o75cdh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3biva8nhqp72kinniu69mckq4oni175bvsf00t8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cti61o75cdh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv0d2sjqf3vl71f1tkps6d777o8a0k92fplbrsp8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cti61o75cdh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. clean_body: I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservativ This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. name: American Update
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9955%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=oHaQ08JfM8aD8m5oeLFeXw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29292%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PJ9Xj%2fLi7uKPZ8jHKZSgMg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29293%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r%2fM65IKot6H3TgoiVoiR9g&sysid=1) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29294%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v6cvYviSn6gFWmhW%2b%2bRniQ&sysid=1)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29205%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mYqvRHo43BLbao1VSP%2b57w&sysid=1)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29205%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mYqvRHo43BLbao1VSP%2b57w&sysid=1)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29206%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hK3dNrZqvohgi%2fnTetNgMw&sysid=1) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29207%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TfRE0qM9It9xGLBuUWnVtg&sysid=1)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:
Everywhere I’ve been, everything I’ve done, has all been leading up to now.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44460666/341705492/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmYzM2NhZC0wZGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7tT7-GeXAHBlXj6w_8jqtHg-YpscOlJe6G83sYRsSQ=) As a little girl here in Wisconsin, I never could have imagined where my life would take me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44460668/341705493/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmYzM2NhZC0wZGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7tT7-GeXAHBlXj6w_8jqtHg-YpscOlJe6G83sYRsSQ=) First, to Northern Virginia and D.C., where I watched my dad serve our Wisconsin community in Congress. My parents raised me and my siblings to know that service is one of the highest callings - that it is our duty to do what we can to create a better world. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44460669/341705495/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmYzM2NhZC0wZGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7tT7-GeXAHBlXj6w_8jqtHg-YpscOlJe6G83sYRsSQ=) Then, after joining the military (following my father’s example) to serve our country, I volunteered for the DMZ in Korea - and was later one of a few women in positions of leadership. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44460670/341705496/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmYzM2NhZC0wZGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7tT7-GeXAHBlXj6w_8jqtHg-YpscOlJe6G83sYRsSQ=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44460672/341705497/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmYzM2NhZC0wZGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7tT7-GeXAHBlXj6w_8jqtHg-YpscOlJe6G83sYRsSQ=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44460673/341705499/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmYzM2NhZC0wZGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7tT7-GeXAHBlXj6w_8jqtHg-YpscOlJe6G83sYRsSQ=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44460675/341705500/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.52f33cad-0dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmYzM2NhZC0wZGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7tT7-GeXAHBlXj6w_8jqtHg-YpscOlJe6G83sYRsSQ=)

**I’m running for Congress because my life has taken me to places of great challenge, but western and central Wisconsin have always been the “home” I was protecting and serving.** I know that, aside from raising my children, the most important thing I could ever do is to give back to the community that shaped me.

I’m running because my career has shown me time and time again that democracies are fragile, and I know that ours is under attack.

I’m running because my children’s generation deserves to experience the same kind of natural beauty I’ve seen on all my travels and right here in WI - but the existential threat of climate change is putting their future in peril.

I’m running because this is not a time when anyone can sit back and relax, and I’ve always stood up to serve when needed.

clean_body: Everywhere I’ve been, everything I’ve done, has all been leading up to now. | = As a little girl here in Wisconsin, I never could have imagined where my life would take me. = First, to Northern Virginia and D.C., where I watched my dad serve our Wisconsin community in Congress. My parents raised me and my siblings to know that service is one of the highest callings - that it is our duty to do what we can to create a better world. = Then, after joining the military (following my father’s example) to serve our country, I volunteered for the DMZ in Korea - and was later one of a few women in positions of leadership. | = | = ---|--- When Kevin and I got married, military assignments took us (and our children!) across the country and to some of our nation’s most challenging postings abroad. = | = ---|--- We instilled in our family the same values my parents gave me: a love of country, gratitude for what we have, the importance of giving back, and a determination to always do what is right. = | = ---|--- Peter, everywhere I’ve been, everything I’ve done - it’s all been leading up to right now. = **= I’m running for Congress because my life has taken me to places of great challenge, but western and central Wisconsin have always been the “home” I was protecting and serving. I know that, aside from raising my children, the most important thing I could ever do is to give back to the community that shaped me. I’m running because my career has shown me time and time again that democracies are fragile, and I know that ours is under attack. I’m running because my children’s generation deserves to experience the same kind of natural beauty I’ve seen on all my travels and right here in WI - but the existential threat of climate change is putting their future in peril. Team, did you see this Washington Post opinion piece? it makes a crucial argument: that D.C. Statehood isn’t just a D.C. issue. It’s a voting rights issue.
https://action.demsofstate.org/a/dc-statehood [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/dc-statehood]
The nation’s 51st state would come with two new Senators, who could turn the tide of vital legislation in Congress and help us end the filibuster.
Right now, close to 700,000 tax-paying residents are being denied full representation, just so Republicans can maintain power.
We need to keep the pressure on, team!
If you think Congress should finally make Washington, D.C. a state take action TODAY and sign our petition immediately! >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/dc-statehood]
ADD MY NAME >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/dc-statehood]
Responses required by 12:00:00am to ensure survey accuracy.
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]
This email was sent to: email. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on our Democratic agenda. body:

Friend,

Are you going to activate your **[Trump Life Membership?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60068%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kojI8AeT2FHjIIfnjfOSVw&sysid=1)**

********MEMBERSHIP STATUS: PENDING
DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT********
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60060%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xj9vgTy1FzvejURDTqjpHg&sysid=1)**

I just got off the phone with GOP Leadership - when I asked them if YOU had stepped up, they informed me that they hadn’t heard from you in a while. **Is this true?**

You were one of the Patriots I have always been able to count on _\- no matter what the Left-wing media and SOCIALIST SQUAD throw at me -_ which is why I’ve decided to hold your spot on the roster open until midnight tonight.

_We only do this for my TOP supporters, like YOU, so please do not share this very exclusive offer with ANYONE._

---
**Welcome to the Ron DeSantis Round Up where we help you stay up-to-date with America's favorite Governor!**
**__Protecting Floridians from Woke Indoctrination__**
On Friday, Governor DeSantis signed the 'Stop WOKE Act' to keep indoctrination out of Florida classrooms and workplaces.

Governor DeSantis is providing substantive protections to keep Critical Race Theory and its divisive concepts away from Florida students.

[Read more](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=618de579a326719ed82d98dad8b622d362975618d5c0ee6b299c8e06d4023fc758741464d167cde8ccf0dfe4bba89955d21a7c1f82d99473) about how Governor DeSantis is protecting Floridians from the Left's distorted ideological goals.
**__A Victory For Freedom__**
This week, air travel passengers across the country were able to take a collective (and unrestricted) deep breath as a federal judge overturned the Biden Administration's airline mask mandate!

Last month, Governor DeSantis and Attorney General Ashley Moody sued the Biden Administration over the mask mandate on airplanes and public transportation, and this week **_freedom prevailed._**

"We are very happy that finally we have judicial relief from the unscientific mask mandate on airplanes." - **Governor Ron DeSantis**
**__Freedom Is Winning In Florida__**
Thanks to the leadership of Governor Ron DeSantis, registered Republican voters now [outnumber ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=618de579a326719e573aef19c2fb27d43b6a977c50290a71a329ea09e022557ec1b06031761b4a34e4b67c7bb45ae715067112f8964d3be3) Democrats by over 100,000 for the first time in Florida's history.

Floridians are joining the Republican Party because of Governor DeSantis and his freedom agenda. Florida's First Lady Casey DeSantis [said](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=618de579a326719e49227ef3ff569c8a47307be1f449d9e3b3e324b798a279ad4f9d029145c285997bc86953e5ee2895a4c87dbeff5873c8) it best.
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=618de579a326719e49227ef3ff569c8a47307be1f449d9e3b3e324b798a279ad4f9d029145c285997bc86953e5ee2895a4c87dbeff5873c8)
---

**See the data for yourself:**
* In November 2021, for the first time in Florida history, we celebrated more registered Republicans than Democrats - a **HUGE** milestone.
* In March 2022, we realized a +100,000 voter registration advantage.
* And we've now crossed +116,000 more Republicans than Democrats, marking a +250,000 net voter swing from Election Day in 2020.

_**_Join the Fight!_**_
Join Team DeSantis and get involved in the movement that is fighting to ensure a free Florida for generations to come!

Become a member of the DeSantis Freedom Team -- help recruit new supporters to the campaign and get rewarded in the process.

Rewards range from t-shirts to an invitation to an event and a photo with Governor DeSantis and the First Lady!
_**[Don't wait-- Join the DeSantis Freedom Team TODAY!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=618de579a326719e2b7814dfd0cbc5df6fd8f480c7317b4f38415477c1ef21d0b7f9e3385b5f8702cb14467530ddc00885dfe6b16fad5b54 "Don't wait - join the DeSantis Freedom Team TODAY!")**_
Thank you for being a strong supporter of our movement to keep Florida FREE. We couldn't do it without you.

This is urgent, friend.

We are just months away from what could be one of the most consequential midterm elections of our lifetime. And with the last Florida Senate race being decided by just 0.12%, every goal is _critical_ to reaching voters and winning.

After I asked for your help yesterday, I was so heartened to see hundreds of supporters contribute to this campaign – **but I still need another 128 Election Year Members before midnight to hit my daily fundraising goal.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44465004/341717801/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2998-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY0OTFkZC0xMWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5FT4vrlCF7_A10RvQHpdRK98c5wYnNmwAee0CHO7Ko=)
This is a make-or-break moment: If I defeat Marco Rubio, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to control the Senate. Campaign strategists like James Carville say they have "zero doubt" that I can win – but ONLY if I amass enough resources to reach more voters right now.
**In a race as important as this one, falling short isn't an option. Missing tonight's goal could mean losing this race. Losing this race could cost Democrats our majority and enough votes to abolish the filibuster, safeguard reproductive freedom or strengthen voting rights. With so much on the line, I'm counting on you to become an Election Year Member right now:**
**[Please, friend, will you donate $5 or more to become an Election Year Member, help me reach my daily fundraising goal and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44465005/341717802/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2998-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY0OTFkZC0xMWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5FT4vrlCF7_A10RvQHpdRK98c5wYnNmwAee0CHO7Ko=)**
Thank you,

Val Demings

body:
I have bad news. You’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have broken a 2 year support streak.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zai2i5ktdgoh6uhb04438cb030flosh5jq5pa0q0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo76dhic8rbeppm6ppr8d5jeoob2s5lcar60sb6caqm9ojnm9jr8s9iegq35crgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rj6p9nmar6cd30mdijfc5lclp238h1e8he4933clg6eoj3c1h6eoh5u)
I have bad news. You’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have broken a 2 year support streak.

| |
---
| | |
Fellow Conservative,

**I have bad news. You’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have broken a 2-year support streak.**

I am so disappointed. You seemed like such a great Republican supporter. And now that Republicans are on the verge of winning back the House Majority, we need you more than ever.

**[Will you renew for 2022 and become a Sustaining Member of our Republican team one more time? I am holding the renewal window open for you until TONIGHT at Midnight.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4rjttug64aqjvjoghh0ragqh1gg2bnkkvl90nig_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cth66o32cth2bs "Will you renew for 2022 and become a Sustaining Member of our Republican team one more time? I am holding the renewal window open for you until TONIGHT at Midnight.")**

---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj6fvhk25rcm2ee2p0b48a8ksubiqlf5f27hgcj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cth66o32cth2bs)
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zai4d6tjfq525r5e5d90rir6qfk6vrh92h1e7d6o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cth66o32cth2bs "Generic Button")
---
**Democrats are expecting that grassroots conservative supporters like you will let your memberships lapse in the New Year, tune out of politics, and even forget to vote.**

In the meantime, Democrats are raising MILLIONS to beat Republicans and hold the House. It’s a simple strategy - they’re using limousine liberal money from New York and California to drown out the voices of real Americans like you and me.

That’s why it’s so important you renew your 2022 Republican Membership, Fellow Conservative! **[Please make your commitment by 12 AM](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl2q0n00muv8agcbdbvp2c1ogr2i7cq3re3uteig_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cth66o32cth2bs "Please make your commitment by 12AM") **and give Republicans the help they need to fight the Democrats’ big bucks.

I am investing extra time in your membership case because I know that with the support of great Americans like you, Republicans can win this next election.
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za9ipo9ikdeltpujdmb17sd7fkq009gb8tm5vj80_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cth66o32cth2bs "Generic Button")
---
Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---
| |
* * *

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsipe5u14giom58rdr9o4p968qn0linda6vmlmro_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cth66o32cth2bs "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu0u5o00eabcuciij9lqifjm9givumeimspc0288_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cth66o32cth2bs "Can we count on you to step up?")**

---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: Sen. Mallory McMorrow
subject: Friend, hate will only win if people like us stand by and let it happen

**Hi friend, it’s Michigan state Senator Mallory McMorrow. **
You may have seen me online or on TV this week. That’s because on Tuesday, after reading a fundraising email sent by a Republican colleague where I was accused of wanting to “groom and sexualize children” for defending LGBTQ+ rights, I took to the Michigan Senate floor to defend myself and the marginalized communities Republicans love attacking:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44469509/341726525/1357087867?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3413-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDJhMTZiZS0xNmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FHtvCd1fyhXiDxqq3vFrWnUjPechCF76CtphkQhFPX0=)
I've had people reach out to thank me for speaking out, but this isn't about me, friend. **It's about _us_ – and how if enough of us come together, speak out, and take action to hold Republicans accountable for their hollow, hateful scheme, it will fail. _Period._**
As a Michigan state Senator, I’ve seen just how far state Republicans are willing to go to pass their backward agenda, and I know that if we can elect more Democrats to our statehouses, we can stop them.
[**Will you stand with me and chip in a $5 split donation to the DLCC and Off the Sidelines? Your support will go right to work electing more Democrats who will fight for our values and stand up against Republicans’ hateful agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44469510/341726526/1357087867?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3413-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDJhMTZiZS0xNmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FHtvCd1fyhXiDxqq3vFrWnUjPechCF76CtphkQhFPX0=)

---
| [DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44469512/341726528/1357087867?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk3413-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDJhMTZiZS0xNmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FHtvCd1fyhXiDxqq3vFrWnUjPechCF76CtphkQhFPX0=)

Friend, hate will only win if people like _us_ stand by and let it happen.
Throughout the country, state Republicans are waging war on our Democratic values, attacking the LGBTQ+ community, and passing legislation that blatantly denies the racism woven into our American story.
Electing Democrats to serve in state legislatures nationwide is the key to fighting back against state Republicans’ hateful crusade. But in Michigan, we’re already on edge – we have _four_ special elections next month for critical seats in our state legislature. Electing Democrats to these seats is critical to defending against a right-wing takeover.
**We cannot stand by and let state Republicans continue their ruthless attacks – and we cannot let hate win. **
[**Fighting back against hate starts with committed Democrats like you, friend. Will you split a $5 donation today between the DLCC and Off the Sidelines to support Democrats in this year’s midterm elections? This is a critical moment for Democratic state legislators, so we can’t back down now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44469515/341726531/1357087867?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3413-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDJhMTZiZS0xNmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FHtvCd1fyhXiDxqq3vFrWnUjPechCF76CtphkQhFPX0=)
Together,
Mallory McMorrow
Michigan State Senator
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44469516/341726532/1357087867?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3413-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDJhMTZiZS0xNmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FHtvCd1fyhXiDxqq3vFrWnUjPechCF76CtphkQhFPX0=)

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: New abortion ban signed by Ron DeSantis (R-FL)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=XZOgT8stNvU%2F%2B3Cm3XOLGeazRJoxnZB%2B&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis of Florida just signed a sickening near-total ban on abortion into law in his state.
It's just the latest in a string of radical attacks on reproductive rights being waged by the GOP across the country. This year alone, nearly 90 bills have been introduced across 30 states to enact some form of an abortion ban. States like Texas, Mississippi, and Oklahoma have enacted near-total abortion bans.
The result is government control over the personal healthcare decisions of tens of millions of Americans. To be precise: government control over __women__. These coordinated Republican attacks are an inexcusable abuse of power, perpetrated in large part by male politicians. And we must fight back.
Democratic activists, lawmakers, and leaders across the country are leading the charge. In Michigan, Gov. Gretchen Whitmer has asked her state's Supreme Court to overturn a nearly 100-year-old law that banned abortion care before _Roe v. Wade 's_ precedent took place. **Should the ultraconservative U.S. Supreme Court roll back Roe 's protections, action from leaders like Gov. Whitmer could protect reproductive freedom in the states. **
But right now, it's up to grassroots Democrats to follow the lead of fighters like Gov. Whitmer. With the U.S. Supreme Court's Trump-appointed justices like Brett Kavanaugh and Amy Coney Barrett likely to torpedo _Roe v. Wade_ in a matter of weeks, I'm asking 1,000 supporters of reproductive rights - including you, Friend - to fight back. [**Will you sign on to my petition to condemn GOP attacks on reproductive rights and join Democrats across the country who are fighting back? This is an urgent moment for the right to choose, and I 'm counting on you to speak out now.**](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-repro?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1171-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-april-repro-prio-2022%3Fcode%3Djtk1171-su-nd)
In the Senate, extremist Republicans filibustered my bill to make the precedent of Roe federal law. I'm not giving up, but it's going to take Democratic action at _all_ levels of government to meet the urgency of this moment head-on.
Thank you for doing your part.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=atiH6JVPrcepIH7TOwBMzuazRJoxnZB%2B&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Defeat Ron Johnson
subject: Broken promises
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
Ron Johnson promised to fight for Wisconsin. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44470264/341729556/941786633?refcode=EM_FR_220423FR_N_drj_60DA_6_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWJiZTAwMi0xOGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=99NsLOCoxEpY9I1xsJsnGUAtnLm2qwYvt9QJo4hI1A8=)
---
Peter,

**Ron Johnson is no stranger to breaking his promises.**

Ron Johnson promised to fight for Wisconsin. Instead, he fought for his wealthy donor friends by pushing for a tax break for the ultra-wealthy. And his own net worth has doubled while in office.

He promised to help Wisconsin farmers. Instead, he voted against the American Rescue Plan — opposing $20 million to lower costs for farmers and strengthen the dairy industry.

He promised to lower healthcare costs. Instead, he calls healthcare “a privilege” and continues to attack the Affordable Care Act.

Ron Johnson has only been looking out for himself and is doing everything possible to consolidate his own power in the Senate — **and it’s time to send him packing.**

**[Alex Lasry will fight for you and work day and night in the Senate to put money back in the pockets of hardworking Wisconsinites. Help us defeat Ron Johnson by making a donation of $10 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44470265/341729564/941786633?refcode=EM_FR_220423FR_N_drj_60DA_6_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWJiZTAwMi0xOGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=99NsLOCoxEpY9I1xsJsnGUAtnLm2qwYvt9QJo4hI1A8=)** clean_body: Ron Johnson promised to fight for Wisconsin. | | = Peter, Ron Johnson is no stranger to breaking his promises. Ron Johnson promised to fight for Wisconsin. Instead, he fought for his wealthy donor friends by pushing for a tax break for the ultra-wealthy. And his own net worth has doubled while in office. He promised to help Wisconsin farmers. Instead, he voted against the American Rescue Plan — opposing $20 million to lower costs for farmers and strengthen the dairy industry. He promised to lower healthcare costs. Instead, he calls healthcare “a privilege” and continues to attack the Affordable Care Act. Ron Johnson has only been looking out for himself and is doing everything possible to consolidate his own power in the Senate — and it’s time to send him packing. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. name: John King
subject: Can I share a personal story with you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
In 1894, my grandmother, Estelle Livingston Stansberry King, was an education pioneer and one of the earliest graduates of University of Maryland Eastern Shore.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44470534/341730754/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220423-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220423-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220423&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=f8207645-19c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODIwNzY0NS0xOWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WY2IkWu2QD5c4An7RLqT97a4CUesmY4gB_XRixjztEg=)
---
| Peter, access to higher education changed the life trajectory of my entire family. If you have a moment, I’d like to tell you a personal story about the power of HBCUs as engines of social mobility and how they propelled me to serve as the 10th United States Secretary of Education under our nation’s first Black president. **In 1894, my grandmother, Estelle Livingston Stansberry King, was one of the first Black women to graduate from the University of Maryland Eastern Shore, one of our state’s many incredible HBCUs.** Upon graduation, my grandmother still did not have the right to vote, but her firm belief in the importance of education pushed her to break barriers that would go on to create a legacy of opportunity for an entire family. After graduating, my grandmother became a nurse and encouraged her own sons — my father John Sr., my uncle Dolly, and my uncle Hal — to attend college at a time when racism and segregation made higher learning inaccessible to most Black men. She always championed to them the importance of formal education and of working hard, and my grandmother’s example is proof of the transformative power of education ... for generations. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44470535/341730755/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220423-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220423-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220423&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=f8207645-19c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODIwNzY0NS0xOWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WY2IkWu2QD5c4An7RLqT97a4CUesmY4gB_XRixjztEg=) _My grandmother’s graduating class photo.
She’s pictured sitting at the very left of the bottom row._ It is in no small part because of my grandmother, my father, and my mother — who were both public school educators — that I pursued a career in which I’d honor their memories as an educator myself. That career has included serving as a teacher, a principal, and in President Obama’s Cabinet as U.S. Secretary of Education. I am also a proud public school dad to two amazing, bright young women. **Now, I’m running for governor to realize my ancestors' hopes and dreams and try to make a difference in the lives of others.** I’ve been saddened and angered to read about widespread threats of violence targeting HBCUs in Maryland and across the country. These institutions are critical to the success of our young Black scholars and are pillars of their surrounding communities. It is imperative that we come together to protect them, and as Governor, it’ll be one of my top priorities. _**[Check out my plan to support Maryland’s HBCUs and close the racial gap in higher education attainment here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44470536/341730756/-2078821047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODIwNzY0NS0xOWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WY2IkWu2QD5c4An7RLqT97a4CUesmY4gB_XRixjztEg=&emci=ad3eebe2-90b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f8207645-19c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)**_ My family history is an example of the value of the pursuit of higher education, an example of how education can be a factory of social mobility and give everyone an equal opportunity to succeed. Our story is one that is only possible in America, and a story that, as Governor, I want to make reality for every Maryland family and every student, no matter their zip code. Peter, I’m ready to invest in our state’s HBCUs and ensure that every student has access to a safe learning environment and gets a seat at the table of opportunity, but I can’t do that without your support. _**[If you share my goal of creating a future where access to higher education is possible for all, can I count on you to chip in $10 to support my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44470537/341730757/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220423-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220423-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220423&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=10&refcode2=f8207645-19c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODIwNzY0NS0xOWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WY2IkWu2QD5c4An7RLqT97a4CUesmY4gB_XRixjztEg=)**_
---
| [CHIP IN $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44470538/341730758/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220423-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220423-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220423&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=10&refcode2=f8207645-19c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODIwNzY0NS0xOWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WY2IkWu2QD5c4An7RLqT97a4CUesmY4gB_XRixjztEg=)

John

body:

name: Sean Patrick Maloney
subject: this is critical:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEAN PATRICK MALONEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
[_**Derek, you know why I’m reaching out: I’m about to ask you for $15. But first, I hope you’ll let me explain why support from grassroots Democrats like you is so vital. Republicans just raised a record $31 MILLION to flip the House red -- and as Chairman of House Democrats’ campaign arm, I’m leading the charge to fight back and make sure Matt Gaetz, Elise Stefanik, and Marjorie Taylor Greene never call the shots in the House. Can I count on you to chip in $15 before midnight and fund my fight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44470927/341732577/91184225?refcode=20220423_em_fr_b1_spm_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDU2ODZlZi0xYWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gyd9GJ9FFHo492WjZuUVMG2S-lMkAdJp-dN8qGE5O10=) Derek, I'm disgusted. Republicans will stop at nothing to defeat our House Majority. They’ve raised a record $31 million to erase our progress. They’ve suppressed our votes and attacked our democracy. They’ve slandered LGBTQ Americans like me. [_**I’m counting on 5,232 grassroots Democrats to step up before midnight and ensure Trump’s Republicans never -- EVER -- hold an ounce of power again. Can you rush in $15 to hand them a HUMILIATING defeat and CRUSH their plans of ever flipping our Majority? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44470928/341732578/91184225?refcode=20220423_em_fr_b1_spm_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDU2ODZlZi0xYWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gyd9GJ9FFHo492WjZuUVMG2S-lMkAdJp-dN8qGE5O10=) Derek, I’ll be blunt. [**I’m damn proud of what our Democrats have accomplished.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44470929/341732579/91184225?refcode=20220423_em_fr_b1_spm_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDU2ODZlZi0xYWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gyd9GJ9FFHo492WjZuUVMG2S-lMkAdJp-dN8qGE5O10=) We passed a historic bill to strengthen our nation's infrastructure. Peter, I wanted to send you a quick note to introduce myself and tell you why I decided to run for Congress here in Minnesota’s 1st Congressional District. I am a lifelong resident of southern Minnesota, and was born and raised on the family farm. For 25 years as an attorney, I have worked shoulder-to-shoulder with farmers, families and small business owners to help them succeed. After the unfortunate passing of Congressman Jim Hagedorn, I knew that it was time that I step up to serve my community in another capacity- in Washington as your next Congressman. I am ready to fight the progressive left and defend our traditional American values. We need bold change to take back our country! If you send me to Washington, you can rely on me to help hold Joe Biden and the radical left accountable for the sky-high inflation, crisis at the border, and rising crime. Peter, I believe our rural values and way of life are always worth protecting. Thank you for your support,
---
---
Matt Benda
---

clean_body: I wanted to send you a quick note to introduce myself and tell you why I decided to run for Congress here in Minnesota’s 1st Congressional District. | | | | | ---|---|--- Peter, I wanted to send you a quick note to introduce myself and tell you why I decided to run for Congress here in Minnesota’s 1st Congressional District. I am a lifelong resident of southern Minnesota, and was born and raised on the family farm. For 25 years as an attorney, I have worked shoulder-to-shoulder with farmers, families and small business owners to help them succeed. After the unfortunate passing of Congressman Jim Hagedorn, I knew that it was time that I step up to serve my community in another capacity- in Washington as your next Congressman. I am ready to fight the progressive left and defend our traditional American values. We need bold change to take back our country! If you send me to Washington, you can rely on me to help hold Joe Biden and the radical left accountable for the sky-high inflation, crisis at the border, and rising crime. Peter, I believe our rural values and way of life are always worth protecting. Thank you for your support, Matt Benda | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Benda for Congress Matt Benda, 1811 Broadway Avenue SE, Albert Lea, MN 56007

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: 10 minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
With some spare time, I wanted to speak with you about a place called Sherrill.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471061/341733331/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk854-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IxYzMwNy0xZGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ObWHnhw7TKYDQttQjPjEagr3uBWFtyrs-_FYopRKSag=)
Here's what I'm looking at, Peter: 10 minutes.

A 10-minute gap of time in my schedule, right here and now. They don't come along often – and that's on purpose. In our campaign against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R), we're crisscrossing all over Iowa, talking to people about what's important to them and working hard to earn their vote. It's the way campaigns ought to be.
I know you hear from me a lot – about deadlines, fundraising and why this race is so important to expanding a broken 50-50 Senate that isn't delivering for the American people. With some spare time, I wanted to speak with you again. This time, about a place near and dear to my heart: it's a town called Sherrill.
The east Iowa town of Sherrill, population 189 – is where I grew up. They say there are more cows than there are people. It's a beautiful town just outside of Dubuque that has five churches, one bar, a post office and a school. There's no sight I love more than the view out of my parents' back window, where you can see the rolling farmlands of Iowa stretched out for miles.

I grew up in a working family: Mom worked for the public school system, and Dad was a union pipefitter-welder.
They worked hard to provide a great life for me. While they may not have been able to give me a trust fund or debt-free college, they gave me something so much better: my work ethic – seeing work to be done and _doing_ it. It's why I carried Dad's sweatshirt with me to Congress – peppered with burn holes from when he wore it on the job, not because I needed a reminder of where I come from and who I fight for, but because DC politicians certainly did.
Well, 10 minutes went by faster than I thought. After 47 years in Washington, Sen. Grassley has turned his back on communities like Sherrill. He's forgotten where he's come from after cozying up to DC elites for nearly five decades. Well, I am proud to have grown up in Sherrill, and I believe to my core that hard-working Iowans I grew up with ought to have their voices lifted up in the Senate. That's what I intend to do when I'm elected.
**If you share my belief that working families deserve better in Washington – and that we need to defeat vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley to expand our Senate majority – then make a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare right now, before my next critical deadline at 11:59 p.m. tonight. When grassroots folks like you chip in, we win! Here's the best link: [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471062/341733332/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk854-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IxYzMwNy0xZGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ObWHnhw7TKYDQttQjPjEagr3uBWFtyrs-_FYopRKSag=)**
Hope you enjoy your day – talk more soon.

Abby
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471063/341733333/428800054?refcode=jtk854-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2IxYzMwNy0xZGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ObWHnhw7TKYDQttQjPjEagr3uBWFtyrs-_FYopRKSag=&emci=a7d21ac1-0eab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=57b1c307-1dc3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=13784334) This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
