disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
They don't want Karen to win.

This is serious — **the Los Angeles Police Protective League PAC just dropped half a MILLION to try and defeat Karen.**

This is nearly unprecedented spending in a mayoral campaign. But here's the worst part — money like this will drown Karen's message out unless we fight back.

Our ability to respond will depend on how many grassroots donations we can get in the next 24 hours. We’ve set a goal of $50,000 to make sure voters hear the truth about Karen's vision for Los Angeles, but we need your support to get there.

**[We can't let _anyone_ buy this race, team. Not Rick Caruso and not special interest groups. **[Assemblyman Kevin] Kiley** , a 37-year-old lawyer, ran a long-shot campaign for governor in last year’s recall race and has spent much of his legislative career introducing equally long-shot bills designed to irk and embarrass Democrats.

**[Sheriff Scott] Jones** , who narrowly lost a bid for Congress in 2016, raised his profile as sheriff by assailing California’s 'sanctuary state' law, publicly beefing with Black Lives Matter activists and refusing to enforce state COVID restrictions.”

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Scrums and gridlock 🏉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
One thing you may not know about me is that I played rugby in college.
| | |
---
Hey there – One thing you may not know about me is that I played rugby in college.
And yes – there are all sorts of jokes you can make about "scrums" and trying to break through the "gridlock" in the U.S. Senate, but I'll leave that to you.
What I can tell you is that I work every day to deliver for the people of New Hampshire. I got into public life to ensure that everyone, no matter who they are, is included in our country's shared success.
This means protecting and expanding the Affordable Care Act.
Back in 2016, I won my race against an incumbent Republican by all of 1,017 votes. Meaning in 2017, when Republicans tried to repeal the ACA, my vote – delivered by 1,017 voters in New Hampshire – saved health care for tens of millions of Americans.
That's the difference a vote can make, and that is the difference your support can make. Like I learned playing rugby, a win is a win, no matter the margin.
This year, with the Senate split 50-50, I'm going to need all hands on deck. Mitch McConnell is spending millions against me because he knows what we all recognize, that if we lose here in New Hampshire, we have no chance of holding our razor-thin Senate majority. But when we work together as a team, I know that we keep this seat and our Senate blue.
**[So please, help propel this grassroots team to victory by chipping in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44472486/341741171/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk937-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTU2ODAxZi0xZmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEYH7UcZt8k0jZ8hZGjwi0sX8sbyOGgw_Jq3I_x5di8=)**

clean_body: One thing you may not know about me is that I played rugby in college. | | | Hey there – One thing you may not know about me is that I played rugby in college. And yes – there are all sorts of jokes you can make about "scrums" and trying to break through the "gridlock" in the U.S. Senate, but I'll leave that to you. What I can tell you is that I work every day to deliver for the people of New Hampshire. I got into public life to ensure that everyone, no matter who they are, is included in our country's shared success. This means protecting and expanding the Affordable Care Act. Back in 2016, I won my race against an incumbent Republican by all of 1,017 votes. Meaning in 2017, when Republicans tried to repeal the ACA, my vote – delivered by 1,017 voters in New Hampshire – saved health care for tens of millions of Americans. That's the difference a vote can make, and that is the difference your support can make. Like I learned playing rugby, a win is a win, no matter the margin. This year, with the Senate split 50-50, I'm going to need all hands on deck. Mitch McConnell is spending millions against me because he knows what we all recognize, that if we lose here in New Hampshire, we have no chance of holding our razor-thin Senate majority. But when we work together as a team, I know that we keep this seat and our Senate blue. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you! With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: Emilia, Peter (2)
subject: About Trump’s rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
I wanted to reach out directly >>
Peter – in just a few hours, former President Trump will be hosting a rally to fire up support around his endorsed candidates, including my likely opponent.

**Instead of talking about why Trump’s vision of leadership is wrong for Northeast Ohio, I’m focusing my energy on taking my message directly to voters and continuing my fight for working families, but I need your help to do so.**

[**Will you chip in $7 or more ahead of Trump’s rally at 7pm tonight so we can match their show of strength with strength of our own and continue reaching voters about the issues that matter to them?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44472870/341743172/-1747990279?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.23_b1_em2_all&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTc3MzA3ZS0yMmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PJqi1b3jzWZsIdY20BxkpNYY5il_sIvXSPhFGbqYtNQ=)
| [**Rush $7 >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44472871/341743173/-1747990279?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.23_b1_em2_all&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTc3MzA3ZS0yMmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PJqi1b3jzWZsIdY20BxkpNYY5il_sIvXSPhFGbqYtNQ=)

Thank you,

Emilia

\------------------
On Friday, April 22 at 4:00 PM, Team Emilia wrote:

That’s why we’ve got to fight hard to make sure the leaders we elect will make big changes and build a country that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. >
Here’s why I’m supporting these candidates, and why it’s powerfully important that we get them elected to Congress:
**Delia Ramirez** is running in Illinois’ 3rd District, and as a state legislator, she’s been a champion for working families — fighting to raise the minimum wage, expanding health care, and securing millions of dollars for affordable housing. I’m proud to endorse Delia for Congress so she can keep up the fight.
I’ve worked firsthand with **David Segal** on plans to level the economic playing field, support a responsible foreign policy, and build a government that Americans can trust to work for them. I’m happy to endorse David for Congress in Rhode Island’s 2nd District, because he’s ready to make change happen.
And **Summer Lee** is a proven champion for Pennsylvania’s working class — from advocating for better pay and safer working conditions to defeating dangerous corporate fracking proposals. I’m glad to endorse her for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 12th District so she can keep fighting for justice.
**Delia, David, and Summer will each serve as much-needed leaders in Congress, and I’m excited to fight by their side to level the playing field for working families. **
**But, we’ve first got to make sure that the campaigns we support are in the best position possible leading up to the midterms — and grassroots supporters make all of this critical work possible. **
[_**With so much at stake these midterms, will you make a $3 donation — or anything you can — to Warren Democrats today? Every single contribution we receive will make a powerful difference in our work to get progressive champions elected.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44472901/341743205/-2090080882?refcode=EMZ4M_END_20220423_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGI3YWU1ZS0yMmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SxeTi9TtkND60qINKaBV58cdv5Dk1N1fu_XQSHwGB1A=)

Elizabeth

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: The War on the West – Douglas Murray talks about how we can defend America and the West
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/waronwest?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**America has been a force for good in the world. **

American science and innovation have lifted living standards around the globe. US military might helped defeat German militarism in the first World War, the Nazis in the Second World War and then Soviet Communism during the Cold War.

Many other great powers in history used their strength to bully weaker nations. The United States instead has established an international order that has elevated the condition of most of humankind.

**Yet many young Americans are being taught to despise their own country. **

**A culture war is being waged against America.** Instead of appreciating what has made America so exceptional, radical progressives have launched a vicious assault on America’s past, present and future.

Douglas Murray, the Fox News contributor and associate editor of the Spectator, will be explaining what we need to do to fight back. He will be here in Jackson on May 5th.

[**Book your ticket to listen to him HERE.**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c9076d4692&e=5703353baa)

---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=104c4157ee&e=5703353baa)
---
|
While progressives seek to find every form of grievance against America, they never apply the same standards to other countries. As Douglas Murray has put it, “Inspite of all the unimaginable abuses perpetrated in our own time by the Communist Party of China, almost nobody speaks of China with an iota of the rage and disgust poured out daily against the West from inside the West.”

**Douglas Murrays’ new book is a wakeup call.** It not only shows the absurdity of those that promote their ‘woke’ creed of cultural relativism. Murray shows us how we can safeguard our future against the progressive’s toxic attacks.

If you book your ticket today, you will get a free copy of Douglas Murray’s new book, **"The War on the West."**

---
| |
---
I hope to see you on May 5th!

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| |
---
| | _ _

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=f24bb14587) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=f24bb14587).

name: Nan Whaley
subject: We don’t need the Trump circus in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
What is this man doing in Ohio?

Team,
It’s no surprise that Ohio is shaping up to be a pivotal battleground state this November.
Today, a certain former president is campaigning for the GOP in Ohio, telling the Big Lie, and spewing hatred and ignorance – all while our state’s elected Republicans cheer him on.
**[With the Trump circus in Ohio, there is no better time to send a message that we are ready for change. Will you pitch in $5 to win this campaign for Ohio’s future?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44473454/341746495/1564982542?refcode=nw_em_220423_1_t1_b&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGQ5M2FkMS0yNmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lng5q-EMF5dkPSDoPBd7sWX_-LXMD-oEpTPvQeAJuMo=)**
The Republicans will try to pull out all the stops to defeat us. They know that Democrats have a real opportunity here – and the last thing the GOP wants is a governor who will make it her priority to clean up the corruption and level the playing field for Ohio families.
We don’t have time to let Trump and his crew distract us from our mission. We have less than a week until the end-of-month deadline. The May 3 Democratic primary is approaching quickly. This campaign is not wasting a minute – and we are asking for your support to keep up the fight.
**[Contribute $5 or whatever you can now if you’re with us in the fight for Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44473455/341746496/1564982542?refcode=nw_em_220423_1_t1_b&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGQ5M2FkMS0yNmMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lng5q-EMF5dkPSDoPBd7sWX_-LXMD-oEpTPvQeAJuMo=)**
Onward,

Nan

body:

Peter,
Florida was again the Left's favorite punching bag as out-of-touch Hollywood elites continued their smears against me.
But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right.
I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. _**Their dishonesty knows no bounds. **_
_**If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. **_
Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out-of-touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. **And the chances of me backing down to Disney-owned ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that.**
Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years.
Peter, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. **I 'm not backing down.**
**[Can you help me to punch back and continue to fight against the radical Left and the dishonest corporate media? body:

clean_body: Even for something as common-sense as capping the skyrocketing prices of insulin, some members of Congress have shown their full hand — they are NOT willing to work for the American people. | | Friend — We’ve said it before and we’ll say it again: We cannot rely on elected officials to enact the change we badly need. Even for something as common-sense as capping the skyrocketing prices of insulin, some members of Congress have shown their full hand — they are NOT willing to work for the American people: = At Fairness Project, we’re done waiting for members of Congress to realize the life-or-death importance of delivering affordable medication and health care to Americans. Communities need health care now , which is why we’re investing millions of dollars in funding and resources to ballot measure campaigns across the country that are focused on passing Medicaid expansions and other life-changing policies. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We’re still dealing with the pandemic’s impact on our health and local economies. But some lawmakers want to keep prescription medication prices in the thousands. = = Thanks, team. — Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 23 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. name: Team Vanuch
subject: Crystal Vanuch Shines in Today's Republican Women of Prince William Debate, Politician Reeves Skips Event Scared to Publicly Defend Record
body:
Unlike Senator Bryce Reeves who once again skipped today’s debate, Crystal is proud of her record and will go toe-to-toe with Spanberger in November.
| | | [](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/cc6b7aadde15fc80/d4be909d4a146eb2c3d6b838967d376c/40203)

| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: April 23, 2022Contact: Info@CrystalVanuch.com
---
| | **Crystal Vanuch Shines in Today's Republican Women of Prince William Debate, Politician Reeves Skips Event Scared to****Publicly****Defend Record** **Prince William County, VA** – Team Vanuch issued the following statement following today's Republican Women of Prince William VA07 Candidate Debate. "During today’s debate sponsored by the Prince William County Republican Party, Crystal Vanuch once again demonstrated that she is only candidate with a proven conservative record that can beat Abigail Spanberger in November and fire Nancy Pelosi. As our Congresswoman, Crystal will proudly defend our conservative values and stop the out-of-touch Biden progressive agenda. She will work to secure our border, stop the flow of illegal drugs pouring into our community, and build the wall. Just like she’s done in Stafford County as Supervisor, she will also be an outspoken advocate for your Second Amendment rights. Unlike Senator Bryce Reeves who once again skipped today’s debate, Crystal is proud of her record and will go toe-to-toe with Spanberger in November. Now more than ever, we need a conservative fighter, not a scared career politician to represent us in Congress.”
---
| | |
---

body:
|
| | | The 2022 elections are here and we cannot wait any longer. If you ignore us, House Republicans will LOSE to the Democrats.

Will you finally make your 1100% matched donation to help Republicans defend battleground House districts across the country?

We will not ask again.

Democrats are ready to flip suburban House districts across the country and elect liberal lap dogs for Nancy Pelosi. We need your help to stop them.

President Trump and conservative Republican leaders have been rallying patriots like you to get in the fight. They know that if Democrats outperform us in key battleground districts, there's no chance we can win back the House this year.

It's why we've asked you so many times to help.

body:
You're invited to an important event with Doug and Candace! We would love to see you there. We will be meeting on Saturday, April 30th, at our Rockville office at 11am. Refreshments provided. | Friends, You're invited to our canvass kickoff event with Doug and Candace! **[On Saturday, April 30th, we will be meeting at our Rockville office to knock some doors and talk to voters.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTGqUUvizGNcDfVwUp_3c-nhrMMr6uV903t7Wo9KvpkTwbBPn1WB2jW8oLv14CXm0Yur4UWpJZanDt4vdT6ucaZETrFKu5wf-7Xb87fYKKWUpm2PjFZPhTIBpZWSDlKANPrHERBvfSpOjIRevCbOu4bHR_rYRVTxNI489H_hEc39Wmg_goXw03GECSLjJr-d2tIayjbXjbGZ-MGuA8N0-Sn_gCcrGzDJG1qJM8DFtzD2t4czIFwYtCHW_QFS6D-l4a_l7cyaH1nMODLSszxcRoL4EmaanPDbJ_oLJi9e0ij9hWSRbhTaUdu6sLiThAyhfwrPubW3-YQmXcGAmFbKMp-p6bRPF62d39EhxcsIEImt1/3lg/hsAPwJS7QE6ogDoUk0yJCA/h0/H3N60GAUMV9o2seC18O42NVAX6kC9V6V2-BobnvJxYc)** There will be snacks and refreshments provided and a chance to meet Doug and Candace before hitting the doors. We only have one week left before our end-of-month fundraising deadline. **With the primaries right around the corner, supporting women candidates in the fight for reproductive rights has never been more important.**
[**Can we rely on you to help us reach our goal this month?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xyLkn7vaLGlOhpAvNvsBxMOr9BGV2SQktNgg__TGJYQ=/cqwUWd3slu0880cBgtFGEhjtlqogBj8Sx2Zff_sjfBo=?refcode=X_042322_EOM_A)

It feels like every day, Republicans come up with new ways to challenge our bodily autonomy and threaten our rights.
We _have_ to fight back together if we want to stop them. That starts by hitting our April fundraising goal -- so our 16 frontline Congresswomen can defend their seats.
[**Will you help us keep our kickass group of Congresswomen in charge by donating now? **](https://act.myngp.com/el/xyLkn7vaLGlOhpAvNvsBxMOr9BGV2SQktNgg__TGJYQ=/1RoB36SwmR_5cRmB3-ixXT0MiIz8jx1oCkn4L1bMtJA=?refcode=X_042322_EOM_A)
Thank you!

name: Greg Stamps
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWWYwyOHN3

I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of
their heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm
thrilled to share a digital
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWWYwyOHN3

Dear
Friend,

I hear
from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their
heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm thrilled
to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you,
absolutely free: "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the
Rich."

"Tax cuts
for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower
tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy
Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the
federal government?

Hoover
Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical
approach in his commentary, "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts
for the Rich."

Sowell
separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses
real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all
actually lead to greater revenue for the government.

As a
friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to
offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of
charge. Click here to get your free copy of "Trickle Down" Theory
and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Click here to get your free copy of "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" now. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world. body:
We need every Texan to know how Greg Abbott has failed them.
#
First: A recent poll showed Beto in a **statistical tie** with Greg Abbott.
Then: Greg Abbott **jacked up inflation** , increased prices at our stores, hurt Texas businesses, killed jobs, and shut down billions of dollars in trade — all for a little attention from Tucker Carlson.
Now: **We need every Texan to know how Greg Abbott has failed them.**
[Beto can win this race but we need your support. body:
what I carry deep in my soul to this day
| | |
---
Friend,

That's me you're looking at.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44474545/341751762/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3001-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDM2MGY2Ny0yY2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eDx_uitmeR-zKD8HeMrIUIMVYL1jnJ5I5V2UDju4_CU=)I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you. What I _did_ believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson from my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good."
It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to my work representing my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear.
My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. **As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will _never tire_ in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. **I will _never tire_ in continuing to do more good for you and your family.
But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me.

This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election _ever –_ and with Florida's last Senate race being decided by a narrow 0.12% margin, every dollar we raise will count tremendously. **I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone.**
**[I'm depending on your grassroots support to power this historic campaign and help me fight back against the GOP's attacks – and right now, I'm falling short of my midnight goal. Can you make a $5 donation today to help make sure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect and expand Democratic Senate control?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44474546/341751763/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3001-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDM2MGY2Ny0yY2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eDx_uitmeR-zKD8HeMrIUIMVYL1jnJ5I5V2UDju4_CU=)**
Thank you so much for sharing this journey with me. It means the world to have you by my side.

Val Demings

body:
|

| | | Peter,

Are you really turning down the chance of a lifetime to have dinner with President Trump? We're SHOCKED!

We thought you were a top supporter of President Trump and House Conservatives, but our records show you _**DECLINED your chance to have dinner in Dallas with President Trump. **_

You MUST correct the record now, or we will offer your spot to the next Patriot on our list!
* * *
** SUPPORTER: _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213812:Jl4kiwoN1:m:1:3317145305:4FABFE2022EC786106CEC634C66054A7:r)_
RSVP: DECLINED**
* * *
_**[RSVP NOW to enter to win a trip of a lifetime that includes travel arrangements, a hotel stay, and dinner with the President himself!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213812:Jl4kiwoN1:m:1:3317145305:4FABFE2022EC786106CEC634C66054A7:r "RSVP NOW to enter to win a trip of a lifetime that includes travel arrangements, a hotel stay,
and dinner with the President himself!")**_

Thank you,

Trump Dinner Reservations

You can read the full contest rules [here](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213813:Jl4kiwoN1:m:1:3317145305:4FABFE2022EC786106CEC634C66054A7:r). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213814:Jl4kiwoN1:m:1:3317145305:4FABFE2022EC786106CEC634C66054A7:r).

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this form. Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 9th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the NRCC, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the Official Rules. The Sponsor is NRCC, 320 First St SE, Washington, DC 20003. | |

Friend,

I’m sorry if this notification woke you up, but we don’t have any time to waste.

**In a moment, I'm going to ask if you can donate to help Republicans Take Back the House.** **[But first, I want to step back and talk about why it's never been more important to fight for our conservative values and fire Nancy Pelosi.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=1b68a955b8ef4c53aa1ee37b2c55fb10&_e=awt_ELxdg8dPksA502yNpJ_V8eNVCiXGS6BGCuu1_7Ndn9XMaJNQWcRWbcQURb6k7RtaMXfkXMSWSYvUi3pqtvNO3cFkEh3LvtPsZ3wgDrrU_Yqy2JGN6y-5LpVloHxggtkassdB3MQe4wf0zWjm1lSYTyrvPWAQBUD0Z9k_lrvLD9gmI7U7KfKYUzR-TU8DBUEtLi3c6I41yYVd7m_wv5n06rkWFuxeS8CDBpHkS-TZ7mJf2UEzSw_8zdS9nUbvG54WP_6bD7yy0TV4XHkqDvweTFMS59rdXY9RHci-ApuVzmtKFHqT8egtQID7f8ZgG_F7W3JL3UOjidm566U8cMi99OCtL4G0-po6vKS-hPMSzLURu9MC3PcHwrjBeoXHjgDY_EBWU-ISQCuLGwKMfSNpkfkbV8B4zEA2W4gnw_7w09iIB0X2kodFA0mSdZORqIiA9SC_DyJgxEbZFVPLFg%3D%3D)**

1). Liberal economic policies brought us the worst inflation since 1981. Bidenflation is the equivalent of a $5,200 tax on every American family.

2). **Liberal soft-on-crime policies have brought us a 67 percent increase in crimes against our police officers,** and a nearly 50 percent increase in homicides throughout our country.

3.) **Liberal foreign policy brought us the collapse of Ukraine and the Rise of Putin.** In fact, I have been permanently sanctioned by Russia for my support of the people of Ukraine and outspoken opposition to Putin’s unlawful and inhumane invasion.

clean_body: this just couldn’t wait | Friend, I’m sorry if this notification woke you up, but we don’t have any time to waste. In a moment, I'm going to ask if you can donate to help Republicans Take Back the House. 1). Liberal economic policies brought us the worst inflation since 1981. Bidenflation is the equivalent of a $5,200 tax on every American family. 2). Liberal soft-on-crime policies have brought us a 67 percent increase in crimes against our police officers, and a nearly 50 percent increase in homicides throughout our country. 3.) Liberal foreign policy brought us the collapse of Ukraine and the Rise of Putin. In fact, I have been permanently sanctioned by Russia for my support of the people of Ukraine and outspoken opposition to Putin’s unlawful and inhumane invasion. | | | ---|---|--- | | Thank you, Rep. clean_body: We can’t give up. | = 2024 ALERT: President Biden hints he will run for re-election. = This is huge, Peter! According to recent reports, President Biden told former President Obama that he will run for re-election in 2024. There’s no doubt he has what it takes to WIN BIG. Thanks to President Biden’s bold leadership: ✅ The U.S. made history when the Senate confirmed the first Black woman to the Supreme Court. ✅ A record 14.5 million Americans signed up for ACA coverage this year. ✅ More than 560 million COVID-19 vaccine doses have been administered in the country. ✅ Our communities will receive a $1.2 trillion infrastructure investment. But here’s the problem: While President Biden gears up for a second term in office, Donald Trump is holding massive MAGA rallies in crucial battleground states, raising MILLIONS of dollars, and bolstering GOP extremist allies to derail President Biden's legacy and run for re-election. The GOP can’t stand the sight of Biden’s success, so they’re doing everything in their power to make a comeback. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Unite the Country ****=** **=** Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage. = Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Fellow Conservative,

**I have bad news. You 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have broken a 2-year support streak.**

I am so disappointed. You seemed like such a great Republican supporter. And now that Republicans are on the verge of winning back the House Majority, we need you more than ever.

I am holding the renewal window open for you until TONIGHT at Midnight.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3c85thhel2u3jpkvurlsi7k2dv7833t9svgd3no_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctj66o74cdh2bs "Will you renew for 2022 and become a Sustaining Member of our Republican team one more time? That's why it's so important you renew your 2022 Republican Membership, Fellow Conservative! **[Please make your commitment by 12 AM](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8q1lqjlmmhqq1l0bo6hnr2bcc41psismug1n2i0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0ctj66o74cdh2bs "Please make your commitment by 12AM") **and give Republicans the help they need to fight the Democrats' big bucks.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

body:
|
---

---
Friend,

A few weeks ago, President Obama shared a message with the fair redistricting movement. He told us that _we can’t stop fighting now:_ | [PITCH IN
IF YOU AGREE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44475498/341756168/-1485733435?&amount=20&refcode=20220423.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUwZTQ0MzM0LTJmYzMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1NcsZze26FR4Awl7uNP03g5Ag2EhCvjmyf2AyZwkntA=)
---
**“[We have] a lot to be proud of – but there’s so much left to do.** Even though the initial map drawing is almost finished, a few legislatures will likely need to redraw maps after the midterms. And as we’ve seen, some redistricting lawsuits can carry on for years.”
– President Barack Obama
---
That’s not all. Unfortunately, Republicans are getting desperate to keep the maps gerrymandered, and are playing _even dirtier_ than before.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44475499/341756169/-1485733435?&amount=20&refcode=20220423.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUwZTQ0MzM0LTJmYzMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1NcsZze26FR4Awl7uNP03g5Ag2EhCvjmyf2AyZwkntA=)
---
So friend, we have to _stay the course_ and finish the fight for fair redistricting.
**“The opponents of democracy want nothing more than for us to give up, to give in to cynicism, and to stop fighting.**We’re not going to do that.”**
– NDRC Chair Eric H. Holder, Jr.**
---
Will you help us keep fighting, friend?

clean_body: | Friend, A few weeks ago, President Obama shared a message with the fair redistricting movement. He told us that we can’t stop fighting now: | = “[We have] a lot to be proud of – but there’s so much left to do. Even though the initial map drawing is almost finished, a few legislatures will likely need to redraw maps after the midterms. And as we’ve seen, some redistricting lawsuits can carry on for years.” – President Barack Obama That’s not all. Unfortunately, Republicans are getting desperate to keep the maps gerrymandered, and are playing even dirtier than before. = So friend, we have to stay the course and finish the fight for fair redistricting. “The opponents of democracy want nothing more than for us to give up, to give in to cynicism, and to stop fighting.We’re not going to do that.” – NDRC Chair Eric H. Holder, Jr. Will you help us keep fighting, friend? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Due to redistricting, portions of the Coachella Valley where I call home will be losing representation by a wonderful member of congress -- Rep. Raul Ruiz. That’s the bad news. | _We are alerting Democrats about Will Rollins who is running to unseat Rep. Friend,

Today, I am writing to you with a deep sense of urgency. Due to redistricting, portions of the Coachella Valley where I call home will be losing representation by a wonderful member of congress -- Rep. Raul Ruiz. That’s the bad news.

**But here is the great news: We have an amazing Democratic candidate running in the new 41st Congressional District -- Will Rollins, who I am strongly supporting.**

Will has the perfect resume for this district. As a former federal prosecutor, he has a sense of fairness and justice that comes across the second you meet him. He will make history as the first openly gay congressman to represent the Coachella Valley, and the excitement around his candidacy is palpable.

**[I am asking you to please join me in supporting Will Rollins by making a contribution to his campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44475692/341757268/976319900?refcode=em-4.23.22-intro3-sjc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjUxNDNiZS0zMGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Z3c8c8CktgHSlAKmt9_HJ7oKFrGKWgrQde1mp324lA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44475693/341757269/976319900?refcode=em-4.23.22-intro3-sjc&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjUxNDNiZS0zMGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Z3c8c8CktgHSlAKmt9_HJ7oKFrGKWgrQde1mp324lA=)

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Add your name to Mark’s petition and support his legislation that would ban members of Congress from buying and selling stocks >>
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Leaders in Congress should focus on delivering results for the American people — not their stock portfolios.
#

Friends —
Members of Congress should not buy and sell stocks while in public office.
This is not a controversial idea. But today, it’s perfectly legal.
Mark is working with Jon Ossoff from Georgia to change that. Together, they’ve introduced legislation called the **Ban Congressional Stock Trading Act** which is as simple as it is necessary.
When Mark was sworn into the Senate, he moved all of his assets into qualified blind trusts so that Arizonans know he’s working for them and them alone.
Elected leaders have access to valuable policy information that impacts the economy and many industries. The legislation Mark and Jon introduced would put an end to corrupt insider trading and ensure Congress focuses on delivering results for the American people — not their stock portfolios.
This is an idea supported by Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike.
Now, we need to know if you support it as well:
[**Please sign Mark’s petition today. Say you support his legislation that will ban members of Congress from buying and selling stocks while in office >>**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/stocks-petition?source=em220423-1-7&t=1&akid=2641%2E6688874%2EIK5bKq)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/stocks-petition?source=em220423-1-7&t=2&akid=2641%2E6688874%2EIK5bKq)**
Since Mark took office, he’s remained focused on making Washington work for Arizonans. That includes making Washington more accountable and transparent.
Thanks for adding your name to the list.
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2641%2E6688874%2EIK5bKq).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scheller?=
subject: Scheller for Congress Newsletter
body:
Happy Friday! Here is your Scheller for Congress newsletter. We have some exciting updates from the campaign as we close in on the May 17th Primary | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/78213b029701/scheller-for-congress-newsletter?e=db8085a287)
---
# Lisa Scheller for Congress Newsletter!
First, I want to thank everyone who has been involved in the campaign in any way over the past several months. Your help is not lost on me and I am incredibly grateful. At the end of March, we had a big deadline for fundraising and thanks to so many of you who chipped in, we had our largest fundraising report of the campaign which was written about in the [local press](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=d3dcd1b39e&e=db8085a287). Thank you for all your support!-Lisa
|
---
# 🚨Lawn Signs are In!🚨
We just got our order of lawn signs in and they are ready to be distributed! If you would like to request a lawn sign, please email Billy@Schellerforcongress.com and we can make sure that you get one! There will be other locations added but for right now, you can pick up lawn signs from the following locations:
* Scheller for Congress HQ, 1104 South Cedar Crest Blvd, Allentown
* Lehigh County Republican Committee, 121 N Cedar Crest Blvd, Allentown

There will be other opportunities to pick up signs in the coming days so stay tuned!
| [Request a sign!](mailto:billy@schellerforcongress.com)
---
|
---
# Title 42 and our Southern Border
Those of you whom I have had the pleasure of meeting over the course of the campaign know how strongly I care about securing our Southern Border. We are all descendants of immigrants and I believe in legal immigration. However, we have a full-blown crisis at our Southern Border and the Democrats in Washington have done NOTHING to stem the tide. In 2021, the Biden Administration and his allies in Congress like Susan Wild sat idly by as nearly 1.7 Million Illegal crossings were reported which is a record high. Recently, the Biden Administration also announced that they would be revoking Title 42 which President Trump put in place during 2020 to help stem the tide of Illegal Immigration. After the news broke that the Biden Administration would be rescinding the order, Republicans and Democrats alike. Some estimates say that the surge at our Southern Border could increase to as many as 18,000 illegal crossings A DAY which would lead to a **386% increase** from the 2021 figures that were a record. The crisis at our Southern Border does not stop there. It ends with broken families. Recent statistics show that the number one cause of death of our young people and in 2021, illegal drugs poured across our border in record numbers. According to the CDC during the 2021 fiscal year:Cocaine seizures increased 68%;Methamphetamine seizures increased 7%;Heroin seizures decreased 6%;Fentanyl seizures increased 134%.Those numbers are just the tip of the spear in this circumstance as these numbers do not account for the amounts that were smuggled through successfully. These drugs wind up in our communities and threaten our very way of life. It is time we have someone stand up to protect our communities. When I represent the Lehigh Valley in Washington I will do just that.
|
---
# Pictures from the District!
**Meeting with the Congregants of the Bethel Memorial Baptist Church**
**Northampton County Women’s Republican Club**
**Touring the Lehigh County Humane Society**
**Columbia Fire Company Lenten Dinner**
**Lehigh Valley Ducks Unlimited Banquet**
**Carbon County Meet and Greet with Congressman Dann Meuser**
|
---
# We need volunteers to help Save the American Dream!
| [Volunteer!](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=8a53679174&e=db8085a287)
---
| [Donate!](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=0484f7cc1b&e=db8085a287)
---
|
---
Be on the lookout for upcoming events!

Hello,
We’re emailing to ask you for $5.
Here’s why: **Admiral Mike Franken is the Democrat running against Chuck Grassley in Iowa. And if Mike Franken wins, Democrats WILL expand our majority in the Senate so we can actually pass progressive legislation.**
Chuck Grassley has Big Pharma, Wall Street, the NRA, and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs ready to pour millions of dollars into ads smearing Mike. But we are relying 100% on donations from everyday people like you.

name: James Carville
subject: Ted Cruz’s diabolical scheme
body:
Derek,
I ain’t gonna lie to you, friend, I’m scared to death about this:
Ted Cruz was just crisscrossing Nevada ATTACKING Catherine Cortez Masto with vicious lies and smears. Cruz is evil, but he’s smart as hell and he’s in Nevada for a diabolical reason: Catherine is losing in the polls, she’s the most vulnerable Democratic senator in America, and if she loses, Cruz and McConnell will take control of the Senate!
To make matters worse, Mitch McConnell’s super PAC just unleashed $15 MILLION in attack ads against Catherine while Cruz ensures EVERY MAGA voter turns out to defeat her!
Derek, this unprecedented GOP attack campaign WILL kill our chances of holding the Senate unless Catherine can raise the resources to fight back in the next 24 hours!
That’s why I promised Catherine I would help her hit her emergency goal, and friend, I'm personally counting on you to split a contribution between Catherine and CommonGood right now. I need Democrats stepping up TODAY to help Catherine punch back against Cruz and McConnell’s attacks! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220424_CGVA_CCM]

Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220424_CGVA_CCM]
It’s no surprise Ted Cruz loves Catherine’s GOP opponent, Adam Laxalt. This guy is a wacko extremist with a DANGEROUS far-right agenda.
Catherine’s opponent led Trump’s efforts to overturn the 2020 election in Nevada. He was personally recruited by Mitch McConnell and endorsed by Donald Trump. He would cast the deciding vote in the Senate to overturn the 2024 presidential election. And he’s currently LEADING Catherine in the polls!
With polls showing Catherine 3 points behind this extremist, she CANNOT AFFORD to fall short of tonight’s emergency goal. But she’s currently 4% short with just hours until the deadline! Rush $5 right now, friend >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220424_CGVA_CCM]
Thank you for stepping up at this crucial moment.
James Carville

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: A story in 3 emojis: 💰🌊🔴
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
They think they can buy Pennsylvania.
#
Hi Derek.
**FIRST:** Our Republican opponents and their super PACs started dumping tens of millions of dollars into PA to try to buy our open U.S. Senate seat — officially making this the most expensive Senate race in the country. 💰
**THEN:** Donald Trump endorsed Dr. Oz — which means there’s a tidal wave of MAGA money approaching PA right now. 🌊
**NOW: The biggest risk we face in this race is being outspent by Republicans. 🔴**
**[We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important: Derek, will you kick in a donation right now to make sure we can compete with our self-funding GOP opponents? Seriously, anything you can spare will be a big help.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47437?amount=5&refcode=em20220423-5498&t=1&akid=5498%2E434096%2E7MKiga)**
**[Contribute $5 »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47437?amount=5&refcode=em20220423-5498&t=2&akid=5498%2E434096%2E7MKiga)**
Flip through the channels anywhere in PA, you’ll see for yourself — our Republican opponents Dr. Oz + David McCormick are absolutely blanketing our state with ads.
_The Republicans think they can buy Pennsylvania._
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47437?amount=5&refcode=em20220423-5498&t=3&akid=5498%2E434096%2E7MKiga)
**We absolutely cannot let the MAGA party win.** If we all come together right now, we can out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign the GOP money machine just by the sheer force of our numbers.
**[Please, Derek, chip in anything you can now if you’re ready to help John win the most expensive Senate race in the country.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47437?amount=5&refcode=em20220423-5498&t=4&akid=5498%2E434096%2E7MKiga)**
**[Contribute $5 »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47437?amount=5&refcode=em20220423-5498&t=23&akid=5498%2E434096%2E7MKiga)**
With your help, we’ll be able to keep up with McCormick, Dr. Oz, and their super PACs through small-dollar and grassroots donations (AKA the way all campaigns should be funded).
Let’s do this,
Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220423-5498-footer&t=24&refcode2=5498_434096_7MKiga&akid=5498%2E434096%2E7MKiga)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Pat Clark,  Keystone Progress
subject: Take Action: Stop Insurrectionists from Holding Public Office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Insurrectionists should not be allowed to run for or hold office. Plain and simple.

The people who tried to overthrow our government, to destroy our democracy, should not gain power as part of the system they tried to take down. The 14th Amendment clearly states that no one should be allowed to hold any political, civil or military office, in which they take an oath to support the Constitution of the United States if they have engaged in insurrection or rebellion against the government.

One federal judge got the message, and just ruled that a group of Georgia voters can continue to work in court to keep Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene from running for reelection because of her role in the attack. However, another lawsuit to keep Republican North Carolina Rep. Madison Cawthorn — who also played a role in storming the Capitol — from running was unsuccessful.

Let's all TAKE ACTION on this today! [https://keystoneprogressaction.com/take-action-stop-insurrectionists-from-holding-public-office/] Contact attorney general and gubernatorial candidate Josh Shapiro and let him know we do not want these treasonists in office. That we demand he do the right thing and file actions to prevent them from running for office!
https://keystoneprogressaction.com/take-action-stop-insurrectionists-from-holding-public-office/ [https://keystoneprogressaction.com/take-action-stop-insurrectionists-from-holding-public-office/]

CONTACT JOSH SHAPIRO NOW [https://keystoneprogressaction.com/take-action-stop-insurrectionists-from-holding-public-office/]

Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-Md.) who heads up the House select committee on the Jan. 6 insurrection was the keynote speaker at our Keystone Progress Summit - Pennsylvania’s Progressive Summit, where he announced that there will be public hearings on the January 6 Commission no later than June. Let's hope they make real progress in holding these treasonous people accountable for their actions this summer.

We're in this fight together!

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Folks—I need you to rush a donation before Trump takes the stage
in a few hours. Here’s why:

1. Last year, Trump came to Ohio for his first rally of the 2022 election
season. He launched vicious attacks against me in an attempt to tear down
our campaign.

2. A few days ago, Trump endorsed my GOP opponent, JD Vance, and now he’s
surging ahead in the polls.

3. This is a critical moment for our campaign. If we’re not prepared to
fight back against Trump’s attacks today, I’m worried he could tilt this
race toward the GOP.

Republicans are spending over $80 million to defeat this campaign and take
back the Senate for Mitch McConnell. Trump’s visit will bring a new wave
of money and attacks, and I need your urgent help to fight back.

Democratic Senate majority, one of the most important things you can do is

Tim

name: =?utf-8?Q?Haneefah?=
subject: A New Voice, A Better Choice!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement
**>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq**
Some of us sit by and do nothing because we've become complacent with the way things are. Others of us fight because we know things could be so much better. We can live in a country where healthcare is a right, not a privilege. We can live in a country where everyone has a quality education no matter what their background is. We can live in a country where employees are treated fairly and paid a decent wage. We're gearing up for an epic campaign in this year's general election. Help me get to the Senate where I can start fighting for you!
Now, here's what I need you to do right now:
* Forward this message to nine (9) of your friends and family. Choose three (3) of them to personally call and inform them that I meant what I said at the beginning of my campaign when I said I would run for the Senate until **_we_** all won!
* Commit to my campaign now by [donating $9](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=08bfd4aca6&e=a49cb82bb3) or more to keep this true grassroots campaign going.
* [Subscribe and follow me on social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=1a2d561a00&e=a49cb82bb3) where I'm active and live often. Share a post or two!

Visit [haneefahkhaaliq.org](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=363f51d3c0&e=a49cb82bb3), view my 33 national policies and agendas, and become a volunteer today! I am Indiana. You are Indiana. Together, we are Indiana!

Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Indiana Candidate for U.S. Senate
2022

* Check your voter's registration right by clicking [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=e7674219fc&e=a49cb82bb3). You must be a registered voter in order to support me in the General Election. Set a goal to ask nine (9) other people this week if they are registered to vote in Indiana. We can't afford to wait until the last minute.
* **Have questions? Email hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com or call or text 317-999-5592 right now! **
* Check out and share my [social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=acef55c6b5&e=a49cb82bb3) posts and [donate](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=80a5b720af&e=a49cb82bb3) your first $9 or more to this grassroots campaign now!

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Deplorable.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
While I'm personally very offended, I'm genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece. | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213853:6Tzj7woNw:m:1:3317145305:282AD57D49C48B0C72147043E670EB78:r)

---
Peter,

I have to admit - I hadn't heard of the far-left publication called _The Nation_ before last week. Now, I'll never forget it.

They published an attack piece against me - based on the color of my skin - that is beyond ridiculous and insulting.

While I'm personally very offended, I'm genuinely sad for the author of this political hit piece.

There are a lot of nasty things said about me in this article simply because I'm a Black Republican. Like this:

"Herschel Walker, the football star turned Georgia Senate candidate, is an animated caricature of a Black person drawn by white conservatives."
Or maybe this line:

"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."
It's shameful.

But the writer doesn't just take aim at me. He questions the support from folks like you, too:

"Most white people in the South vote 'R' like their entire white supremacist project depends on it."
Peter, I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign. However, can you imagine the reaction from the mainstream media if these things had been said about a Black Democrat? The outrage! There would be calls for the writer to be fired and the publication cancelled.

But I'm not calling for a protest of the author or a boycott of the publication's advertisers. Nothing like that.

_**I think the best answer is to prove them wrong at the ballot box.**_

**[Will you join me in standing up to these racist attacks?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213853:6Tzj7woNw:m:1:3317145305:282AD57D49C48B0C72147043E670EB78:r)**

**[Stand with Herschel against far-left attacks](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213853:6Tzj7woNw:m:1:3317145305:282AD57D49C48B0C72147043E670EB78:r)**
[** Chip in $4 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213854:6Tzj7woNw:m:1:3317145305:282AD57D49C48B0C72147043E670EB78:r)
The media has been against our campaign since we launched last summer, but they have rarely been so brazen to say things as this:

"Georgia Republicans want Walker because he's Black and Warnock is Black, and they think they can defeat Warnock in November if they can shave just a little of the Black vote..."
I'm not **" any old Black person"** as the author of the article asserts. I'm Herschel Walker - a proud Georgian and a proud Republican - who has lived the American Dream and wants to secure that dream for the next generation of Americans from all walks of life.

_The best way to deal with racist tropes like these are to call them out, reject them, and prove them wrong._

I hope you'll stand with me against the political hit jobs that the far-left media keep throwing our way. **[Please support my campaign for the U.S. Senate today, and let's work together to unite this country instead of dividing it.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213853:6Tzj7woNw:m:1:3317145305:282AD57D49C48B0C72147043E670EB78:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213853:6Tzj7woNw:m:1:3317145305:282AD57D49C48B0C72147043E670EB78:r)
Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213853:6Tzj7woNw:m:1:3317145305:282AD57D49C48B0C72147043E670EB78:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213855:6Tzj7woNw:m:1:3317145305:282AD57D49C48B0C72147043E670EB78:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213856:6Tzj7woNw:m:1:3317145305:282AD57D49C48B0C72147043E670EB78:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213857:6Tzj7woNw:m:1:3317145305:282AD57D49C48B0C72147043E670EB78:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60213858:6Tzj7woNw:m:1:3317145305:282AD57D49C48B0C72147043E670EB78:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

body:
The proof that one truly believes is in action

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44468474/341722578/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220423REFirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZGFmNjBhLTE2YzMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CpzzMpqi4uS_-aACud6hO3E6nPgGAC3_9txdHsqCHWE=)
| Fellow activist,

With just a week left before the May 2nd voter registration deadline for the Pennsylvania primary, I’m reaching out personally to some of our most active supporters who haven’t donated yet. We’ve received a lot of support over the past few weeks heading into this deadline, but we’re still not where we’d like to be in hitting our goals to expand the electorate. **[So how about it, fellow activist — can you step up with a quick donation of $3, $5, or $10 to help us finish out our primary voter registration strong?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44468476/341722580/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220423REFirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZGFmNjBhLTE2YzMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CpzzMpqi4uS_-aACud6hO3E6nPgGAC3_9txdHsqCHWE=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44468480/341722581/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220423REFirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZGFmNjBhLTE2YzMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CpzzMpqi4uS_-aACud6hO3E6nPgGAC3_9txdHsqCHWE=) I know there’s a lot of competition for your generous contributions, so if you’re not convinced yet, I’d like to highlight a bit about what makes the New Pennsylvania Project special and why you should consider donating to us.
1. We are engaging and empowering young residents and those living in underrepresented and often neglected communities of color and immigrant communities **year-round** , canvassing, holding community and school events, and registration drives.

2. We are working with like-minded partners in these communities across Pennsylvania to expand the electorate in order to reflect our demographically changing population and make a better government that represents the values of **all Pennsylvanians**.

3. **Most of all,** we are providing education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods and mobilizing the electorate to **vote in every election — twice a year.**

**[All that said, I hope you’ll choose now to make your first donation — we could really use it.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44468481/341722585/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220423REFirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZGFmNjBhLTE2YzMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CpzzMpqi4uS_-aACud6hO3E6nPgGAC3_9txdHsqCHWE=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44468482/341722586/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220423REFirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZGFmNjBhLTE2YzMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CpzzMpqi4uS_-aACud6hO3E6nPgGAC3_9txdHsqCHWE=)
In defense of our democracy,

Kadida Kenner

_Founding Executive Director
The New Pennsylvania Project_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44468486/341722587/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220423REFirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZGFmNjBhLTE2YzMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CpzzMpqi4uS_-aACud6hO3E6nPgGAC3_9txdHsqCHWE=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election._ _[**______**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44468487/341722592/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220423REFirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_BIO&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZGFmNjBhLTE2YzMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CpzzMpqi4uS_-aACud6hO3E6nPgGAC3_9txdHsqCHWE=)**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44468489/341722593/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220423REFirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZGFmNjBhLTE2YzMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CpzzMpqi4uS_-aACud6hO3E6nPgGAC3_9txdHsqCHWE=)**_

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Reflections on Earth Day
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
Hi team, I wanted to share some reflections on Earth Day with you.
It’s so important that we protect the health of our planet for future generations.
In the State Senate, I’ve consistently championed legislation to combat the harmful impacts of climate change.
**I’m particularly proud of my work on the Fashion Sustainability and Social Accountability Act, legislation that holds fashion companies accountable for their contributions to greenhouse gas emissions.**
The Fashion Act will force large companies to publish reports mapping their supply chains, share information on the environmental and social impacts of their business, set targets to reduce the harmful impacts of their work, disclose what materials they are using, publicly report employee salaries, and more. **[If you want to learn more about the Fashion Act, click here.**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/go/1491?t=1&akid=726%2E59515%2EEdCNCK)
I’m running for Congress because I want to sponsor bold legislation on the Fashion Act on the federal level. After all, a crisis with such enormous implications requires us to think big and act swiftly and decisively.
Thank you for reading, and thank you for your support.
All my best,
Alessandra

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=726%2E59515%2EEdCNCK).

In the State Senate, I’ve consistently championed legislation to combat the harmful impacts of climate change. I’m particularly proud of my work on the Fashion Sustainability and Social Accountability Act, legislation that holds fashion companies accountable for their contributions to greenhouse gas emissions. The Fashion Act will force large companies to publish reports mapping their supply chains, share information on the environmental and social impacts of their business, set targets to reduce the harmful impacts of their work, disclose what materials they are using, publicly report employee salaries, and more. ** I’m running for Congress because I want to sponsor bold legislation on the Fashion Act on the federal level. After all, a crisis with such enormous implications requires us to think big and act swiftly and decisively. Thank you for reading, and thank you for your support. All my best, Alessandra Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Still waiting on your response, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Will you take just a couple of minutes to let us know your top priorities?
#
Peter, did you see the email we sent you on Wednesday? We're planning on sharing the answers to our Q2 Priorities Survey with the Congresswoman this week — _but we're still missing yours._
[**Will you take just a couple of minutes to let us know your top priorities? Your input is vital as Pramila charts out a path forward on our progressive agenda, our organizing to hold our Democratic majority, and efforts to elect more bold progressives to Congress this year.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/q2-2022-priorities-survey/?source=em20220423-1208&t=1&akid=1208%2E420207%2EbnzlZ4)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/q2-2022-priorities-survey/?source=em20220423-1208&t=2&akid=1208%2E420207%2EbnzlZ4)**
Thanks!
Team Jayapal
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jayapal HQ
Date: Wed Apr 20, 2022
Subject: Need your input on this for Q2
Peter, we were wondering if we could have a minute of your time.
It’s been a very busy year for Pramila, both legislating on Capitol Hill and working to protect the Democratic House and Senate majorities. She’s also laser-focused on expanding the Congressional Progressive Caucus.
In all of our work, we want to ensure we’re aligned with our strongest supporters. So, we want to be clear about our supporters' top priorities as the year moves forward. **That's why we're sending this survey to members of Team Pramila like you, Peter — because you're a key part of our movement for progressive change.**
[**Will you take our Q2 Priorities Survey today? We're counting on your input to help guide our strategy for the big year ahead.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/q2-2022-priorities-survey/?source=em20220423-1208&t=3&akid=1208%2E420207%2EbnzlZ4)

Thank you so much for your input,
Team Jayapal

name: Giffords
subject: Sign Giffords’ petition calling on the U.S. Senate to vote and confirm Steve Dettelbach to serve as the next Director of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) is the only federal agency charged with enforcing our nation’s gun laws and regulating the gun industry.
#

Friends -
The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) is the only federal agency charged with enforcing our nation’s gun laws and regulating the gun industry.
But for far too long, the agency has operated in lockstep with the industry it is tasked with regulating.
The truth is, we haven’t had a Senate-confirmed ATF Director since 2015, and as the gun violence epidemic in this country gets worse and worse, it’s never been more important to have a director who will prioritize public safety ahead of the profits of the gun industry.
The Senate MUST confirm Joe Biden’s nominee, Steve Dettelbach, to the post and give the American people the public safety they deserve.
The gun lobby defeated the president’s last nominee through lies and disinformation. That’s why it’s critical we make our voices heard early on the new pick.
So please:
[**Sign Giffords’ petition calling on the U.S. Senate to vote and confirm Steve Dettelbach to serve as the next Director of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/atf_biden_petition?source=em220423-1-30&t=1&akid=1861%2E3935704%2E1XCyw2)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/atf_biden_petition?source=em220423-1-30&t=2&akid=1861%2E3935704%2E1XCyw2)**
Thank you. We want to let members of Congress know there is widespread support for this critical appointment.
The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1861%2E3935704%2E1XCyw2) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: A message from Keith Rothfus about this Monday April 25!
body:
Ten years ago this Monday, April 25 many of you helped me launch a campaign that took me to the House of Representatives to fight for you. This year, | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremyshaffer/rothfus?e=32107e7cf1)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends:

Ten years ago this Monday, April 25 many of you helped me launch a campaign that took me to the House of Representatives to fight for you.

This year, I want to invite you to a special event to help a friend follow the same path.

Please join Congressman Mike Kelly and me at 5:30 pm at the Edgeworth Club in Sewickley to help Jeremy Shaffer build on the momentum he will need to win his election to the House to help get our country back on track.

Ten years ago we celebrated my launch on my 50th birthday with a $50 per person fundraiser. So ten years later, I am celebrating another birthday. This one is actually the 21st anniversary of my 39th - but you get it, admission is only $60! Don’t blame me, blame #Bidenflation!

Come on out and celebrate this big day and help give me give Jeremy a big boost. If like me you want to start tackling inflation, force the Biden Administration to get control of our border and address the threat China presents to us and the world, then join us this Monday at 5:30 pm.

If you have any questions, reach out to Amy Petraglia at 724-612-0555 or [amywp2003@aol.com](mailto:amywp2003@aol.com?subject=Shaffer%2FRothfus%20Event%20April%2025th).

Hope to see you Monday!

Keith Rothfus
---
|
---

name: Team WisGOP
subject: “Worst Month at the Border in 22Years”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=border_e_solicit_4_23_22_v1&n=1)
---
Friend -- **It’s the worst month at the border in 22 years, Friend.** In March, over 220,000 illegal immigrants were apprehended attempting to cross the U.S. border with Mexico – a new high for Biden and the worst month in DHS history. Border officials are bracing for as many as 18,000 illegal immigrants per day at the border this spring, which would be unprecedented. [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=zveC7zroragI2qrXZZ9NaherYarllkb6W-ROa3DcnvaNpVmEN1yAvUbu64NHjmiIyMbKzfdemAsmXsjdTTjJi4HHq9pQwK-jRlCURLFPIwHN7S6Oplm8oVTMdkslpVM4WB6MJNZlhLX5SR1lOQgC6w&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=border_e_solicit_4_23_22_v1&n=2) With their radical “defund the police” rhetoric, Democrats have already made our cities less safe. Now, Joe Biden’s refusal to acknowledge the crisis at the border has led to illicit drugs pouring into our communities. Over [1,000 pounds](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sRqXHm9M7rIkP8Q618tkG9aaK7wsKLpUcm0SyfLQMSs4rfTdVULVciVUkP8Ol8urhjXWDh0XR4IuswVGwfqvrw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=border_e_solicit_4_23_22_v1&n=3) of deadly fentanyl and over [9,500 pounds](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sRqXHm9M7rIkP8Q618tkG9aaK7wsKLpUcm0SyfLQMSs4rfTdVULVciVUkP8Ol8urhjXWDh0XR4IuswVGwfqvrw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=border_e_solicit_4_23_22_v1&n=4) of methamphetamine were seized at the border in March alone. **Joe Biden’s open border is a humanitarian and national security crisis. It’s empowering drug and human traffickers, putting American families at risk, and making American communities less safe.** [**We need your help supporting Republican candidates who will stand up against Joe Biden’s open borders agenda.**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVFK0wmSWoKEnA1zRntrMiwvPSm40T3ThFQq9DQ3EQf8s&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=border_e_solicit_4_23_22_v1&n=5) Biden’s border crisis is not “seasonal.” Its “root” is not in the Northern Triangle. This is a crisis of Biden’s creation – he needs to stop adding fuel to the fire. [**Can you help us fight back?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVFK0wmSWoKEnA1zRntrMiwvPSm40T3ThFQq9DQ3EQf8s&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=border_e_solicit_4_23_22_v1&n=6) \- Team WisGOP | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVFK0wmSWoKEnA1zRntrMiwvPSm40T3ThFQq9DQ3EQf8s&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=border_e_solicit_4_23_22_v1&n=7 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVFK0wmSWoKEnA1zRntrMiwvPSm40T3ThFQq9DQ3EQf8s&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=border_e_solicit_4_23_22_v1&n=7)

clean_body: | Friend -- It’s the worst month at the border in 22 years, Friend. In March, over 220,000 illegal immigrants were apprehended attempting to cross the U.S. border with Mexico – a new high for Biden and the worst month in DHS history. Border officials are bracing for as many as 18,000 illegal immigrants per day at the border this spring, which would be unprecedented. With their radical “defund the police” rhetoric, Democrats have already made our cities less safe. Now, Joe Biden’s refusal to acknowledge the crisis at the border has led to illicit drugs pouring into our communities. Over of deadly fentanyl and over of methamphetamine were seized at the border in March alone. Joe Biden’s open border is a humanitarian and national security crisis. It’s empowering drug and human traffickers, putting American families at risk, and making American communities less safe. Biden’s border crisis is not “seasonal.” Its “root” is not in the Northern Triangle. This is a crisis of Biden’s creation – he needs to stop adding fuel to the fire. \- Team WisGOP | "CONTRIBUTE" Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee. 148 E Johnson St, Madison, WI 53703 | (608) 257 - 4765

name: John Cranley
subject: Team, I thought I’d send this one myself
