body:
| We have a BIG endorsement to share. Hey team,

With the primary creeping up in just a few days, I thought I would send this email myself!

Here’s the latest on what our campaign is up to (scroll to the end of the “Have you met me on the road?” section for something really special!):
* * *
**Second gubernatorial debate: Done! ✅** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471254/341735722/-226218937?amount=25&refcode=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjdmYTM2Zi0xZWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QA2SYOyyHumU2TSn5EeZcV9Euo058ci_Cvq6OWTtzc=) This week, my opponent and I faced off in the second gubernatorial debate of the primary season!

Hosted by the Columbus Metropolitan Club, this debate was all about who’s ready to take on DeWine in November. We talked about everything from marijuana to dark money to abortion, and I left incredibly grateful to the Columbus Metropolitan Club for having hosted us. Thank you!

[Click here to watch the full debate >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471258/341735728/-803653937?v=4z7yuDdLlzw&refcode=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjdmYTM2Zi0xZWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QA2SYOyyHumU2TSn5EeZcV9Euo058ci_Cvq6OWTtzc=&emci=c47e71e2-7ec2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=22604289)
* * *
**New Endorsements** I’m incredibly proud to announce two of our latest endorsements: **The Toledo Blade** and the **Cleveland Plain Dealer!** From the Toledo Blade: _“Winning over independent voters and dissatisfied Republicans remains key to Democrats seeking statewide office. Mr. Cranley is the better candidate to win over those voters by far. He can compete with the incumbent governor and connect with voters beyond the Democratic left.”_ From the Cleveland Plain Dealer: _“Our editorial board’s endorsement goes to Cranley, 48, with his record of success and inclusivity guiding a robust Cincinnati economic recovery as the city’s mayor for the last eight years, working with a politically divided City Council. His tenure included a remarkable turnaround in police-community relations, which, among other consequences, has earned Cranley the backing of the Rev. Dr. Otis Moss Jr. of Cleveland.”_ To read the full endorsements, head over to the [Toledo Blade](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471269/341735740/-99813781?refcode=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjdmYTM2Zi0xZWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QA2SYOyyHumU2TSn5EeZcV9Euo058ci_Cvq6OWTtzc=&emci=c47e71e2-7ec2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=22604289) and the [Cleveland Plain Dealer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471273/341735749/1206669916?refcode=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjdmYTM2Zi0xZWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QA2SYOyyHumU2TSn5EeZcV9Euo058ci_Cvq6OWTtzc=&emci=c47e71e2-7ec2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=22604289) website. Thank you again – I’m honored by your endorsements, and we won’t let you down!
* * *

It’s our first one to go up on TV, and we need as many folks as possible to see it in the next few days!

[**Take a moment to watch the ad and chip in to help us keep it on the air >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471279/341735757/713294441?amount=25&refcode=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjdmYTM2Zi0xZWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QA2SYOyyHumU2TSn5EeZcV9Euo058ci_Cvq6OWTtzc=)
* * *

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471289/341735899/-226218937?amount=25&refcode=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjdmYTM2Zi0xZWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QA2SYOyyHumU2TSn5EeZcV9Euo058ci_Cvq6OWTtzc=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471290/341735920/-226218937?amount=25&refcode=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjdmYTM2Zi0xZWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QA2SYOyyHumU2TSn5EeZcV9Euo058ci_Cvq6OWTtzc=) How could I not share these pictures of the Cincinnati Reds’ opening game? I wouldn’t have missed it for the world! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471309/341735942/-226218937?amount=25&refcode=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjdmYTM2Zi0xZWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QA2SYOyyHumU2TSn5EeZcV9Euo058ci_Cvq6OWTtzc=) Last but not least, it was so great seeing Ohio Innocence Project exoneree Laurese Glover at his new restaurant last week, Truth Seafood 7! It’s amazing to see how the Ohio Innocence Project has transformed lives, and I can’t wait to see even more lives transformed when we win this race and reform our criminal justice system. Check out Truth Seafood 7 in Cleveland at 770 E 185th St!
* * *
**Are you registered to vote?** If we’re going to beat Mike DeWine in November, we need everyone to get out there and make their voices heard in this primary election! That means we can’t afford to leave a single vote on the table.

If you’re unsure about the status of your voter registration, [**click here to redirect to the Ohio Secretary of State website, where you can verify your registration status >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471314/341735957/-436542035?refcode=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjdmYTM2Zi0xZWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QA2SYOyyHumU2TSn5EeZcV9Euo058ci_Cvq6OWTtzc=&emci=c47e71e2-7ec2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b7fa36f-1ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=22604289)

clean_body: | We have a BIG endorsement to share. Hey team, With the primary creeping up in just a few days, I thought I would send this email myself! Here’s the latest on what our campaign is up to (scroll to the end of the “Have you met me on the road?” section for something really special!): Second gubernatorial debate: Done! ✅ = This week, my opponent and I faced off in the second gubernatorial debate of the primary season! Hosted by the Columbus Metropolitan Club, this debate was all about who’s ready to take on DeWine in November. We talked about everything from marijuana to dark money to abortion, and I left incredibly grateful to the Columbus Metropolitan Club for having hosted us. Thank you! New Endorsements I’m incredibly proud to announce two of our latest endorsements: The Toledo Blade and the Cleveland Plain Dealer! From the Toledo Blade: “Winning over independent voters and dissatisfied Republicans remains key to Democrats seeking statewide office. Mr. Cranley is the better candidate to win over those voters by far. He can compete with the incumbent governor and connect with voters beyond the Democratic left.” From the Cleveland Plain Dealer: “Our editorial board’s endorsement goes to Cranley, 48, with his record of success and inclusivity guiding a robust Cincinnati economic recovery as the city’s mayor for the last eight years, working with a politically divided City Council. His tenure included a remarkable turnaround in police-community relations, which, among other consequences, has earned Cranley the backing of the Rev. Dr. Otis Moss Jr. of Cleveland.” To read the full endorsements, head over to the and the website. Thank you again – I’m honored by your endorsements, and we won’t let you down! Cincinnati's John Cranley Debuts First TV Ad as Democratic Primary Race for Governor of Ohio Continues - CityBeat = = Did you catch my ad last month? It’s our first one to go up on TV, and we need as many folks as possible to see it in the next few days! = Have you met me on the road, lately? = = Thank you for having me, Mansfield! = = A big thank you to Craig Swartz, Chris Liebold, and Gina Grandillo for hosting me in Tiffin! = = How could I not share these pictures of the Cincinnati Reds’ opening game? I wouldn’t have missed it for the world! = Last but not least, it was so great seeing Ohio Innocence Project exoneree Laurese Glover at his new restaurant last week, Truth Seafood 7! It’s amazing to see how the Ohio Innocence Project has transformed lives, and I can’t wait to see even more lives transformed when we win this race and reform our criminal justice system. Check out Truth Seafood 7 in Cleveland at 770 E 185th St! Are you registered to vote? If we’re going to beat Mike DeWine in November, we need everyone to get out there and make their voices heard in this primary election! That means we can’t afford to leave a single vote on the table. If you’re unsure about the status of your voter registration, Thanks for taking the time to read this, friend – I’m immensely grateful to have you on the team! = = Be sure to follow us on Twitter , and keep an eye out for more news from us as we get closer to the primary! Thanks again, John = = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena, are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee CRANLEY FEDOR FOR OHIO COMMITTEE 545 EAST TOWN STREET COLUMBUS, OH 43215 United States Click here to

clean_body: He just hit a record number. | Friend, Radical liberal Tony Evers isn’t just destroying common sense legislation on his vetoing spree, he’s vetoing YOU – the very people he’s supposed to be working for as governor. From election security to our broken liberal school systems to the safety of our streets, Evers vetoed solutions to all of them on Good Friday! And now, after vetoing 43 bills in just one day , he’s set the record with 126 vetoes! What Evers is doing isn’t governing, he’s playing puppet to special interest cronies. But with your help right now, we can take the lead in this TOSS-UP governor’s race and end this madness. It wasn’t enough for Evers to veto EVERY election security bill that came across his desk over the past year... ...He then picked criminals over law-abiding citizens when he vetoed a new bill that would have established mandatory minimum sentences for rioters. Then again, this should come as no surprise considering he’s the governor who sided with rioters over our police officers while the city of Kenosha was set ablaze. At every turn, Tony Evers has chosen special interests over the people he is supposed to represent. But now Friend, you have the opportunity to replace him with a governor who will ALWAYS put you first. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: El trabajo apenas comienza
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471517/341736722/1004889957?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220423spanish_gv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTU0NzFhYS0xZWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WO84SCtEqA5vVDNh8fKQVLOnp3Ik_6f-WFo75D20Jr4=)
---
Hola amigos, Estoy escribiendo esto después de un largo día en la campaña: han pasado ocho meses desde que me embarqué en este viaje para ganar su apoyo y ser su próximo representante en el Congreso. Con tanto trabajo, tanta gente que conocer, tantas comunidades que visitar y tanto dinero que recaudar, el tiempo ha volado. Pero no podría estar más orgulloso del estado de nuestra campaña y los éxitos que hemos logrado hasta ahora. Hemos viajado miles de millas, visitado lugares como South Valley, Artesia, Magdalena, Laguna Pueblo, Socorro, Hobbs, Truth or Consequences, Silver City y muchas, muchas comunidades más en este distrito tan grande y diverso. Hemos sido recibidos con gran apoyo - es lo que me hace seguir adelante cada día. También contratamos nuevos miembros del personal, aseguramos un lugar como candidato respaldado por el partido Demócrata nacional, nos reunimos y obtuvimos el apoyo de docenas de sindicatos, miembros del Congreso, la Liga de Votantes por la Conservación, recaudamos cientos de miles de dólares, pero lo más importante, hemos trabajado muy duro en esta campaña para ganar su confianza y traer de vuelta la representación que nuestra gente merece. En esta campaña electoral, recibo muchos consejos. Escucho atentamente y absorbo las lecciones y experiencias de los demás para guiar nuestro camino. Pero me mantengo firme en los valores que han dado forma a mi vida, los valores que les prometo traeré al Congreso. Creo que cada nuevo mexicano tiene el potencial para tener éxito: criar una familia saludable, iniciar un negocio, comprar una casa, obtener una educación asequible y un buen trabajo, y vivir con dignidad en este hermoso estado que tanto queremos. Prometo ser ese líder que merecemos para nuestra gente en el Congreso. Gracias por su apoyo! El trabajo apenas está comenzando y no podría estar más entusiasmado con lo que está por venir. Únete a nuestra campaña y apoyanos como voluntario, contribuyendo con una donación con lo que pueda o platicando con sus amigos y familiares sobre las próximas elecciones. Nos vemos pronto, Gabe Vásquez | [DONAR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44471518/341736723/1004889957?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220423spanish_gv_90da_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTU0NzFhYS0xZWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WO84SCtEqA5vVDNh8fKQVLOnp3Ik_6f-WFo75D20Jr4=)
---
* * *
Hello friends,
I’m typing this after a long day on the campaign trail — it’s been eight months since I started this journey to earn your support to be your next representative in Congress. With so much work, so many people to meet, so many communities to visit, and so much money to raise, the time has flown by.
But I couldn’t be more proud of the state of our campaign and the successes we’ve accomplished thus far. We have traveled thousands of miles, visited places like the South Valley, Artesia, Magdalena, Laguna Pueblo, Socorro, Hobbs, Truth or Consequences, Silver City, and many, many more communities in this very large and diverse district. We’ve been greeted with overwhelming support, which keeps me going every day.
We’ve also hired new staff members, secured a spot as a DCCC Red-to-Blue endorsed candidate, met with and earned the support of dozens of labor unions, members of Congress, the League of Conservation Voters, raised hundreds of thousands of dollars, but most importantly, we’ve worked extremely hard on this campaign to earn your trust and confidence to bring real representation back to New Mexico’s 2nd District.
On the campaign trail, I get a lot of advice. I listen intently and absorb the lessons and experiences of others to guide our path forward. But I stay strong to the values that have shaped my life, the values that I promise you I’ll bring to Congress. I truly believe that every New Mexican has the potential to succeed — to raise a healthy family, start a business, buy a home, get an affordable education and a good paying job, and to live with dignity in this beautiful state that we call home.
I promise to be that leader for you in Congress. Thank you for your support — the work is just beginning, and I couldn’t be more excited about what's to come. Join me today and support our campaign by volunteering, contributing what you can, or telling your friends and family about the upcoming elections.
Nos vemos pronto,
Gabe Vasquez

name: Bianca Keaton, Campaign Manager
subject: Help us reach Kentucky voters in Jefferson County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hey, Peter, it’s
Bianca — I’m the campaign manager for Team Booker.

I wanna let you in on some behind the scenes plans for our campaign and
let you know our strategy to mobilize a record number of voters in all 120
counties and turn Kentucky blue.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17750?refcode=em20220423-1800&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1800%2E346206%2EBRv1Wo ]When you’re done reading, I hope you’ll donate $5 so our
field team can start making the early investments we need to register and
contact a record number of voters leading up to the election.

Ever since Charles ran for U.S. Senate in 2020, his motto has been ‘From
the hood, to the holler.’

Meaning if we want to transform the future of Kentucky: We need to come
together — from all walks of life, different backgrounds, representing
communities across the Commonwealth — to create a winning movement.

For too long, there’s been this myth that Kentucky will forever be a red
state. But the truth is it’s a disenfranchised state. It’s a commonwealth
where a whole lot of people haven’t felt heard in a long time, and where
the number of people who don’t vote outnumber those who do. Republicans
know this — so their plan is to continue dividing us, distracting us from
the common priorities we share, and discouraging us from voting.

We plan on ending that cycle. That means we need to start investing ASAP
in:

* Building a grassroots network of organizers
* Training volunteer coordinators
* Purchasing voter outreach tools
* Printing voter registration informational materials
* Setting up a fund to pay for gas for our teams as they travel across
Kentucky
* And so much more

So here’s the part where we ask you for your help,
Peter. To kickoff our
organizing plan, we set up a rough budget:

Peter, we’ve
randomly selected you as a potential sponsor of Jefferson County
in KY.

We’ve got about 632781 registered voters there. At a cost of
roughly $0.25 per voter, we’ll need to raise about $158,195 to
cover our budget and reach every voter in Jefferson County.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17750?refcode=em20220423-1800&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1800%2E346206%2EBRv1Wo ]→ Click here to make a $5 donation and help us reach 20 voters
in Jefferson County. ←

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17750?refcode=em20220423-1800&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1800%2E346206%2EBRv1Wo ]Contribute $5

We know that the key to transforming the future of Kentucky starts with
leveraging our people power.

Let’s do this,

Bianca
Campaign Manager for Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220423-1800-footer&t=1022&refcode2=1800_346206_BRv1Wo&akid=1800%2E346206%2EBRv1Wo

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1800%2E346206%2EBRv1Wo

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Deb Finkenauer
subject: Sen. Grassley has gone out of style
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, Peter, it's Abby's mom, Deb. My daughter is running to defeat a senator who's been in office _almost my entire adult life_. You heard that right: Sen. Grassley (R-IA) has been in Congress since 1975!
Things have changed quite a bit in the half-century since the '70s. We left behind the baby-blue tuxedos, we replaced our thick orange shag carpets, we repainted our pea-green kitchens, we stopped wearing blue eyeshadow and we grew out of those feathered haircuts.
**Now it's time to get rid of something – or rather,_someone_ – else from the '70s: Sen. Chuck Grassley.** Just like these outdated trends, Sen. Grassley and the beliefs he brings to the U.S. Senate don't belong in this century: he wants to control the personal health care choices of women, he wants to dismantle the Affordable Care Act and he wants to go on blocking protections for union families like ours. He even said _women_ don't want to do the work it takes to serve on the Judiciary Committee.
Sen. Grassley has gone out of style. He’s just as wrong for the Senate in 2022 as a pair of hot pants would be. That's why only 27% of likely voters said they want to send him back to Washington for an eighth term. **Iowans know it's time for change, for a fresh perspective and for a senator who will lead Iowa forward. There's no one better for that job than my daughter, Abby.**
The polling shows real momentum for Abby's campaign, but to compete with massive resources on the right, she needs grassroots support from people like you. **[Please, can you make your first donation of $5 tonight to help my daughter defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority? clean_body: | | | Hi there, Peter, it's Abby's mom, Deb. My daughter is running to defeat a senator who's been in office almost my entire adult life. You heard that right: Sen. Grassley (R-IA) has been in Congress since 1975! Things have changed quite a bit in the half-century since the '70s. We left behind the baby-blue tuxedos, we replaced our thick orange shag carpets, we repainted our pea-green kitchens, we stopped wearing blue eyeshadow and we grew out of those feathered haircuts. Now it's time to get rid of something – or rather,someone – else from the '70s: Sen. Chuck Grassley. Just like these outdated trends, Sen. Grassley and the beliefs he brings to the U.S. Senate don't belong in this century: he wants to control the personal health care choices of women, he wants to dismantle the Affordable Care Act and he wants to go on blocking protections for union families like ours. He even said women don't want to do the work it takes to serve on the Judiciary Committee. Sen. Grassley has gone out of style. He’s just as wrong for the Senate in 2022 as a pair of hot pants would be. That's why only 27% of likely voters said they want to send him back to Washington for an eighth term. Iowans know it's time for change, for a fresh perspective and for a senator who will lead Iowa forward. There's no one better for that job than my daughter, Abby. The polling shows real momentum for Abby's campaign, but to compete with massive resources on the right, she needs grassroots support from people like you. = | | = Thank you for believing in Abby, in this incredible campaign and in Iowa’s future. Warmly, Deb (Abby's mom) | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

This is Jessica with Team Ronchetti. I wanted to make sure you saw Mark’s most recent message about energy independence. We have extended the deadline Peter, This is Jessica with Team Ronchetti. I wanted to make sure you saw Mark’s most recent message about energy independence. We have extended the deadline because we noticed **you have not joined the list yet.**
New Mexico is counting on **you** , Peter. [**ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND RELIEF FOR ALL OF NEW MEXICO**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=d750f3d49f2d40eb9126cc5dbf88d008&_e=Qv4QXXl9gLryi70VWSlDBtumP3XTIB1QfWsKzAPjRQnZMl_4ZKt7-ekFhrm57-WLXtK-LqNFo4y1FaJdxE4hcCcm0nKnh4a8FT96EIJLSY748pAqcOzKLQ-o0J3GoTPh6MizaujI4QmOass2BcpMFgW5Nk7CgdLGm77A7uC_1eyE6Ct-6gSI_dgrlKu-VAyHMB_5cu0-PenzLogIgxB15pTgFtg29_2rm_lb8jJOMC05CpIJc-8gJ3OCKvyrYoYgX5WFiE1K3jKcDj0B9Z8X4AkRN51lNSQbLDFOe41TTB0r-tV5CXY4YwSzlLlSKQyWJJqEK5vMr5wHIgki4gYoKgJuYPNOQwUAtLbCKWbsEnQEZf6ohF0I7yKHMEgeVCGm4s5bbvF0_BAWAZWx1KPCR6bP_cj-cXaey2F4ukgw0XYw81hiGiMKY66Ko_YYWJzsoHqQ1Xfa-pN1BroSRMSs09ceSEdMBTK5dqVJoE36Bj6SLv8ea6Q89PFE4u_U5XAnzPloRAnm11FFC0I_k3vAtw%3D%3D) Joe Biden and MLG are counting on you to **do nothing.** They know Green New Deal energy policies are hurting New Mexican families. They will only get away with it if **we stay quiet.** **BUT, Peter, I need you to hear me loud and clear:****_Mark Ronchetti will not stay quiet._** Mark will fight every day to bring jobs, energy security, and lower prices **back** to New Mexico. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: 31 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The Texas runoff is just 31 days away and we have the chance to elect a new progressive champion to Congress: Jessica Cisneros.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220423-2971-header&t=1&akid=2971%2E2526796%2EBKGUWj)
The Texas runoff is _just 31 days_ away and we are closer than ever to our massive opportunity to elect a new progressive champion to Congress: **Jessica Cisneros.**
Alexandria joined Jessica on the campaign trail in February and witnessed first-hand the energy and excitement Texans have about the potential to elect Jessica and bring real change to TX-28.
But it will be an uphill battle this month. **Jessica’s opponent has $1.4 million cash on hand and is using that money to run a brand-new TV ad.** Today, we’re hoping to send a big boost to Jessica’s campaign to help them organize on the ground in these final weeks.
[If you’re able to, can you chip in $6 right now to support Jessica and our work to mobilize voters in Texas before the primary election on May 24?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220423?refcode=em20220423-2971-P_FND_SPL_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2971_2526796_BKGUWj&akid=2971%2E2526796%2EBKGUWj)
**[Contribute $6](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220423?refcode=em20220423-2971-P_FND_SPL_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2971_2526796_BKGUWj&akid=2971%2E2526796%2EBKGUWj)**
We don’t want to wake up on May 25th – the morning after the runoff – and wonder if there was anything else we could have done. We have to leave it all on the field.
Jessica has a positive vision for South Texas and will actually serve the people she represents. She is running to fight for a path to citizenship, Medicare for All, and a Green New Deal.
Similar to Alexandria's primary campaign in 2018, Jessica is going up against an entrenched incumbent – Henry Cuellar. He’s been in Congress for 16 years and voted almost 70% of the time with Donald Trump. He voted for Trump’s border wall _twice_ and is proudly anti-choice, but calls himself a “Democrat.” **It’s time for him to go.**
Texas families deserve a progressive leader who will show up and fight for them — and that’s exactly what Jessica will do.
**Alexandria is working around the clock to grow our movement in Congress, but it will take a mass mobilization of grassroots power to win in Texas.** [Can we count on you to split an urgent $6 contribution between Jessica’s campaign and our movement today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220423?refcode=em20220423-2971-P_FND_SPL_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2971_2526796_BKGUWj&akid=2971%2E2526796%2EBKGUWj)
Thank you for stepping up today.
Pa’lante!
– Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220423?refcode=em20220423-2971-P_FND_SPL_END&t=23&refcode2=2971_2526796_BKGUWj&akid=2971%2E2526796%2EBKGUWj)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220423-2971-P_FND_SPL_END&t=24&akid=2971%2E2526796%2EBKGUWj)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2971%2E2526796%2EBKGUWj) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2971%2E2526796%2EBKGUWj) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2971%2E2526796%2EBKGUWj)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2971%2E2526796%2EBKGUWj)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2971%2E2526796%2EBKGUWj)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

clean_body: Peter, Trish is running for Congress to represent everyone in her home district—not just those with whom she already agrees. Running this kind of inclusive, civil, and grassroots campaign costs more than the consultant-driven races that divide voters into categories and ignore entire swaths of people who call the district home. It costs more because we are reaching everyone: and working to bridge the divides instead of deepen, or ignore, them. And you can trust that when we ask for your support or for a donation, it goes directly to building that trust and authenticity that voters will carry with them to the polls in November. = = = If you prefer to make a one-time donation, we greatly appreciate anything you can contribute today. This race is going to be expensive: Ann Wagner's dark money allies plan to dump hundreds of thousands, if not millions, of dollars into a disinformation campaign to keep her in office so she can continue doing favors for them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = We will win this by working together and talking to thousands of voters who feel left behind by winner-takes-all partisan warfare. Trish can show them a different, and better, way. Thank you for your support. Onward, -Trish Gunby for Congress = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

name: Ben Samuels
subject: Missouri is my home
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends,
I needed to write to you directly about why I am so committed to fighting for the future of St. Louis. My family has lived in Missouri for six generations, we have had thriving businesses here, we've served in the military, and we have always been able to call this state our home.
In recent years, we have seen young people move away from Missouri in search of greater opportunities. We have seen our community safety deteriorate, the economy suffer, and healthcare outcomes worsen. But, in 2022, we are going to start trending in the right direction.
Ann Wagner has been in politics for 30 years and has done virtually nothing to enhance the lives of Missourians. I am running for office because St. Louis is part of who I am and I believe in our ability to work together for a brighter future.
We CAN do better than this. We will invest in education and technology, we will revitalize our neighborhoods and we will make St. Louis a place full of opportunities.
Please join my campaign and help me build a movement to fix our broken political system and deliver for all Missourians. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs?refcode=220423-email]
Kindly,
Ben Samuels
PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
Ben Samuels for Congress
9621 Olive Blvd.
P.O. Box 8484
Saint Louis, MO 63132-9998
United States

name: Team Benson
subject: We’ve got our opponent
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Here’s what you need to know, friend. Karamo first gained notoriety when she lied about voter fraud at the 2020 election in Detroit. Then, she signed a false affidavit as a part of a lawsuit seeking to overturn the results of the election. Now, she’s Michigan’s premier evangelizer about the Big Lie, and has collected support from a national network of election conspiracy theorists that includes Donald Trump himself.

How did Karamo catapult from an obscure conspiracy theorist to Jocelyn’s opponent? There is a growing anti-democratic movement that is seeking to take over statewide election administration for partisan gain, and Karamo is their handpicked candidate. So in 2024 when Trump asks for some extra votes in Michigan, we know who they want as Michigan’s chief election officer.. You guessed it: Kristina Karamo.

Jocelyn said it best: electing a big lie proponent like Karamo “is akin to putting an arsonist in charge of the fire department.”

We’ve got our opponent, and the stakes are higher than ever. Now, we need to continue building our campaign to make sure Jocelyn is victorious on Election Day. Donate now to help make that happen, friend.

Donate>> secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=042222]-

Team Benson

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Trump (ugh)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=207%2E5257348%2EhsVWMM ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

I’m running for U.S. Senate in Ohio to expand the Democratic Senate
majority and finally deliver meaningful change for America’s working
families. But Donald Trump is coming to Ohio today to rally his right-wing
base, boost my potential GOP opponent JD Vance, and attack Adam Schiff and
me.

Republicans are already spending over $80 million to keep Ohio red and
take back the Senate for Mitch McConnell. Trump’s visit will bring a new
wave of money and attacks, and we need your urgent help to fight back.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_ryan?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220423_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=207_5257348_hsVWMM&akid=207%2E5257348%2EhsVWMM ]If you can, will you split a donation of $10 or more to Adam and me to
help us overcome the GOP, flip Ohio blue, and expand the Democratic Senate
and House majorities? It’s important we raise $100,000 before Trump’s
rally.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Adam Schiff and Tim Ryan will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_ryan?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220423_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1005&refcode2=207_5257348_hsVWMM&akid=207%2E5257348%2EhsVWMM ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_ryan?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220423_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1009&refcode2=207_5257348_hsVWMM&akid=207%2E5257348%2EhsVWMM ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_ryan?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220423_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&refcode2=207_5257348_hsVWMM&akid=207%2E5257348%2EhsVWMM ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

We can’t let the Republican smear campaigns against Adam and me go
unanswered. I’m virtually tied with my opponents according to the latest
polling, and one misstep could tilt this race toward the GOP.

Political experts are saying we have a good shot at winning. CNN ranks us
as one of the most likely seats to flip and the Wall Street Journal calls
us 2022’s most important race. With so much at stake, we have to give it
our all.

Trump’s visit puts our campaign — and our entire Senate and House
majorities — at risk unless we fight back. That’s why Adam and I are
counting on your grassroots support today to help us raise $100,000.

name: Bryce Reeves
subject: A Week Of Winning!
disclaimer_text: Paid For by Reeves for Congress
body:
A Week Of Winning!
| | |
---
| | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/010001805750fe39-69dbf33b-b625-471b-b658-0dc8c7378b95-000000/jtdFyXT3lMrf1sVTtnaytDXeh3c=267)
---
|
---
| **A Week Of Winning!**
---
| | | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Ffb.watch%2Fc2UHLL835U%2F/1/010001805750fe39-69dbf33b-b625-471b-b658-0dc8c7378b95-000000/JaFF4UpYL-ajmBmlKnIEwOLDJGg=267)
---
|
---
| Friends, We have had an absolutely fantastic week, and I just wanted to make sure you've heard all the good news. The biggest story is on Wednesday. The Cook Political Report, moved our race here in VA-07 from Lean Democrat to Toss Up! Even more, in their write up on why they moved the district, they highlighted my front runner status in the race. I appreciate the compliment, and the facts behind it. So far in this race **we have raised well over half a million dollars,** all while I got around a dozen bills on Governor Youngkin's desk for signing. **Plus we already represent over a fifth of the district;** frankly, after the new redistricting lines, that is not much less than Abigail Spanberger currently represents.
---
| | |
---
| I also had a great time at a forum in Prince William County this week. The general consensus from everyone we've heard from was that at the forum all of the candidates seemed like good people, but I was the only one with the capability to take on Abigail Spanberger and win this November. I love attending forums like this, because I love meeting with voters and having the opportunity to talk about the things we've gotten in done in Richmond, and the things I look forward to doing in Washington D.C. So many questions were focused on veterans issues at this forum, and I was proud to argue for my record there, whether it was getting the new VA hospital built in Spotsylvania or setting up Veterans Treatment Courts, which after their success here, I helped get signed into law nationally by President Trump several years ago.
---
|
---
| I would have loved to make the forum today, but we had national fundraising events that had already been planned. I'm so thankful that my Campaign Chairman, Delegate Nick Freitas, was able to attend on my behalf. This race is going to take every last penny to defeat Abigail Spanberger, her big money Democrat donors, and the $4 million dollar war chest she has already amassed. But my team and I are working as hard as we can to bring back leadership that reflects our district's values. Please keep praying for our country, and I know, working together, we will win this. In service,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce Reeves
---
|
---
| |
---
| | [Join The Team](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-congress%2Fdonate-today/1/010001805750fe39-69dbf33b-b625-471b-b658-0dc8c7378b95-000000/TIbb7pO7tghjUkE7GciiVpv_iUg=267)
---
| |
---
| | | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FBryceReevesVA/1/010001805750fe39-69dbf33b-b625-471b-b658-0dc8c7378b95-000000/rm7TbgD90wuN-PMzbF--IDVda_k=267)
---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Add your name to Bernie & Cori Bush's new bill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Bernie & Cori’s bill invests in renewable green energy and sets us on a
path to ending our reliance on fossil fuels.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/bernie-cori-energy-bill/?source=em20220423-22993&t=1002&akid=22993%2E1203867%2EfSaeH7 ]Can you add your name in support of their Energy, Security and
Independence Act?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/bernie-cori-energy-bill/?source=em20220423-22993&t=1003&akid=22993%2E1203867%2EfSaeH7 ]Add your name

Peter,

Earlier this month Senator Bernie Sanders joined with Representative Cori
Bush to introduce a bill to strengthen America’s renewable energy supply
chain AND lower skyrocketing utility costs for working families.

Justice Democrats will always support the bold environmental policy
proposals from Bernie and our first-ever candidate recruit: Cori Bush.
This is the kind of progressive, transformative policymaking we need in
Congress.

Here's what Cori had to say about the bill: "Energy security means making
energy affordable for every household. Energy security means investing in
energy efficiency so people can breathe clean air and keep the heat or air
conditioning on. Energy security means alleviating the climate crisis by
reducing our emissions and transitioning to renewable energy."

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/bernie-cori-energy-bill/?source=em20220423-22993&t=1004&akid=22993%2E1203867%2EfSaeH7 ]If you agree with Cori and Bernie, please add your name in support of
their Energy, Security and Independence Act of 2022.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/bernie-cori-energy-bill/?source=em20220423-22993&t=1005&akid=22993%2E1203867%2EfSaeH7 ]Sign on

Working towards a Green New Deal begins with passing legislation that
invests in renewable energy, lessens our reliance on fossil fuels, and
reduces the cost burdens for the people.

The bill would:

* Call for the use of the Defense Production Act (DPA) to build up
renewable energy in the U.S. in order to lower prices and reduce our
reliance on dangerous and unpredictable fossil fuels
* Invest in the renewable energy supply chain to support reliable,
affordable and safe energy production and green jobs with strong labor
standards
* Invest billions in energy efficiency to lower utility prices,
including investments in weatherization and heat pumps

Here's what Bernie had to say about the bill: "When it comes to the
existential threat of climate change, we are in the midst of a global
struggle with nothing less than the future of the planet at stake."

We know this is what’s at stake — it’s why we’re fighting every day to
address the climate crisis and elect progressive leaders who will fight
alongside us, Bernie, and Cori.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/bernie-cori-energy-bill/?source=em20220423-22993&t=1006&akid=22993%2E1203867%2EfSaeH7 ]Are you with us? Sign on to Bernie and Cori’s energy bill today and
build support for this critical piece of legislation in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/bernie-cori-energy-bill/?source=em20220423-22993&t=1007&akid=22993%2E1203867%2EfSaeH7 ]Add your name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1008&akid=22993%2E1203867%2EfSaeH7 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1009&akid=22993%2E1203867%2EfSaeH7 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220423-22993-footer&t=1010&refcode2=22993_1203867_fSaeH7&akid=22993%2E1203867%2EfSaeH7

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1011&akid=22993%2E1203867%2EfSaeH7

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: newpoll@warnockforgeorgia.com
subject: huge news out of Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC

Peter,

Had voters in Georgia realized how liberal Raphael Warnock's voting record would be in the U.S. Senate, I firmly believe that he wouldn't be there today.

My name is Scott Paradise, and I'm Herschel Walker's campaign manager. I'm reaching out today to ask that you join us in helping defeat Senator Warnock this November.

Here are four alarming reasons to invest in this race:
1. Our opponent favors canceling more than $1.6 trillion in student debt, which is another way of saying taxpayers will pay the bill.
2. He voted in favor of nuking the Senate filibuster so legislation can be rammed through on a party-line basis.
3. While watching gas prices soar, he voted four times (!) against the Keystone XL Pipeline.
4. He has voted for trillions in government spending that has contributed to record inflation.

And a bonus 5th reason why we need you to invest today: _**Senator Warnock has become a celebrity in Democrat politics and Hollywood circles, raising more than $110k online EVERY SINGLE DAY. That's $68 every minute.**_

In fact, our opponent raised more money in the first three months of this year than any Senate candidate in history has raised in the first quarter of an election year!

**We're going up against a money machine the likes of which no one has ever seen before.** We need your immediate help. For every day that we get outraised, it becomes easier for our opponent to mislead the voters and win this critical battleground seat again.

**[If you can, please send us $4 right now.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fda15231671b49678966e38d4259c9d4&_e=abd87QJtMcLmd7OnVHFgIoaCr9_0oVxjJpcismFYxPQ1jDjuuaMszUd0I_DoGECrj8DSlS0Zz-D_tiZO4jUWzv4i-e8YimF9npUy-aF93TH-ogphKe6q6PBLgGMBRAgffAyh-HtTMklXViVcFI_PQALz9JOGu7HRj1cesx2vDkfMrtLTF1IXmb4xeJx9aEk4XFqOwNqrhkghhOprHqI_u-hwnUUkZiLzNL71bpO0JzGAa5VcRmgG3_gAhLtau-yRQ5xW0Xn9AT0XJOcp50b7YZoxdY0vgfu0a6UrtNYPz_ew_dSzw0obCY8w1a3SrmH9FI-xXN_L8jqncnkRTZTtMyuFWo8UCUNIRmwhvjRCC4uiXg12uhb9c6wLPR53EL-FyCP1OPKlqmw-tWIUjqpdD_zPSFj-J23f1iqxQ2qk1oOOuuYVIXfRw7k-94URtfovhXP06R4RuSBr1oER2Ztn5Kv9nPEYCoxcQxXrXrmBSR1dXu_buVJrXgagtOvxz9mp)**

In the minute it has taken you to read this far, our opponent has already raised another $68 online.

We're counting on your generosity. Without your support, we will continue to get outraised and miss important fundraising goals.

But with your help, I know we will win in Georgia, flip control of the Senate, and stop the Biden-Warnock agenda in its tracks!

Thanks,

Scott Paradise
Campaign Manager,
Herschel Walker for Senate

P.S. **[To offset the $68 our opponent just raised online in the last 60 seconds, would you be one of two people to give $34 this minute to match it?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fda15231671b49678966e38d4259c9d4&_e=abd87QJtMcLmd7OnVHFgIoaCr9_0oVxjJpcismFYxPQ1jDjuuaMszUd0I_DoGECrj8DSlS0Zz-D_tiZO4jUWzv4i-e8YimF9npUy-aF93TH-ogphKe6q6PBLgGMBRAgffAyh-HtTMklXViVcFI_PQALz9JOGu7HRj1cesx2vDkfMrtLTF1IXmb4xeJx9aEk4XFqOwNqrhkghhOprHqI_u-hwnUUkZiLzNL71bpO0JzGAa5VcRmgG3_gAhLtau-yRQ5xW0Xn9AT0XJOcp50b7YZoxdY0vgfu0a6UrtNYPz_e0rKDAeubl_qzLNQbhwjn30bnCa5QMhbtgbpFfPNAsw1pzBMCJa-hm-Yss6s1vkLFnzIyE0EUIS1hBNs8w7U38rHbRMaU_A_qrs4CR-Yt9_GY7y0M5GAjio4PGHU7QADsNIgsRYFU-pn0tMy5ZsUFCEHRt8nn-XnaBzCtU6zj6uIykjXQX9IY3GQVl2QCMeI47GyYeWuaCJOik725TcWr2)** I know Herschel, who wore #34 during his football career, would be thrilled to hear about your support!

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44474011/341749332/-1389663745?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220423tlfsplit_TLF_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTg1OWQzNC0yOGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=63wRLqHM0BoyoFF4fvoHAG5_2t0SW0ywVTqMFV9hjbg=)

Hey Peter, Rep. Teresa Leger Fernandez here, from New Mexico’s 3rd District! I’m so proud to be supporting Dr. Yadira Caraveo for Colorado’s 8th District, because if one thing’s become clear since I got to Congress last year, it’s that **we need more Latina leaders in Washington advocating for our communities.** **[Can you split a donation today between our campaigns to ensure that the Latino community has the representation they need and deserve in Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44474012/341749333/1307302526?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220423tlfsplit_TLF_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTg1OWQzNC0yOGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=63wRLqHM0BoyoFF4fvoHAG5_2t0SW0ywVTqMFV9hjbg=)** | [Split a donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44474013/341749334/1307302526?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220423tlfsplit_TLF_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTg1OWQzNC0yOGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=63wRLqHM0BoyoFF4fvoHAG5_2t0SW0ywVTqMFV9hjbg=)
---
Dr. Caraveo is showing our country the power of Latina leadership. I’m so impressed by her work in the Colorado statehouse to expand voting rights, protect reproductive healthcare, and stand up for working people. She’s been fighting on behalf of Colorado families for years, and I can’t wait to see what we can accomplish together in Congress.
Yadira’s nomination is historic, too: **She would be the first Latina elected to federal office from Colorado.**
I can tell you firsthand that representation is so important in Washington, especially when fighting against ongoing voter suppression and intimidation tactics that target minority voters. There are far too few Latinas in Congress, and it’s past time the Latino community had greater representation. Together Yadira and I will ensure that their voices are heard.
Everything depends on Democrats holding the House this year. Affordable healthcare, voting rights, protecting our environment, defending reproductive healthcare — we MUST win Yadira’s and my seats to ensure we can deliver on those priorities.
Yadira is up against some truly extreme GOP opponents, and my race was just recently targeted by Mike Pence’s super PAC. That means the GOP is about to pour millions of dollars in dark money into both of our races, and we need your help to fight back.
**[So, if you’re able, will you split a donation between my and Yadira’s campaigns today? Grassroots support is how we’re going to win our races and deliver for the Latino community and working families across America in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44474014/341749335/1307302526?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220423tlfsplit_TLF_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTg1OWQzNC0yOGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=63wRLqHM0BoyoFF4fvoHAG5_2t0SW0ywVTqMFV9hjbg=)**

clean_body: | = Hey Peter, Rep. Teresa Leger Fernandez here, from New Mexico’s 3rd District! I’m so proud to be supporting Dr. Yadira Caraveo for Colorado’s 8th District, because if one thing’s become clear since I got to Congress last year, it’s that we need more Latina leaders in Washington advocating for our communities. = | = Dr. Caraveo is showing our country the power of Latina leadership. I’m so impressed by her work in the Colorado statehouse to expand voting rights, protect reproductive healthcare, and stand up for working people. She’s been fighting on behalf of Colorado families for years, and I can’t wait to see what we can accomplish together in Congress. Yadira’s nomination is historic, too: She would be the first Latina elected to federal office from Colorado. I can tell you firsthand that representation is so important in Washington, especially when fighting against ongoing voter suppression and intimidation tactics that target minority voters. There are far too few Latinas in Congress, and it’s past time the Latino community had greater representation. Together Yadira and I will ensure that their voices are heard. Everything depends on Democrats holding the House this year. Affordable healthcare, voting rights, protecting our environment, defending reproductive healthcare — we MUST win Yadira’s and my seats to ensure we can deliver on those priorities. Yadira is up against some truly extreme GOP opponents, and my race was just recently targeted by Mike Pence’s super PAC. That means the GOP is about to pour millions of dollars in dark money into both of our races, and we need your help to fight back. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Adelante! name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: Color doesn’t matter in uniform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress
body:
When I served in the Navy, skin color was the last thing on my fellow sailors’ and my mind. [](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=80f63bf376b34c0fb71b1822d91c2c28&_e=L0xpDzTFARVrHLpqO9AVaA5FJ4Gl3Ds2B5xDSh6W_bWQicQNAQhC61krjHToCaXEwYRCJg93-jUMcUcDWaFVdidOr7EYfwHVpEqqE3wGqVoUPzNmiMfzc0Qvvta6-7j2aN_RraCY8DPcg8dx1gSAblKfxj7NtvZoZz3ULx33T36kFUJLGVrEgnamsWnDOEFl-p4UMisFAJV9b2Imit_9IonitjjQ_n2ahoX1Z-ZRt0orNyPNm5BdARixbN7vN9ype9VFCIug0Gmc8i_nJVsKFTcLrEAk8U3HcINPYckkL9BQJ-uIarCrmzAkzaGKaFrRO7w-FYd2se3JGYWKlKb6VwzgxccSbs4_wr69t8ixqI7guZOHyHpDnPTR9Kk7LvQuYDPBSTZC-39600JaZM0hQA%3D%3D) Peter, When I served in the Navy, skin color was the last thing on my fellow sailors’ and my mind.

I didn’t get special privileges because I was an immigrant or because I was Vietnamese - **the only metrics that mattered were my ability to get the job done and my duty to our great country.**

But today, _even in our military_ , the woke Left wants to use critical race theory to divide us and distract us from making America great.

**I promise to stand strong against CRT and other fake “woke” propaganda in Congress, but first I need your help.**

My team put together a survey to show the world that hardworking Americans don’t believe CRT BS, and I need every patriot to fill it out.

[**Please take our Critical Race Theory survey TODAY and let us know if YOU support teaching CRT in schools and the military. **](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=80f63bf376b34c0fb71b1822d91c2c28&_e=L0xpDzTFARVrHLpqO9AVaA5FJ4Gl3Ds2B5xDSh6W_bWQicQNAQhC61krjHToCaXEwYRCJg93-jUMcUcDWaFVdidOr7EYfwHVpEqqE3wGqVoUPzNmiMfzc0Qvvta6-7j2aN_RraCY8DPcg8dx1gSAblKfxj7NtvZoZz3ULx33T35dpOTaicBe8WrpaAgrlXQqWkV41rZ0CNQeaiduNMQSzts2AyW4u0w52_-sMtR5HN0mBEqoWV0VpYZFLJVyjukxb3p38sM0A-FfSmdUqFD-FzrQd9dQX3Qi_0PeRSCBoEiOhBNYG32PRNxS1oCoQQPW2pI-uEXJA_7bls0gZuZ-f9DGuHC3zy59Z3R0wcD3HlAw2sbAj9_bfuAsa8ivwKDXKKxDJeYe8345KRODmN2qjw%3D%3D) | |

Across the nation, we are witnessing a disturbing trend, as more and more Republican state legislatures attack a woman’s right to choose.

And in the General Assembly, I stood up to them every time they tried to strip women of their right to choose. That’s why I have the support of Emily’s List, the largest organization supporting pro-choice women in the country.

name: COL (RET.) Scott McChrystal
subject: My thoughts on Vicky Hartzler
body:
Friend, I have never written a letter to support a candidate for political office. Why am I doing so now? During more than three decades in military service, along with fourteen years of working at a leading church organization’s national office, I had to abstain from expressing my political views publicly. Those constraints no longer apply, and it is my privilege to express my support for Vicky Hartzler, candidate for the U.S. Senate. We live in challenging times, both at home and abroad. Vicky is the right leader to represent Missourians as a United States Senator. Why? Four marks of her character make her the clear choice. **CARING: **Vicky consistently demonstrates a genuine love and concern for people. Her values and beliefs sync with how she lives her life: loving God, serving others, working hard, doing the next right thing. Since attending college, she has served and cared for others as a schoolteacher, Missouri state representative for three terms, and U.S. congresswomen from Missouri in the House of Representatives since 2011. Vicky works tirelessly to make Missouri and our nation a better place to live. **COMPETENT: **Election to public service does not guarantee the necessary skills and abilities to represent constituents effectively. Vicky has consistently represented Missourians in a manner that honors their trust. As a career Army officer, I’ve been repeatedly impressed by her extensive knowledge of military-related matters and her leadership in supporting military readiness in all areas—weapons, equipment, logistics and personnel. In conversations I’ve had with Vicky, I know her to be very concerned about warriors and family members with invisible wounds as well as finding more effective approaches toward the prevention of suicide in the military. In short, Vicky gets things done. **CONSERVATIVE: **Vicky unapologetically embraces traditional American values like freedom of speech, religious liberty, the right to bear arms, equal opportunity to work, and the pursuit of happiness as provided by America’s founding documents. She knows that Missourians and all U.S. citizens have both the privilege and the responsibility to live under a justice system that requires all people to obey local, state, and national laws. Offenders should be punished and the innocent vindicated if our justice system is to be trusted. She believes in limited federal government and that the best solutions come from those closest to the situation—state, local and community leaders. Although conservative in her approach, Vicky consistently listens to opposing views and seeks to identify common-sense solutions. **COURAGEOUS: **Vicky Hartzler demonstrates personal courage in assessing all sides of an issue and then acting to do what she believes is right. She is not afraid to take risks when right is at stake. Case in point: Despite the guarantee of harsh criticism, Vicky recently produced an ad decrying the fact that biological males competing against biological females is unfair to women and, if not halted, poses a huge threat to the future of women’s sports. In closing, Vicky Hartzler is the kind of person Missouri and America need as a United States Senator. She will help to restore to Congress the kind of integrity and wise leadership our nation desperately needs and which have proven to be in short supply during these recent years of crisis. Scott McChrystal Chaplain (Colonel), USA (Ret) | | [](http://links.hartzlerforsenate.org/u/click?_t=1feb8b824d3a4bea8a2ff68de85e7950&_m=1425a02c9f624e26b48a310563e9a4cf&_e=lWipEF8ci0xYBHeX9h8wvp7E33Z9SbsGlKL6iyHrG2BDm-WXBjrDwX_Vo5ArkO6Ki4TOdUFRAhvNiTuoDOdPpJdidefzTkaNsKSld4LXepM_dlv5oNng5E1bl1dRVtGZexP5LsqivyU2soP02B7RcfviQhBFopEVd8FWNY0527kn2Rx6Btd-RFBeDff0aHXDrPAY-rTwD76JCcE3UinPpI88dfyhEiZWcewDHW_s2dny8-0t4vOw5YQhfkGGUjSrI1IxtNqg0U_ymsxCblk4kHPaf6LiFWM0krE-ateWb4iiddamQuQ3AVrKYaKYRaLNdggJUcEPn4HFyxjWAqIaJGN34BvyAY8jpXm4V9W3rPuBesFEFuKOFypnLwUahdp3) | [](http://links.hartzlerforsenate.org/u/click?_t=1feb8b824d3a4bea8a2ff68de85e7950&_m=1425a02c9f624e26b48a310563e9a4cf&_e=lWipEF8ci0xYBHeX9h8wvvrsABVqatHZhjGzpvLppwkbrWSruGlcCU1XsHX94i3zHHOQ9uKCbeUVeWNjNUOJI73oZHhg48XQmtBJK5VJ24DlWqWOP9gkjMRB8ixvJ0GzZsPL-xTje5UpYQ3RXPZyvJxmoVDU0FBVTPzOSs038_t1QiyWc8DUhcQtBpYEgH7tZYsSktISzYGyLwMirpsYphn9mogqeKVuCZFaflhKqoSvfxbsSmPAVsxgmIA-lhZ62PbPJr7-FS9_4gOhneOMtGs0pY3mWHraVfTLs7RGyAtyuVtV0nQHx2BS8W3w25Yt1je3BmNI7AqTh9huKyLDL4eP2dAL4lTEj5VBt88ygYk%3D) | [](http://links.hartzlerforsenate.org/u/click?_t=1feb8b824d3a4bea8a2ff68de85e7950&_m=1425a02c9f624e26b48a310563e9a4cf&_e=lWipEF8ci0xYBHeX9h8wvr7HIrarFhl6icfHWbj90rUtNtH1kHfp2ExnGwXVG-TDk4LC-KbYHojKd_ZD_9eju_3odAQ6Wz2lh3vDvOt1jyd9xrVVPz_Bi2Q1OPIuOF5trE9-imc9kuF1IY_RjwCsjmat07RXw6sPybEHzQ913IU8XIih0i6mfeBiEYfV9ajiLChD2ZfNZpHUP0NuLi26JlY5tlB1xSccdvKs8lOCQXZM_N33rPFqg2sqvyyYn_IJH_Gc4xfvg4oUd_S9LAlMB_goufHOAnzGDyvFx23HgFNk4yoVPpc-56ADTS6q0ANyZV_DJCmKdYYtMcx7aC29ZSNdcAHm5kkieBNfkV2ii6BfGcK7f-3U_1d3gk_57BnX)

Fellow Conservative,

Late into the night, unmarked planes are landing at my local airport, filled with young illegal aliens. The illegal aliens are then hopping on buses that are waiting for them to head to different cities along the east coast.

And who is the mysterious sponsor, supporting and funding this outrageous practice: **Joe Biden**.

**Fellow Conservative, the Biden Administration is taking plane loads of illegal children and dispensing them all over the country in the wee hours of the night!**

_It’s absolutely despicable!_

Biden’s legacy is open borders. He has created one of the largest humanitarian crises this country has ever seen, with illegal migrant arrivals at the border hitting a 22-year high in March alone.

Last year, there were 1.7 million border encounters, and this year we’re estimated to reach 2.1 million. So, do Joe Biden and the Democrats not care about the American people, or are they actively choosing to prioritize criminals over citizens?

This crisis doesn’t just affect people in Texas, it affects ALL OF US! This invasion has made every state a border state. Democrats are flying criminals to YOUR STATE! Hi there,
When public polling is released, political strategists on both sides analyze the data to make decisions about how they invest ad dollars and which groups of voters to talk to.
So when a University of New Hampshire poll came out this week showing Maggie Hassan DOWN by 2 points, serious alarm bells went off — especially because our fundraising has slowed, and we’ve had recent conversations about budget cuts.
This race was always going to be close. But we’re at the point in the cycle where we need to put down deposits for TV ads, and we just reduced our digital projection because responses to emails like this one had slowed down so much. **[Will you please donate $3 right now to help us build the resources to win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44478287/341774170/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk968-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWI0MTg3MS01MWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=13_b2cSI-Fbj0u_F_UTdM_p8xAZjjcICItbhXOP1ft8=)**
Now that we have this new polling, **we’re very concerned that we may not have the money it’ll take to reelect Maggie**. The best – and maybe only – way to bounce back from this deficit is with a groundswell of grassroots support. Our data says that if we can raise an additional $15k in the next 48 hours, we’ll be better-positioned to swing the polls.
Look, this is a make-or-break point in the campaign, and we need you to pull through. **[Please rush $3 or as much as you can to close the gap, reelect Maggie Hassan, and protect the Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44478288/341774171/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk968-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWI0MTg3MS01MWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=13_b2cSI-Fbj0u_F_UTdM_p8xAZjjcICItbhXOP1ft8=)**

name: Jane Timken
subject: Early Voting is Underway – Vote Jane Timken for U.S. Senate
body:
| | | [](https://)
---
| | Dear Peter, We are now 10 days away from the May 3rd primary election, and I am reaching out to humbly ask for your support to be Ohio’s next United States Senator. **I am a tough America First mom who is ready to tackle inflation, secure the border, and fight for parents’ rights in education, but I need your vote on May 3rd to do so.**** ** I know you have many choices in this Senate race, but I am the best candidate because I always have Ohio’s best interests in mind. I’m not in this race for celebrity status or power – I’m in this race to fight for the policies that help Ohio families, businesses, and communities thrive. I have a plan to strengthen Ohio’s workforce, get Ohio’s drug epidemic under control, and make sure our schools work for the students, not the teachers unions. You can vote on Election Day, or you can still vote absentee by following the steps at the following link: [https://www.ohiosos.gov/elections/voters/absentee-ballot/](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=ec4a805396c24a77bbd16e33acb2b508&_e=PtYQpMWCkPOUi_JcTVO4lyriZ4Hca1Bw-e0udR7VaTS6_7rA5WFweiuEWIL8f-SNVvrkzmYuNH9HTxyABLsbfHql5rgq3N6_95U9D-fjpL_7gPULqnR_toNzv7R0O7iJ5Ra2CtwMHwKn8hRkE7iOI_S1rUDCpQUwgK5cJrllfIN8UrLkO0d-tHNK7pH2p5sCWUwd8zFnvCx9Y7n6y3qdbA4qe_F-nUuloOjhuTj35YzLLrHOJDsDH2W1pBnyiJU_q3KS9dtpa3lS64Yn0fmyIrgy2s1sxq2a0yhXa-0Ya9Q20mU1T5pqnc9izhPPw-wk). You can also vote early at your local board of elections! Simply [click here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=ec4a805396c24a77bbd16e33acb2b508&_e=PtYQpMWCkPOUi_JcTVO4l1r-5lAhwV_zafVZAy8sDPFkA8oWb2dd2mObdmuwYymdSzHH2x56U1uIC8s6O8KsIGNxIpq2zG9n1XPFYuyf1VFvChxJDIi37yU56iDZ5ysngbrU7zwT851o-uTsGaxTGMkwx8_Hf8Uq7ca8R7qHDV5kK-JIf1MLU_nPh9CKBwBw1iAwKJEvsMNt__rVvJjMdd7peXAyioVIDVm2i-nD7iQ1k-EGv-KI4UQmZ8rMP1ZipdIa7GfDysVGVQw5ETDh5dwK5f0f7pspBxX1O-VVcXgHBnahAut_GpZkoYwNoHHN) and find your county’s board of elections for their address and make a plan to go vote early! Thank you for your continued support, and as your next United States Senator, I promise I will not let you down. Jane Timken

body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

Are you really turning down the chance of a lifetime to have dinner with President Trump? We're SHOCKED!

We thought you were a top supporter of President Trump and House Conservatives, but our records show you _**DECLINED your chance to have dinner in Dallas with President Trump. **_

You MUST correct the record now, or we will offer your spot to the next Patriot on our list!
* * *
** SUPPORTER: _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60211591:61TfPwoNP:m:1:3253819041:6CC21896FD366EE2D66D317453EE6612:r)_
RSVP: DECLINED**
* * *
_**[RSVP NOW to enter to win a trip of a lifetime that includes travel arrangements, a hotel stay, and dinner with the President himself!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60211591:61TfPwoNP:m:1:3253819041:6CC21896FD366EE2D66D317453EE6612:r "RSVP NOW to enter
to win a trip of a lifetime that includes travel arrangements, a hotel stay, and dinner with the President himself!")**_

Thank you,

Trump Dinner Reservations

---
You can read the full contest rules [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60211592:61TfPwoNP:m:1:3253819041:6CC21896FD366EE2D66D317453EE6612:r). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60211593:61TfPwoNP:m:1:3253819041:6CC21896FD366EE2D66D317453EE6612:r).

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this form. To enter without making a contribution, click [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60211593:61TfPwoNP:m:1:3253819041:6CC21896FD366EE2D66D317453EE6612:r). Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 9th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the NRCC, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. name: Marcus Flowers
subject: FWD: This is urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
|
---
[](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUEjCM2_RDbHlg79_-0zRrgfweGx5Uv7mQOylwcAtj-c4&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220423_meetingfwd&n=1) Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers, Democrat and Army Veteran running for Congress against Marjorie Taylor Greene. **My campaign manager told you about an urgent goal for our campaign:** We need to get 5,000 individual grassroots donations of our average contribution size of $21.40 or more by the end of April. _**If we don’t, we’ll need to cancel about $100,000 worth of T.V. airtime.**_ [**Since we announced our goal, we’ve gotten 965 individual donations. And I can’t thank you enough. But we’re still less than 20% of the way there. Can you make a donation of $21.40 or more to help us close the gap?**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUEjCM2_RDbHlg79_-0zRrgfweGx5Uv7mQOylwcAtj-c4&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220423_meetingfwd&n=2) [](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUEjCM2_RDbHlg79_-0zRrgfweGx5Uv7mQOylwcAtj-c4&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220423_meetingfwd&n=3) | [](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUEjCM2_RDbHlg79_-0zRrgfweGx5Uv7mQOylwcAtj-c4&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220423_meetingfwd&n=4 "CLOSE THE GAP >>") [CLOSE THE GAP >>](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUEjCM2_RDbHlg79_-0zRrgfweGx5Uv7mQOylwcAtj-c4&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220423_meetingfwd&n=4)
---
**\----Begin forwarded message----**
From: Chase, Team Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: This is urgent
Sent on April 20, 2022 at 10:05 a.m.
Hi, it’s Chase, campaign manager for Marcus Flowers -- the Democrat running to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene.
**I just came out of a meeting that I need to tell you about \-- here’s what happened:** At the beginning of April, our fundraising skyrocketed, and we were buying up as much advertising space as we could on TV and radio across Georgia’s 14th District.
Then last week, seemingly out of nowhere, our fundraising completely dried up. So we had to call our media buyers and tell them that we might need to cancel about $100,000 worth of T.V. airtime.
**With less than 5 weeks until Election Day, this would strike a serious blow to our chances of winning the primary and defeating Marjorie Taylor Greene this November.**
[**So we’re setting a goal of getting 5,000 individual grassroots donations of our average contribution size of $21.40 or more by the end of April. Can you make a donation right now to help us close the gap and keep our ads on T.V.?**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUEjCM2_RDbHlg79_-0zRrgfweGx5Uv7mQOylwcAtj-c4&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220423_meetingfwd&n=5)
[](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUEjCM2_RDbHlg79_-0zRrgdgljJLfrfq6I9AULca4iEEbXIGFhYzifvG5-IACEiTQ&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220423_meetingfwd&n=6 "DONATE $21.40 >>") [DONATE $21.40 >>](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUEjCM2_RDbHlg79_-0zRrgdgljJLfrfq6I9AULca4iEEbXIGFhYzifvG5-IACEiTQ&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220423_meetingfwd&n=6)
---
Our campaign is a movement -- not just of Democrats -- but of Independents and even some Republicans who want an end to the embarrassment of Marjorie Taylor Greene.
We can’t afford to let up for even a single second. Let’s do everything we can.
Thanks for your help,
Chase
Campaign Manager, Team Flowers for Congress
Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
PO Box 532 Rome, GA 30162 United States
[](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUEjCM2_RDbHlg79_-0zRrgfweGx5Uv7mQOylwcAtj-c4&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220423_meetingfwd&n=7 "CONTRIBUTE >>") [CONTRIBUTE >>](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUEjCM2_RDbHlg79_-0zRrgfweGx5Uv7mQOylwcAtj-c4&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220423_meetingfwd&n=7)
---

I just came out of a meeting that I need to tell you about \-- here’s what happened: At the beginning of April, our fundraising skyrocketed, and we were buying up as much advertising space as we could on TV and radio across Georgia’s 14th District. Then last week, seemingly out of nowhere, our fundraising completely dried up. So we had to call our media buyers and tell them that we might need to cancel about $100,000 worth of T.V. airtime. With less than 5 weeks until Election Day, this would strike a serious blow to our chances of winning the primary and defeating Marjorie Taylor Greene this November. "DONATE $21.40 >>" Our campaign is a movement -- not just of Democrats -- but of Independents and even some Republicans who want an end to the embarrassment of Marjorie Taylor Greene. We can’t afford to let up for even a single second. Let’s do everything we can. Thanks for your help, Chase Campaign Manager, Team Flowers for Congress Paid for by Marcus for Georgia PO Box 532 Rome, GA 30162 United States "CONTRIBUTE >>" Marcus Flowers for Georgia · GA 30162, United States
