body:
| | Insider News from the Political Revolution!

* * *
**HEADLINES: Taking MTG to Court! | Nina vs. The Machine — Vote Now! | Rep. Levin vs. Big Money | Segal Campaign Kick-off | Cisneros vs. Cuellar | Dems Need to Deliver | Bernie Rallies w/ Amazon, Starbucks | 4/20 Sticker | & MORE!**

★ ★ ★

[Our Revolution is waging the fight to restore democracy, hold corrupt politicians accountable and elect crucial allies like Nina Turner to Congress. Help grow our power by becoming a recurring donor to Our Revolution today.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5413?t=11&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=12&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

Don’t miss our next **National ‘Organize to Win’ Broadcast** on **Monday, April 25th** with congressional candidates **Amy Vilela** (NV-1), **Summer Lee** (PA-12), and **Brittany Ramos DeBarros** (NY-11).

And — Our Revolution Board Member **Larry Cohen** will talk to US Rep. **Ro Khanna** about taxing billionaires and taking on Big Oil. Sign-up to join the live Zoom call at **8:30p ET** /5:30p PT.

[RSVP TODAY](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=13&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=14&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=15&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5415?t=16&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

**TAKING MTG TO COURT**

US Rep. **Marjorie Taylor Greene** was grilled under oath for three hours Friday on her role in January 6th — because of our members who stood up to file the initial challenge and one brave, patriotic veteran, **Michael Rasbury** working with **Our Revolution**.

Together, we’re making history — this is the first time any of the insurrectionists in office have been cross-examined. “The outcome of this case will reverberate beyond Georgia,” [CNN](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5416?t=17&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D) wrote, referencing our other challenges, “and could be lodged against former Trump if he runs again in 2024.”

As a helicopter pilot in Vietnam, **Rasbury** took the same oath as Rep. Greene “to protect democracy against all enemies foreign and domestic.” He said “she has flippantly ignored her oath of office and disqualified herself from the ballot.”

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=18&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator **Hal Ginsberg** was in the courtroom as Greene repeated she didn’t remember saying many things, including that she opposed the peaceful transfer of power to **Joe Biden** — right before lawyers played a video of her saying just that.

Our work clearly got under the skin of **Trump** , who whined that our lawsuit has Greene “going through hell.” Our members are also taking on US Reps. **Madison Cawthorn** in NC and others who literally joined the mob on January 6th and breached the Capitol.

**Our Revolution** members are also asking secretaries of state to investigate whether **Matt Gaetz** in Florida, **Jim Jordan** in Ohio, **Doug Mastriano** in Pennsylvania, and **Dan Cox** in Maryland should be eligible for the ballot in 2022.

[The far right is going to come at us with everything they have now that our lawsuits are working. Chip in here to help us fight back and ban insurrectionists from ever running again!](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=19&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=20&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

On May 3rd, we’re holding a special **Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy** with our partners at **Free Speech for People**.

We’ll speak with the courageous **Our Revolution** members - and their legal team - who are taking the fight directly to these far-right extremists in office. **And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight!**

[RSVP HERE](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5409?t=21&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=22&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

**2022 MEMBERSHIP DRIVE KICKOFF!**

To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For **$10 a month** , we’ll throw in our **sticker 6-pack** , and at **$15** , you’ll get the stickers _and_ a **poster** , too. For **$27** , get both and a **tote bag** , or join at the **$50** level to **get it all _and_ a T-shirt**.

As _committed_ **Movement Builders** , we know **the real reward is taking action to make a better world** , but we want to share these fun items as a way of thanks.

[BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=23&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=24&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=25&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

**NINA + THE PEOPLE vs THE MACHINE**

Billionaires, Big Oil and Big Pharma are pouring BIG money into the Ohio-11 race trying to buy the seat again and block Nina from Congress — but **Our Revolution** and **Team Turner** are one step ahead!

The SuperPAC, **Democratic Majority For Israel** , has kicked off an aggressive campaign with ads and mailers smearing Nina as anti-semitic, the Jewish independent outlet [Forward](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5417?t=26&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D) reports.

DMFI spent $1.9M against her in August, and now, according to [Lever News](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5418?t=27&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D), oil mogul **Stacy Schusterman** gave the SuperPAC another $2M to try to crush Nina, a leading proponent of a Green New Deal, and promote her opponent Shontel Brown, who has declined to co-sponsor the **Climate Emergency Act**.

Meanwhile, Nina continues to **build trust and relationships with Jewish residents** across the district, and our volunteers have been on the ground connecting with voters and raising grassroots funding to combat the lies.

**Marty Gelfand** , a former South Euclid councilman, called the attacks against Turner “lashon hara,” or “evil speech” in Hebrew, a grave sin under Jewish law. “**These kinds of attacks have an effect** ,” he said.

Gelfand is hopeful given the **different terrain in the primary** compared to the special election in August — when Nina’s race was alone on the ballot and around **8,000 Republicans voted for Brown** , nearly double her winning margin. Now, there are GOP races on the ballot, and new district lines include **all of Cleveland, where Nina won by 10 points**.

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5419?t=28&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

“We’ve got to be disciplined, more agile and never underestimate the other side. We’ve got to _know_ they’re going to fight dirty,” Nina told Maximilian Alvarez of [In These Times](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5420?t=29&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D). “**We need to bump back against these forces with similar force**.”

“We gotta coalesce, find those issues we have in common, find those candidates who will fight for them, and then **fight like hell** to get them elected and get change,” she said. “This is about having allies in _activist groups_ , not just in the realm of electoral politics — **that’s what Our Revolution is doing right now**.”

**With early voting underway and just over a week left to vote** , we’re going all out to bring home this win. “**The energy on the ground is palpable!** ” Nina told us. “The primary is **May 3rd** — now is the time to maximize our efforts together.”

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=30&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

SPECIAL EVENT TO FUND NINA’S RUN!

**Our Revolution** will host a **Virtual Fundraiser for Nina Turner** at **8pm ET** /5pm PT on Tuesday! Join us for a special evening discussing **Medicare for All** with Nina and other leading healthcare justice advocates.

Joined by **Michael Lighty** , **RoseAnn DeMoro** and Dr. **Ron Birnbaum** , Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator **Anna-Marta Visky** will talk about our work to pass Medicare for All resolutions in cities and states across the country. With a donation, you’ll receive a Zoom link to this intimate organizing call.

[RSVP NOW](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5421?t=31&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

“**We’re not taking a DIME from special interests or corrupt Super PACs** , which means we’re counting on supporters like you to ensure we have the resources to run and win,” Nina said. “If you can’t donate, that’s okay! You’re needed in this fight.” [SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4901?t=32&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=33&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

**ANDY LEVIN vs BIG MONEY**

**DMFI** and **AIPAC** are also pouring money into the race for Michigan’s 11th, backing conservative Dem **Haley Stevens** against one of our strongest working class fighters in Congress - US. Rep. **Andy Levin**.

But Andy has our movement. [The New Republic](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5422?t=34&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D) said he has the backing of a group “that the most unapologetic progressives in Congress seek out: **Our Revolution**.”

AIPAC is backing 37 Republicans who refused to certify Biden’s election and has now moved $300,000 to Stevens, who says she “went to a predominantly Jewish summer camp.” Andy, who is Jewish, says: “**The path to a secure, peaceful future for a democratic homeland for my people requires the political and human rights of Palestinians**.”

Despite being portrayed as the most “loyal” to the party establishment, both **Haley Stevens and Shontel Brown are now being rewarded by dark money groups** for opposing President Biden’s plan Iran Nuclear Deal.

Voters who want to see government work for their lives and serve their interests should vote for Andy. “**This is about working people having power and prosperity** ,” he said. “I’m a co-sponsor of **Medicare for All** and the **Green New Deal**. I’m the **union organizer in the Congress** , and I authored the resolution to allow our own staff to unionize.”

We can’t let big money back us down in these critical races across the country.

[VOLUNTEER FOR ANDY](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5383?t=35&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=36&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

**SEGAL’S RUN IN RHODE ISLAND**

Our ally in the fight against corporate power, **David Segal** , has officially announced his candidacy for Congress in RI-2! He’s up against the Clinton machine, but **his momentum is starting to build**.

“**We have the people-power** to reach the voters, we have the money to compete, and we have the urgent case to make that **we deserve leaders who can bring people together and ensure their voices are heard** ,” David said. “That’s what I’ve done for 20 years, and that’s the only kind of leadership that can affect real positive change.”

[Uprise RI](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5423?t=37&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D) reports: “Segal has already earned some high profile endorsements in his bid. **Joseph Geevarghese** , the Executive Director of Our Revolution, pointed to Segal’s work building broad coalitions ‘to fight monopoly power, advance democratic reforms, and more.’”

David’s opponent, **Seth Magaziner** , a former asset manager, has $1.3M in the bank, [The Providence Journal](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5424?t=38&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D) reports, noting most of it came from the state’s political and business elite. He also seems to be very popular with his own family — raising $27,400 just from people with the last name Magaziner.

David led **Demand Progress** for a decade, and he will be a partner with us and champion for Medicare for All, the Fight for $15, A Green New Deal, criminal justice reform, and more.

[VOLUNTEER FOR DAVID](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5385?t=39&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=40&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

**CISNEROS vs CUELLAR**

The race in Texas-28 is getting heated between **Jessica Cisneros** and **Henry Cuellar** — the worst Democrat in Congress and the corrupt incumbent we must defeat.

**Our movement has catapulted Jessica to the top fundraiser among all federal candidates in Texas** — including Cuellar and Ted Cruz, [The Texan](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5425?t=41&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D) reports. But, Cuellar’s cash-on-hand sits at $1.4M, and he is running a new TV ad against Jessica.

**Our Revolution Texas** and the Cisneros team are building on years of deep organizing in Texas communities, and now it comes down to this runoff election. [Become a member](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=42&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D) of **Our Revolution** to help power this campaign!

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=43&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

Join thousands of **Our Revolution** volunteers to elect working-class fighters like **Andy Levin** , **David Segal** , **Jessica Cisneros** , and of course **Nina Turner**! We must replace the enemies of progress up and down the ballot with **working-class fighters**.

If you have just one hour a week - or two! - **you can help power these critical campaigns** as part of our [2022 Phonebank Force](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=44&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)! Our crew will be there every step of the way to help you **make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power**!

[JOIN THE FORCE!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=45&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=46&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

**JUMAANE & ANA MARÍA RELEASE CLIMATE PLAN**

Our Revolution-endorsed **Jumaane Williams** and **Ana María Archila** \- who are running for NY Governor and Lt. Governor - released their Climate Plan on Earth Day Friday.

Our Revolution NY Organizing Coordinator **Jennyfer Almanzar** joined the press conference in Brooklyn and rallied support for our climate candidates.

“Utility bills are out-of-control across NY and we are already feeling the grave impacts of climate change,” Ana María [told the crowd](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5426?t=47&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D). “**Our plan lowers utility costs and delivers a clean energy future for our state**.”

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=48&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=49&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

**Democrats must deliver for the material conditions of voters’ lives** ahead of the 2022 midterms if they want to avoid another “shellacking,” as former President Obama famously described the 2010 elections that cost the Party control of Congress.

“**Americans are being price-gouged. Inflation is hitting their bottom line, and the number one job of any politician is to raise the standard of living of their constituents** ,” Our Revolution executive director **Joseph Geevarghese** told [The Guardian](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5427?t=50&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D).

Looking to the midterms, Joseph said: “It’s already going to be very difficult to win. And then you’ve got obstructionists in the Democratic party making it harder for the president and our party to prevail.”

**The progressive agenda is deflationary and would reduce costs to the majority of people in the country**. The Biden Administration has the power and opportunity to meet the moment through executive action, and **time is ticking**.

[Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution today to help our movement be heard in this critical moment.](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=51&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=52&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

**BERNIE ON THE ROAD WITH WORKERS**

Rumors of **Bernie 2024** are circulating, but the truth is — **Our Revolution** and the progressive movement are doing the work _today_ to build the worker power we need to forge a better present and future for all of us.

One rumor is true: **This weekend, Bernie’s hitting the road!** And, we’re joining him to [rally](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5428?t=53&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D) with **Amazon Labor Union** on Sunday ahead of their 2nd election for a union at LDJ5 in Staten Island.

Then, we’ll rally with **Starbucks Workers United** Sunday evening in Richmond, Va., where they went 5 for 5 in union elections last week!

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=54&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

**Bernie lit the match and he’s still out here with us, fighting back. It takes labor power, organizers like us, and elected allies all lifting together to advance our progressive mission forward.**

This is how we build momentum. We’re taking on American oligarchs and winning key battles — but now we need to take our political revolution to the next level.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=55&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

In observance of 4/20 and the need to achieve **marijuana legalization** and **cannabis justice** in America, we’re releasing a **special edition Our Revolution sticker** to add to your collection!

Become a sustaining member of **Our Revolution** today for the _discounted price_ of just $4.20 and get this sticker with your membership. **It’s high-time for change**.

[GET YOUR STICKER!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5428?t=56&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=57&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

Monday was **Tax Day** , and **Our Revolution** joined with **Americans for Tax Fairness** in a national call to pass a Billionaires Tax. It’s time to **#TaxBillionaires**.

While working people pay income taxes on our wages in every paycheck, [ProPublica](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5429?t=58&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D) has exposed that many billionaires pay no income taxes at all on billions of dollars of investment gains.

**Even when billionaires do pay taxes, their tax rate is far below what nurses, teachers, and firefighters pay**. As folks struggle to afford groceries, healthcare and rent, billionaires are buying superyachts and going to space — there’s never been a better time for a **Billionaires Income Tax**.

Billionaires have gained $2T since the start of the pandemic, and it’s long past time for Congress and the Biden Administration to act.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=59&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

**CALLING FOR WAR POWERS RESOLUTION**

**Our Revolution** joined 68 national organizations Thursday in a call for Congress to pass the **War Powers Resolution** to end all U.S. involvement in the Saudi-led war in Yemen. Our [letter](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5430?t=60&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D) was sent to every member of Congress and covered in [Forbes](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5431?t=61&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D).

In 2019, **Bernie** and **Ro Khanna** were instrumental in passing the War Powers Act in the House and Senate — for the first time in history. Trump vetoed it then, but the Biden Administration has a chance to do differently now.

The humanitarian crisis remains desperate, and a resolution is more essential than ever to **maintain momentum for the fragile two-month truce** and **block U.S. support for any renewed hostilities**.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=62&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

**MAKING MARYLAND MORE DEMOCRATIC**

In a new op-ed in [Maryland Matters](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5432?t=63&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D), **Our Revolution Montgomery County Co-Chair Ed Fischman** argues the need to reform the state’s anti-democratic legislative appointment process — which currently leaves voters out of the equation.

Del. **Al Carr** (D) **waited until the filing deadline to withdraw** from re-election and file for a different race. “**The timing of his switch worked to ensure there would be no contest for his seat in the July 19 primary** ,” Ed explained.

**Our Revolution is calling this out because we need democracy in this system**. Now, the candidate will be _selected not elected_ by a committee Tuesday. “This worked to prevent voters from having any choice to fill the seat. A quarter of the General Assembly were first selected by committees, not voters,” Ed said.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=64&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=65&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

**Our Revolution** will host a **Virtual Fundraiser for Nina Turner** at **8pm ET** /5pm PT on Tuesday! Join us for a special evening discussing **Medicare for All** with Nina and healthcare justice advocates **Michael Lighty** , **RoseAnn DeMoro** , Dr. **Ron Birnbaum** , our very own **Anna-Marta Visky**!

[RSVP NOW](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5421?t=66&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D) — With your donation to Nina’s people-powered campaign, you’ll receive a Zoom link to this intimate organizing call.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5414?t=67&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

Don’t miss our **National ‘Organize to Win’ Broadcast** next Monday, April 25, with US Rep. **Ro Khanna**! Topics will include Taxing Billionaires and Taking on Big Oil. Sign-up to join the live Zoom call at **8:30p ET** /5:30p PT.

Then, mark your calendars for May 9th, when we’ll be joined by progressive powerhouse **Rashida Tlaib**! This is how we organize with our partners in office to fight for change.

[RSVP TODAY](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=68&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

Join thousands of **Our Revolution** volunteers to elect working-class fighters and **replace the corporate-aligned politicians** up and down the ballot.

If you have an hour or two a week, you can **power our movement** as a caller with the [2022 Phonebank Force](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=70&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)! Our crew will be there to help you **make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power**!

[We’re hitting the phones early and often — and we need YOU to SIGN UP!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=71&akid=2818%2E5885482%2EfHfZ1D)

On May 3rd, we’re holding a special **Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy** with our partners at **Free Speech for People** and lay out our campaign to bar insurrectionists from the ballot.

We’ll speak with courageous **Our Revolution** members - and their legal team - taking the fight directly to far-right extremists like **Marjorie Taylor-Greene**. And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight!

Are you a member of **Our Revolution**? For **$5 a month** , you’ll be part of choosing our candidate endorsements and crafting our platform and strategy. Plus, we’ll send you our **new 2022 Membership Card**.

To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! clean_body: | | Insider News from the Political Revolution! HEADLINES: Taking MTG to Court! | Nina vs. The Machine — Vote Now! | Rep. Levin vs. Big Money | Segal Campaign Kick-off | Cisneros vs. Cuellar | Dems Need to Deliver | Bernie Rallies w/ Amazon, Starbucks | 4/20 Sticker | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Don’t miss our next National ‘Organize to Win’ Broadcast on Monday, April 25th with congressional candidates Amy Vilela (NV-1), Summer Lee (PA-12), and Brittany Ramos DeBarros (NY-11). And — Our Revolution Board Member Larry Cohen will talk to US Rep. Ro Khanna about taxing billionaires and taking on Big Oil. Sign-up to join the live Zoom call at 8:30p ET /5:30p PT. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ TAKING MTG TO COURT US Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene was grilled under oath for three hours Friday on her role in January 6th — because of our members who stood up to file the initial challenge and one brave, patriotic veteran, Michael Rasbury working with Our Revolution. Together, we’re making history — this is the first time any of the insurrectionists in office have been cross-examined. “The outcome of this case will reverberate beyond Georgia,” wrote, referencing our other challenges, “and could be lodged against former Trump if he runs again in 2024.” As a helicopter pilot in Vietnam, Rasbury took the same oath as Rep. Greene “to protect democracy against all enemies foreign and domestic.” He said “she has flippantly ignored her oath of office and disqualified herself from the ballot.” Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator Hal Ginsberg was in the courtroom as Greene repeated she didn’t remember saying many things, including that she opposed the peaceful transfer of power to Joe Biden — right before lawyers played a video of her saying just that. Our work clearly got under the skin of Trump , who whined that our lawsuit has Greene “going through hell.” Our members are also taking on US Reps. Madison Cawthorn in NC and others who literally joined the mob on January 6th and breached the Capitol. Our Revolution members are also asking secretaries of state to investigate whether Matt Gaetz in Florida, Jim Jordan in Ohio, Doug Mastriano in Pennsylvania, and Dan Cox in Maryland should be eligible for the ballot in 2022. On May 3rd, we’re holding a special Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy with our partners at Free Speech for People. We’ll speak with the courageous Our Revolution members - and their legal team - who are taking the fight directly to these far-right extremists in office. And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight! ★ ★ ★ 2022 MEMBERSHIP DRIVE KICKOFF! To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month , we’ll throw in our sticker 6-pack , and at $15 , you’ll get the stickers and a poster , too. For $27 , get both and a tote bag , or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. As committed Movement Builders , we know the real reward is taking action to make a better world , but we want to share these fun items as a way of thanks. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ NINA + THE PEOPLE vs THE MACHINE Billionaires, Big Oil and Big Pharma are pouring BIG money into the Ohio-11 race trying to buy the seat again and block Nina from Congress — but Our Revolution and Team Turner are one step ahead! The SuperPAC, Democratic Majority For Israel , has kicked off an aggressive campaign with ads and mailers smearing Nina as anti-semitic, the Jewish independent outlet reports. DMFI spent $1.9M against her in August, and now, according to , oil mogul Stacy Schusterman gave the SuperPAC another $2M to try to crush Nina, a leading proponent of a Green New Deal, and promote her opponent Shontel Brown, who has declined to co-sponsor the Climate Emergency Act. Meanwhile, Nina continues to build trust and relationships with Jewish residents across the district, and our volunteers have been on the ground connecting with voters and raising grassroots funding to combat the lies. Marty Gelfand , a former South Euclid councilman, called the attacks against Turner “lashon hara,” or “evil speech” in Hebrew, a grave sin under Jewish law. “These kinds of attacks have an effect ,” he said. Gelfand is hopeful given the different terrain in the primary compared to the special election in August — when Nina’s race was alone on the ballot and around 8,000 Republicans voted for Brown , nearly double her winning margin. Now, there are GOP races on the ballot, and new district lines include all of Cleveland, where Nina won by 10 points. “We’ve got to be disciplined, more agile and never underestimate the other side. We’ve got to know they’re going to fight dirty,” Nina told Maximilian Alvarez of . “We need to bump back against these forces with similar force.” “We gotta coalesce, find those issues we have in common, find those candidates who will fight for them, and then fight like hell to get them elected and get change,” she said. “This is about having allies in activist groups , not just in the realm of electoral politics — that’s what Our Revolution is doing right now.” With early voting underway and just over a week left to vote , we’re going all out to bring home this win. “The energy on the ground is palpable! ” Nina told us. “The primary is May 3rd — now is the time to maximize our efforts together.” SPECIAL EVENT TO FUND NINA’S RUN! Our Revolution will host a Virtual Fundraiser for Nina Turner at 8pm ET /5pm PT on Tuesday! Join us for a special evening discussing Medicare for All with Nina and other leading healthcare justice advocates. Joined by Michael Lighty , RoseAnn DeMoro and Dr. Ron Birnbaum , Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator Anna-Marta Visky will talk about our work to pass Medicare for All resolutions in cities and states across the country. With a donation, you’ll receive a Zoom link to this intimate organizing call. “We’re not taking a DIME from special interests or corrupt Super PACs , which means we’re counting on supporters like you to ensure we have the resources to run and win,” Nina said. “If you can’t donate, that’s okay! You’re needed in this fight.” ★ ★ ★ ANDY LEVIN vs BIG MONEY DMFI and AIPAC are also pouring money into the race for Michigan’s 11th, backing conservative Dem Haley Stevens against one of our strongest working class fighters in Congress - US. Rep. Andy Levin. But Andy has our movement. said he has the backing of a group “that the most unapologetic progressives in Congress seek out: Our Revolution.” AIPAC is backing 37 Republicans who refused to certify Biden’s election and has now moved $300,000 to Stevens, who says she “went to a predominantly Jewish summer camp.” Andy, who is Jewish, says: “The path to a secure, peaceful future for a democratic homeland for my people requires the political and human rights of Palestinians.” Despite being portrayed as the most “loyal” to the party establishment, both Haley Stevens and Shontel Brown are now being rewarded by dark money groups for opposing President Biden’s plan Iran Nuclear Deal. Voters who want to see government work for their lives and serve their interests should vote for Andy. “This is about working people having power and prosperity ,” he said. “I’m a co-sponsor of Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. I’m the union organizer in the Congress , and I authored the resolution to allow our own staff to unionize.” We can’t let big money back us down in these critical races across the country. ★ ★ ★ SEGAL’S RUN IN RHODE ISLAND Our ally in the fight against corporate power, David Segal , has officially announced his candidacy for Congress in RI-2! He’s up against the Clinton machine, but his momentum is starting to build. “We have the people-power to reach the voters, we have the money to compete, and we have the urgent case to make that we deserve leaders who can bring people together and ensure their voices are heard ,” David said. “That’s what I’ve done for 20 years, and that’s the only kind of leadership that can affect real positive change.” reports: “Segal has already earned some high profile endorsements in his bid. Joseph Geevarghese , the Executive Director of Our Revolution, pointed to Segal’s work building broad coalitions ‘to fight monopoly power, advance democratic reforms, and more.’” David’s opponent, Seth Magaziner , a former asset manager, has $1.3M in the bank, reports, noting most of it came from the state’s political and business elite. He also seems to be very popular with his own family — raising $27,400 just from people with the last name Magaziner. David led Demand Progress for a decade, and he will be a partner with us and champion for Medicare for All, the Fight for $15, A Green New Deal, criminal justice reform, and more. ★ ★ ★ CISNEROS vs CUELLAR The race in Texas-28 is getting heated between Jessica Cisneros and Henry Cuellar — the worst Democrat in Congress and the corrupt incumbent we must defeat. Our movement has catapulted Jessica to the top fundraiser among all federal candidates in Texas — including Cuellar and Ted Cruz, reports. But, Cuellar’s cash-on-hand sits at $1.4M, and he is running a new TV ad against Jessica. Our Revolution Texas and the Cisneros team are building on years of deep organizing in Texas communities, and now it comes down to this runoff election. of Our Revolution to help power this campaign! ★ ★ ★ Join thousands of Our Revolution volunteers to elect working-class fighters like Andy Levin , David Segal , Jessica Cisneros , and of course Nina Turner! We must replace the enemies of progress up and down the ballot with working-class fighters. If you have just one hour a week - or two! - you can help power these critical campaigns as part of our ! Our crew will be there every step of the way to help you make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power! ★ ★ ★ JUMAANE & ANA MARÍA RELEASE CLIMATE PLAN Our Revolution-endorsed Jumaane Williams and Ana María Archila \- who are running for NY Governor and Lt. Governor - released their Climate Plan on Earth Day Friday. Our Revolution NY Organizing Coordinator Jennyfer Almanzar joined the press conference in Brooklyn and rallied support for our climate candidates. “Utility bills are out-of-control across NY and we are already feeling the grave impacts of climate change,” Ana María . “Our plan lowers utility costs and delivers a clean energy future for our state.” ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Democrats must deliver for the material conditions of voters’ lives ahead of the 2022 midterms if they want to avoid another “shellacking,” as former President Obama famously described the 2010 elections that cost the Party control of Congress. “Americans are being price-gouged. Inflation is hitting their bottom line, and the number one job of any politician is to raise the standard of living of their constituents ,” Our Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese told . Looking to the midterms, Joseph said: “It’s already going to be very difficult to win. And then you’ve got obstructionists in the Democratic party making it harder for the president and our party to prevail.” The progressive agenda is deflationary and would reduce costs to the majority of people in the country. The Biden Administration has the power and opportunity to meet the moment through executive action, and time is ticking. ★ ★ ★ BERNIE ON THE ROAD WITH WORKERS Rumors of Bernie 2024 are circulating, but the truth is — Our Revolution and the progressive movement are doing the work today to build the worker power we need to forge a better present and future for all of us. One rumor is true: This weekend, Bernie’s hitting the road! And, we’re joining him to with Amazon Labor Union on Sunday ahead of their 2nd election for a union at LDJ5 in Staten Island. Then, we’ll rally with Starbucks Workers United Sunday evening in Richmond, Va., where they went 5 for 5 in union elections last week! Bernie lit the match and he’s still out here with us, fighting back. It takes labor power, organizers like us, and elected allies all lifting together to advance our progressive mission forward. This is how we build momentum. We’re taking on American oligarchs and winning key battles — but now we need to take our political revolution to the next level. ★ ★ ★ In observance of 4/20 and the need to achieve marijuana legalization and cannabis justice in America, we’re releasing a special edition Our Revolution sticker to add to your collection! Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution today for the discounted price of just $4.20 and get this sticker with your membership. It’s high-time for change. ★ ★ ★ Monday was Tax Day , and Our Revolution joined with Americans for Tax Fairness in a national call to pass a Billionaires Tax. It’s time to #TaxBillionaires. While working people pay income taxes on our wages in every paycheck, has exposed that many billionaires pay no income taxes at all on billions of dollars of investment gains. Even when billionaires do pay taxes, their tax rate is far below what nurses, teachers, and firefighters pay. As folks struggle to afford groceries, healthcare and rent, billionaires are buying superyachts and going to space — there’s never been a better time for a Billionaires Income Tax. Billionaires have gained $2T since the start of the pandemic, and it’s long past time for Congress and the Biden Administration to act. ★ ★ ★ CALLING FOR WAR POWERS RESOLUTION Our Revolution joined 68 national organizations Thursday in a call for Congress to pass the War Powers Resolution to end all U.S. involvement in the Saudi-led war in Yemen. Our was sent to every member of Congress and covered in . In 2019, Bernie and Ro Khanna were instrumental in passing the War Powers Act in the House and Senate — for the first time in history. Trump vetoed it then, but the Biden Administration has a chance to do differently now. The humanitarian crisis remains desperate, and a resolution is more essential than ever to maintain momentum for the fragile two-month truce and block U.S. support for any renewed hostilities. ★ ★ ★ MAKING MARYLAND MORE DEMOCRATIC In a new op-ed in , Our Revolution Montgomery County Co-Chair Ed Fischman argues the need to reform the state’s anti-democratic legislative appointment process — which currently leaves voters out of the equation. Del. Al Carr (D) waited until the filing deadline to withdraw from re-election and file for a different race. “The timing of his switch worked to ensure there would be no contest for his seat in the July 19 primary ,” Ed explained. Our Revolution is calling this out because we need democracy in this system. Now, the candidate will be selected not elected by a committee Tuesday. “This worked to prevent voters from having any choice to fill the seat. A quarter of the General Assembly were first selected by committees, not voters,” Ed said. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution will host a Virtual Fundraiser for Nina Turner at 8pm ET /5pm PT on Tuesday! The Midterm Election will be one of our biggest battles of the year.

**Political experts have warned us that our Democratic House Majority is at risk this Midterm Election season.**

And one of the ways to prepare for whatever Republicans throw our way, we must know what folks in PA thoughts are to inform our Midterm Election strategy.

Our survey team told us that input from Pennsylvania Democrats is crucial, so we need at least a 95.98% response rate from Cresco to conclude our data. The survey is just 12 questions long and takes less than 3 minutes to complete.

body:
Arizona has become ground zero for the GOP's attacks on our freedom
| | |
---
Friend, from the new 15-week abortion ban to an assault on voting rights, Arizona has become ground zero for the GOP's attacks on our freedom. The only way we can be _sure_ to defeat these extremists is by electing a Democratic governor in November – and that's exactly what our movement is about.
I know we _can_ win this race, flip Arizona blue and finally end the era of failed GOP leadership led by extremists like our Trump-backed opponent, Kari Lake (R). **Arizona delivered Joe Biden the presidency and helped flip the Senate blue – but we _still_ have a Republican governor. This is the year to change that, but I need your help.**
**I asked my team to pull a list of our top supporters – those with the valuable insights we need to win this race – and you were at the top of the list, friend.** **Your input is absolutely critical to our strategy, and I need to hear directly from _you_. **
**[So please, will you take just 60 seconds now to complete our Campaign Strategy Survey? We need your input to craft a winning plan to flip Arizona blue and defeat GOP extremism – but we can only keep this survey open until midnight, so don't delay.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44479029/341777455/-593296007?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk624-su-nd&refcode=jtk624-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODhjYjAwMC01ZWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=StJCfX70NqCAqiJifxfQoKYVrD8cdHAlWr8EH7FXcAA=&emci=3bd10504-f8c0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e88cb000-5ec3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6085109)**

clean_body: endorse my campaign for Senate | | | Thanks to your grassroots support, my campaign to flip Florida blue has reached historic heights. But the GOP’s multimillion-dollar backers are determined to buy this Senate seat, and we urgently need to show the strength of our grassroots movement. That's why, with Election Day quickly approaching, I'm asking you to personally endorse my campaign for Senate. I’m counting on at least 1,000 members of this incredibly powerful team of grassroots supporters to take a moment now to officially add their names. TEAM MEMBER: dpwillis67@gmail.com ENDORSEMENT: SUBMISSION PENDING DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m. tonight In my decades of public service, I’ve never tired in my fight to do good. From my time as a law enforcement officer to serving as your congresswoman, I’ve never relented in my fight to protect and serve Florida’s working families. Now, I'm ready to continue my hard work in the Senate. But Florida’s last Senate race was won by just 0.12% of the vote, making it the closest Senate race in the nation – and with Rubio and I neck and neck in the polls, this race is shaping up to be just as close. That means that every single endorsement that I receive between now and midnight WILL make a difference. Friend, together, we CAN win this race and flip Florida blue. Right now, Rubio is more vulnerable than ever before – and I'm gaining ground. But I need to build up my grassroots team if I have any chance of competing against the GOP dark-money machine dumping millions into Florida. | | Thank you, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. Fellow American,

Had voters in Georgia realized how liberal Raphael Warnock's voting record would be in the U.S. Senate, I firmly believe that he wouldn't be there today.

My name is Scott Paradise, and I'm Herschel Walker's campaign manager. I'm reaching out today to ask that you join us in helping defeat Senator Warnock this November.

Here are four alarming reasons to invest in this race:
1. Our opponent favors canceling more than $1.6 trillion in student debt, which is another way of saying taxpayers will pay the bill.
2. He voted in favor of nuking the Senate filibuster so legislation can be rammed through on a party-line basis.
3. While watching gas prices soar, he voted four times (!) against the Keystone XL Pipeline.
4. He has voted for trillions in government spending that has contributed to record inflation.

And a bonus 5th reason why we need you to invest today: _**Senator Warnock has become a celebrity in Democrat politics and Hollywood circles, raising more than $110k online EVERY SINGLE DAY. That's $68 every minute.**_

In fact, our opponent raised more money in the first three months of this year than any Senate candidate in history has raised in the first quarter of an election year!

**We're going up against a money machine the likes of which no one has ever seen before.** We need your immediate help. For every day that we get outraised, it becomes easier for our opponent to mislead the voters and win this critical battleground seat again.

In the minute it has taken you to read this far, our opponent has already raised another $68 online.

We're counting on your generosity. Without your support, we will continue to get outraised and miss important fundraising goals.

But with your help, I know we will win in Georgia, flip control of the Senate, and stop the Biden-Warnock agenda in its tracks!

Thanks,

Scott Paradise
Campaign Manager,
Herschel Walker for Senate

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: onslaught
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
With Cheri as Democrats’ presumptive nominee, it is no longer a question of if Republican super PACs are going to attack us but when.
#

$3.
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today Here’s why:
With Cheri as Democrats’ presumptive nominee, it is no longer a question of _if_ Republican super PACs are going to attack us but _when._
This is one of the closest, most competitive Senate races in the country, and our opponents will stop at nothing to win.
One far-right super PAC is already spending $14 million to prop up Ted Budd’s campaign just in the Republican primary, and the GOP’s Senate Leadership Fund just bought $27 million in TV ads to try to buy this seat for whichever Republican wins the primary.
And these are only initial investments. Just imagine what Mitch McConnell and these super PACs are willing to spend before Election Day attacking us.
Our campaign is going to face an onslaught of millions of dollars of false attack ads. So we need to fight back and make sure we have the resources to get Cheri’s message in front of voters.
[**Please donate $3 or any amount you can today. Our official pre-primary FEC deadline is 4 days away, and we need as many donations as possible before then to prove we can compete with the corporate and dark money heading our way.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220423-1-t1&refcode2=757.357359.8Mm87-&t=1&akid=757%2E357359%2E8Mm87-)

name: Matt West
subject: Let's save the planet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
| Friend, Did you see my selfie video yesterday for Earth Day? I’m so grateful to live near some of the most gorgeous natural beauty our planet has to offer. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44477023/341766979/545817131?s=20&t=9zsyUhAHjvnMps2tz5lYIw&refcode=ea.f1b700f2-40c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.f1b700f2-40c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI3MDBmMi00MGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rs-82CEiGgKTTSiGx3dfloyo2DmwuMKBitKk_dBakDA=&emci=6c623efc-36c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f1b700f2-40c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5643049) _**[We won’t save the planet without people like me in government who understand how renewable energy technology works. That’s why I’m calling upon pro-science Americans like you, friend, to donate $8 to help me get the job done.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44477024/341766980/2035722763?refcode=em_MW_earthdayselfie_042322&amount=8&ms=ea.f1b700f2-40c3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI3MDBmMi00MGMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rs-82CEiGgKTTSiGx3dfloyo2DmwuMKBitKk_dBakDA=)**_ Stopping the climate crisis and saving the planet is my top priority. That’s why I’m fighting for a **Green New Deal** that will:
* End subsidies to fossil fuel companies
* Invest in and weatherize our crumbling infrastructure
* Ensure all Americans have access to clean water, air, and nature

I’m going to keep fighting for climate action in everything I do. _**[Join my campaign body:
I’ll cut to the chase, folks – Republicans only need to win SEVEN seats to retake our Majority. Our democracy is on the line.

The midterms are less than 7 months away and Democrats are at serious risk of being outraised by Republicans’ RECORD-SHATTERING fundraising hauls again. As you read this, they’re raking in millions to unseat Democrats and take back the Majority. Worst of all, they’re plotting with former President Trump to take back the House so that he can launch another bid for the White House.

I need your immediate help – can you rush a donation to House Majority PAC so that Democrats have the resources they need to fight back?

DONATE NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-pelosi-outraised0222?&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=20220423_em_f_4CT_nd

name: Ed Humphreys
subject: Reminder: Ed's Thoughts on Debates
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
## April 21, 2022
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# Ed's Thoughts on Debates
---
| | |
Who needs debates in a time where 30-second advertisements funded by multinational corporations will suffice? Yes, it's true, the Governor and Lt. Governor refused to participate in the debates. Three of us were invited by the Idaho Debate Commission to participate in the long-standing and cherished tradition. Unfortunately, both of my opponents retreated from the free exchange of ideas. This is a dangerous trend for Idaho.
If we allow candidates to avoid constituents and opponents, then the domination of giant corporations over government will be complete. We're swamped by political theater manufactured by master manipulators. Nothing seems real anymore. There is a constant barrage of advertisements making candidates look competent and "Conservative" (without them ever defining that word). It's just easier to do it that way. Special interest groups do not like preparing their chosen candidates for the debate stage because it's one environment where candidates' artificially polished image is at risk.
However, Idahoans deserve to witness the contest of ideas. It's through that contest where ideas are improved. Competing visions give Idahoans a glimpse into what our future can be. It's a time to aspire to greater heights. Sure, it's also a time where we can look back on where we've been and openly discuss how we could have done better. Anyone who claims they are motivated for Idahoans best interest should celebrate that, not condemn it!
Sadly, we see how these elections have turned into nothing more than career politicians perpetuating their political careers. Idaho is at a fork in the road. The future of our state is a discussion worth having. I call on my opponents to consider the best interest of our state. If you care about Idaho, you should care about participating in the electoral process in a more meaningful way than only pushing 30-second ads funded by special interest groups.
-Ed Humphreys

|

It's a time to aspire to greater heights. Sure, it's also a time where we can look back on where we've been and openly discuss how we could have done better. Anyone who claims they are motivated for Idahoans best interest should celebrate that, not condemn it! Sadly, we see how these elections have turned into nothing more than career politicians perpetuating their political careers. Idaho is at a fork in the road. The future of our state is a discussion worth having. I call on my opponents to consider the best interest of our state. If you care about Idaho, you should care about participating in the electoral process in a more meaningful way than only pushing 30-second ads funded by special interest groups. -Ed Humphreys | | If you want a governor bold enough to speak the truth, then donate now! | == | | | | == | Ed Humphreys == P.O. Box 1667 Eagle, ID 83616 | == Stay Social! == == == | | | | | | | Humphreys for Governor | PO box 1667, Eagle, ID 83616 | | Sent by mailto:info@edforidaho.com in collaboration with

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Republicans are targeting Illinois, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We can’t take this race for granted.
#
If you haven’t seen the news, this is serious, Peter.
According to new reports, Republicans feel emboldened about their odds and are expanding their targets for 2022.
That includes Illinois, where Republicans and Trump loyalists have set their sights on Democratic Congressman Bill Foster.
The last thing Illinois needs is another yes-man for the GOP’s extreme agenda.
**[With so much on the line, we have to defend this seat – and that means staying ahead of the Republicans pouring money into this race. Will you split a $5 contribution right now to Bill Foster’s campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44477344/341768928/212297058?refcode=dd_em_220423_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzA1ODU1Yy00N2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H4rzzXuyGlkbVn7wFUX530TxSlEhbLqwlnmtyqHoFPw=)**
Bill has been a powerful advocate for Illinoisans and an important voice in the House.
He’s already led the charge in helping Illinois secure the funding it needed to build back from the COVID-19 pandemic, but with so much still left to do, we can’t afford to lose this seat.
From immigration reform and capping the cost of prescription drugs, to lowering health care costs and passing bold climate action, I need allies in the House to make this legislation possible. Bill is one of those people.
With only six flipped seats standing between us and the Republicans taking back control of the House, we have no room for error.
**[Please, join me and split a $5 contribution now to help protect our majority and keep Illinois blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44477345/341768929/212297058?refcode=dd_em_220423_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzA1ODU1Yy00N2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H4rzzXuyGlkbVn7wFUX530TxSlEhbLqwlnmtyqHoFPw=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44477346/341768930/212297058?refcode=dd_em_220423_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzA1ODU1Yy00N2MzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H4rzzXuyGlkbVn7wFUX530TxSlEhbLqwlnmtyqHoFPw=)****

Bill is one of those people. With only six flipped seats standing between us and the Republicans taking back control of the House, we have no room for error. = My best, Dick Durbin **= Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

It’s important: [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount We’re building a people-powered grassroots team strong enough to flip Ohio blue and expand the Democratic Senate majority. But the truth is, Trump’s visit could change everything. Trump knows Ohio will decide Senate control. He even called Tim a “stronger candidate” than Republicans realize. That’s why he’s making us a top target and doing whatever it takes to stop our momentum. The only way we’ll be able to fight off his attacks and hold our ground in this competitive race, is if we raise $100,000 before Trump’s rally. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-apr2022?refcode=04182022 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-apr2022?refcode=04182022]
Derek,
We’ll get straight to the point: our first mailers are in mailboxes across PA-17 this week, and we need your help to keep this early momentum going. It’s important that we communicate with as many voters who have requested a mail ballot as possible, so they know that there is a clear choice in this race.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92543/images/Endorsement%20Graphics%20421.png]
Chris is proud to have unified the Democratic party, won overwhelming support from labor unions and working families, and built a coalition of moderates and progressives together ready to take on the radical right.
But we need your support to keep communicating with early voters through election day. Can you chip in to keep our early momentum going?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-apr2022?refcode=04232022&express_lane=true&amount=10]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-apr2022?refcode=04232022&express_lane=true&amount=25]

Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-apr2022?refcode=04232022]
We are less than one month out from Election Day - and can’t thank you enough for your continued support. We couldn’t do it without you.
Team Deluzio
Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. Please chip in to help Chris build a strong campaign that can win against the Republican machine. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-apr2022?refcode=04232022]

name: Chuck Morse
subject: The best parts of our state.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTM1MDMyMjA1NjA0NTU5MzI5JmM9azdpNiZlPTAmYj05NjA1NzkyNDAmZD1xMmw2aTVr.PtsXo9Vgsv_htW5BcJxId5mpOpijUPbbVvHbAZcSbfs)
| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTM1MDMyMjA1NjA0NTU5MzI5JmM9azdpNiZlPTAmYj05NjA1NzkyNDQmZD1iM3E1dTRp.IQUhJa14l7WytG4lKobh5zC80ZIMPd0UGYuK45YuHVk)
---
| | | Friend, The same ideals that make New Hampshire such a great state are also what I believe make me a great candidate for the U.S. Senate. _I’m not a spoon-fed, Ivy League lawyer like Maggie Hassan - I grew up in a low-income family, started a lawn care business out of the back of my mother’s old Malibu, started the small business I own now with nothing but a lot of debt and a dream, and gave back to my community the very first chance I got._ While this path may seem foreign to the D.C. crowd, it’s not unfamiliar to us here in the ‘Live Free or Die’ Granite State... [**_So here’s to making sure the folks we elect to represent us in our nation’s capital embody the BEST parts of New Hampshire - not the WORST parts of Washington!_**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTM1MDMyMjA1NjA0NTU5MzI5JmM9azdpNiZlPTAmYj05NjA1NzkyNDkmZD1qMGIwbDh1.NuPN2oZ1vvGTwIoRKyMigLFKe3lFyVTozaJpRxkWpKs)****

---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTM1MDMyMjA1NjA0NTU5MzI5JmM9azdpNiZlPTAmYj05NjA1NzkyNTUmZD1lNWc4ZzJk.1wzRbCZf5RGagXt8w_p5QfstzBDjKoNN7MaPVgNwNVw)

| |
---
| | [WANT THESE VALUES IN DC? CLICK HERE!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTM1MDMyMjA1NjA0NTU5MzI5JmM9azdpNiZlPTAmYj05NjA1NzkyNTkmZD1wN2MxazFl.BXngtbQ9dy8nHomc5xSEHU7__lKWPLKHhF1cL5Jl6HY)
---
---
| |
---
| Washington's Maggie Hassan may be towing the party line inside the beltway right now - choosing to speak out against Biden rescinding Title 42 only **_AFTER_** he ripped a new whole in our Southern Border, or choosing to speak out against gas prices only **_AFTER_** they reached record highs... _But me?_ I’m focused on delivering for the state that has instilled in me our New Hampshire values of a hard work ethic, commitment to family, and sense of community. When I’m not taking the first phone calls of my day while driving a tractor at my business, I’m helping pass a Property Tax Relief Package that sends over $100 Million to municipalities across New Hampshire. [And with your support](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTM1MDMyMjA1NjA0NTU5MzI5JmM9azdpNiZlPTAmYj05NjA1NzkyNjEmZD1wN3A0aDZx.1jC32vBbq4vqIXgKGmesuUaw1SJ8ELLttYR9p32NDyo), that drive and determination to serve Granite Staters - _not D.C. party bosses_ \- can be what we get from a U.S. Senator in 2022. **Let’s bring New Hampshire values to a place that needs them now more than ever.** Support the Mission. name: Letitia James
subject: Why I fell in love with New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Peter, I wanted to take a moment to explain why being your attorney general means so much to me.
When I was a young girl growing up in Park Slope, Brooklyn, I fell in love with New York City. I loved playing with the other children of the neighborhood, running through open fire hydrants and laughing away hot summer days. All of us had different skin tones – we were Italian, Irish, and African American – but none of that mattered to us. We were New Yorkers first.
From kindergarten in Brooklyn to college at Lehman College in the Bronx, I learned everything I needed to know from the New York City public school system. By the time I was ready to graduate and move out of the New York City for the first time, I knew that the city would always be my home.
Moving to Albany to work for the legislature taught me even more about my state. I learned that the issues families outside New York City faced were the very same issues that families like my own encountered in Brooklyn. **Despite the distance, we were all New Yorkers striving for a better life.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44478217/341773949/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk443-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmI0MTg3MS01MWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cy7flVgBtouQZTac8rUnHD515gvaYJCMjDNl9yCFgwk=)
Running for public office was always something that I had considered, but when I returned to Brooklyn, my neighbors convinced me to run for the city council and helped organize my campaign. Without the unwavering support of my neighbors, friends, and New Yorkers across the state who believed in me, I might not have ever run for office.
Becoming your attorney general has given me the chance to travel to every corner of our beautiful state and get to know people who are truly fearless and passionate. It’s allowed me to fall in love with this state and its people more than I ever thought possible. It’s allowed me to see the beauty, the challenge, and the opportunity of our great state.
**Peter, in a lot of ways, this re-election campaign is a love letter to New York.** It’s about celebrating our diverse communities and the unyielding determination I’ve seen in every New Yorker I’ve met. It’s about ensuring that all people, from Manhattan to Niagara Falls, have the resources they need to live a good life.

**[If you love New York as much as I do and want to join me in this fight, please, donate $5 or more now to help me continue my work as your attorney general and defeat my GOP opponent. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44478218/341773950/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk443-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmI0MTg3MS01MWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cy7flVgBtouQZTac8rUnHD515gvaYJCMjDNl9yCFgwk=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44478219/341773951/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk443-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmI0MTg3MS01MWMzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cy7flVgBtouQZTac8rUnHD515gvaYJCMjDNl9yCFgwk=)
---
Thank you for believing in a better New York with me.

Letitia

When I was a young girl growing up in Park Slope, Brooklyn, I fell in love with New York City. I loved playing with the other children of the neighborhood, running through open fire hydrants and laughing away hot summer days. All of us had different skin tones – we were Italian, Irish, and African American – but none of that mattered to us. We were New Yorkers first. From kindergarten in Brooklyn to college at Lehman College in the Bronx, I learned everything I needed to know from the New York City public school system. By the time I was ready to graduate and move out of the New York City for the first time, I knew that the city would always be my home. Moving to Albany to work for the legislature taught me even more about my state. I learned that the issues families outside New York City faced were the very same issues that families like my own encountered in Brooklyn. Despite the distance, we were all New Yorkers striving for a better life. = Running for public office was always something that I had considered, but when I returned to Brooklyn, my neighbors convinced me to run for the city council and helped organize my campaign. Without the unwavering support of my neighbors, friends, and New Yorkers across the state who believed in me, I might not have ever run for office. Becoming your attorney general has given me the chance to travel to every corner of our beautiful state and get to know people who are truly fearless and passionate. It’s allowed me to fall in love with this state and its people more than I ever thought possible. It’s allowed me to see the beauty, the challenge, and the opportunity of our great state. Peter, in a lot of ways, this re-election campaign is a love letter to New York. It’s about celebrating our diverse communities and the unyielding determination I’ve seen in every New Yorker I’ve met. It’s about ensuring that all people, from Manhattan to Niagara Falls, have the resources they need to live a good life. = | | = Thank you for believing in a better New York with me. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY P.O. Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

subject: Rebekah calls for Gaetz' expulsion after Jan. 6 breaking news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebekah Jones Campaign
body:
Rebekah responds to breaking news of Matt Gaetz Jan. 6 involvment | Posted by Rebekah Jones, 2 min | STATEMENT FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Recap:
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/4dO1OYxUV/c?w=TIS0C2FhoB3ckxPYguDdhGwe_5658E8E2Z73mRIkb6Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3NvLzRkTzFPWXhVVj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | New Blog Post
---
| | |
---
| | Rebekah responds to breaking news of Matt Gaetz Jan. 6 involvment
---
| | Posted by Rebekah Jones, 2 min
---
| | STATEMENT FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Recap: [Evidence](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/4dO1OYxUV/c?w=-mfMF9plg0szg7tV4P-wXZ2VwCuo3gZ3ZOVHbTgJ_jY.) filed in federal court late last night revealed Congressman Matt Gaetz (R-FL) met with then-White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows on December 21, 2020, as they and others conspired to steal the election from President Joe Biden. Statement:Throughout the last 16 months, America watched members of Congress, including Matt Gaetz, gaslight the American people about what happened on January 6, 2021, calling it an "average day," manufacturing vast conspiracies, and lying to the nation about their roles in the attacks. During a January 6, 2021 press conference marking the one-year anniversary of the failed coup, Gaetz and accomplice Marjorie Taylor Greene decided not to memorialize those who lost their lives, including capitol police officers, but to promote conspiracies about secret federal agents who maliciously planned the entire day (no evidence suggests anything remotely close to this occurred). I [responded](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/4dO1OYxUV/c?w=JHVWS9GjVh0ZOR-BkQ_D0TYhCVK9SmHRy0V7DKks3RM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3Bvc3QvcmViZWthaC1qb25lcy1yZXNwb25kcy10by1nYWV0ei1jb25zcGlyYWN5LWxhZGVuLXByZXNzLWNvbmZlcmVuY2UiLCJyIjoiM2E0NjAxNWYtYTA1YS00YTE4LThhYzItYzUyOThjZjEwYWMyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0) quickly. Now, [new evidence](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/4dO1OYxUV/c?w=-mfMF9plg0szg7tV4P-wXZ2VwCuo3gZ3ZOVHbTgJ_jY.) reveals the depth of Gaetz' involvement planning the attacks, including a December 21, 2020 meeting with Meadows, Greene and others, where they plotted ways to steal the election from President Joe Biden and from the American people. Such a coordinated effort by members of Congress must not be tolerated, and I call for their immediate expulsion from Congress for aiding terrorism against the United States of America. Gaetz and those like him not only pose a threat to our democratic institutions, but to the very foundation of a nation built on the idea that every citizen has an equal voice through their right to vote. He tried to rig and then steal an election, and encouraged violence when all other attempts failed. Matt Gaetz' continued and varied controversies, from sex trafficking minors and drunk driving to aiding an insurrection, provide a stark contrast to the reputation I have built as someone who is fair, truthful, and will defend the people no matter the cost. I've had a gun pointed to my head for standing my moral ground; Gaetz conspired to put a gun to America's head because they chose Joe Biden. My decision saved lives; Gaetz' got Americans killed and destroyed families. As the presumptive Democratic nominee in Florida's First District, I want to assure everyone in my community that I will uphold the duties of our constitution while I serve in Congress. No amount of pressure - whether from lobbyists, foreign governments or my own party - will ever compromise my integrity or commitment to the American people. clean_body: Rebekah responds to breaking news of Matt Gaetz Jan. 6 involvment | Posted by Rebekah Jones, 2 min | STATEMENT FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Recap: | | Can't see this message? | | | | | New Blog Post | | | | | Rebekah responds to breaking news of Matt Gaetz Jan. 6 involvment | | Posted by Rebekah Jones, 2 min | | STATEMENT FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Recap: filed in federal court late last night revealed Congressman Matt Gaetz (R-FL) met with then-White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows on December 21, 2020, as they and others conspired to steal the election from President Joe Biden. Statement:Throughout the last 16 months, America watched members of Congress, including Matt Gaetz, gaslight the American people about what happened on January 6, 2021, calling it an "average day," manufacturing vast conspiracies, and lying to the nation about their roles in the attacks. During a January 6, 2021 press conference marking the one-year anniversary of the failed coup, Gaetz and accomplice Marjorie Taylor Greene decided not to memorialize those who lost their lives, including capitol police officers, but to promote conspiracies about secret federal agents who maliciously planned the entire day (no evidence suggests anything remotely close to this occurred). I quickly. Now, reveals the depth of Gaetz' involvement planning the attacks, including a December 21, 2020 meeting with Meadows, Greene and others, where they plotted ways to steal the election from President Joe Biden and from the American people. Such a coordinated effort by members of Congress must not be tolerated, and I call for their immediate expulsion from Congress for aiding terrorism against the United States of America. Gaetz and those like him not only pose a threat to our democratic institutions, but to the very foundation of a nation built on the idea that every citizen has an equal voice through their right to vote. He tried to rig and then steal an election, and encouraged violence when all other attempts failed. Matt Gaetz' continued and varied controversies, from sex trafficking minors and drunk driving to aiding an insurrection, provide a stark contrast to the reputation I have built as someone who is fair, truthful, and will defend the people no matter the cost. I've had a gun pointed to my head for standing my moral ground; Gaetz conspired to put a gun to America's head because they chose Joe Biden. My decision saved lives; Gaetz' got Americans killed and destroyed families. As the presumptive Democratic nominee in Florida's First District, I want to assure everyone in my community that I will uphold the duties of our constitution while I serve in Congress. No amount of pressure - whether from lobbyists, foreign governments or my own party - will ever compromise my integrity or commitment to the American people. Trump has already been handpicking ultra-conservative candidates in battleground Senate races and hauling in millions of dollars to oppose Democrats across the country. Now, he's going state by state to defeat vulnerable candidates.

**We could be at SERIOUS risk of losing the Senate majority that President Biden’s agenda depends on!**

Senate Democrats are directly in the path of Trump’s right-wing money machine, and grassroots supporters like you are our only chance to stop him. **But right now we're falling BEHIND our $250,000 end-of-month goal to counter Trump and save the Senate!**

subject: Your Voting Rights Advisory Board Interview >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
you’ve been hand-selected:
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=1912%2E878179%2ELDur1J)._
---
We’re reaching out to you as a top **Democrat in your state** to hear YOUR thoughts on which races we should prioritize, which candidates to support, and what issues folks like YOU care most about. **You’ve been hand-selected for our Voting Rights Advisory Board interview – and we need your input ASAP!** [**PLEASE, participate in our 90-second interview to SAVE Voting Rights »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Senior_Advisory_Board_Survey_copy/?source=VPP_20220423_EMSURV_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=1912%2E878179%2ELDur1J) | [TAKE 90-SECONDS TO COMPLETE YOUR INTERVIEW →](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Senior_Advisory_Board_Survey_copy/?source=VPP_20220423_EMSURV_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=1912%2E878179%2ELDur1J)
---
**Voting Rights Advisory Board Interview** **[FORM #: 878179]**
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Senior_Advisory_Board_Survey_copy/?source=VPP_20220423_EMSURV_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=1912%2E878179%2ELDur1J)
REGISTERED TO:**YOU** STATUS AS OF 04/23: *** INCOMPLETE *** | [TAKE 90-SECONDS TO COMPLETE YOUR INTERVIEW →](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Senior_Advisory_Board_Survey_copy/?source=VPP_20220423_EMSURV_E4_T0_AC&t=10&akid=1912%2E878179%2ELDur1J)
---
This is the most consequential year in the history of our democracy – **_if the GOP wins and erases our voting rights, it’ll be the end of democracy as we know it._**
So we’re inviting our most trusted supporters (especially YOU!) to take part in our [**Voting Rights Advisory Board**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Senior_Advisory_Board_Survey_copy/?source=VPP_20220423_EMSURV_E4_T0_AC&t=11&akid=1912%2E878179%2ELDur1J) interviews to help us form a winning midterm strategy.
**And we don’t take your responses lightly:**
✅ In 2019, you told us to support Joe Biden in the Democratic primaries!
✅ In 2020, you told us to send more resources to Georgia!
✅ In 2021, you told us to rush cash to vulnerable Democrats to hold our fragile House and Senate majorities!
_We won’t have a cutting edge strategy for Midterm Elections without insight from our most informed supporters in your state._
[**So, please complete your Voting Rights Advisory Board interview now →**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Senior_Advisory_Board_Survey_copy/?source=VPP_20220423_EMSURV_E4_T0_AC&t=12&akid=1912%2E878179%2ELDur1J)
[TAKE 90-SECONDS TO COMPLETE YOUR INTERVIEW →](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Senior_Advisory_Board_Survey_copy/?source=VPP_20220423_EMSURV_E4_T0_AC&t=13&akid=1912%2E878179%2ELDur1J)
---
Thank you for your continued support,
Voting Rights Senior Advisory Board
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1912%2E878179%2ELDur1J). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1912%2E878179%2ELDur1J).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1912%2E878179%2ELDur1J) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=1912%2E878179%2ELDur1J). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=5&akid=1912%2E878179%2ELDur1J)
---

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Endorsements keep coming...
body:
A Rock Legend supports Erik Aadland
---
| | | | | | Endorsement | April 22, 2022
---
|
---
| Rock Legend endorses Erik Aadland
---
| | |
---|---
|
Here is the latest from the Aadland for Congress newsroom:

(April 22, 2022) Today, Republican candidate for Congress Erik Aadland, announced the endorsement from one of America's greatest entertainers and a literal rock star, Ted Nugent.

A legend in Rock 'n' Roll for over forty years, he has recently become an outstanding and vocal supporter of conservative values such as individual freedom, law & order and a constitutional federal government.

A ceaseless stage performer and NRA board member, Ted Nugent continues to shake things up; now politically as well as musically.

Ted Nugent and family do not offer political endorsement lightly. They are, however, pleased to stand with Erik Aadland for Colorado Congressional District 7 (CD7), and offered the following statement:
|
---
| "The Nugent family knows real Colorado standing up for God, Family, Country, Constitution, Bill of Rights and Law and Order. That's why we endorse and support Erik Aadland for US Congress for the conservative families of real Colorado."
---
| Erik's Remarks
---
| "Ted Nugent is a fearless conservative voice and a devout Christian. I am thrilled to receive Ted's endorsement and will approach serving my constituents with the same level of faith, courage conviction and commitment to conservative values."
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | [Send Erik your Feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016bUSBxVXNqPAVkAm3UQnYITakhstqG5a-OBnoXTisWDbKyxwGroX8yXEt1iu4r7Jy1L4hqNQiH80NMeFsjthFoBg-mbVTgdgFi0YtEffAB4Dy5yRynCF9nTIFU8w-l18dRJSXVyYL7MBkWbFXEx33HLYoywFKdkZ3UGVuw3oH-5eMMhRBix4TXbDTgU-hGcl6_ovb6z8mcvQkvqBSSvne3d6ctE-4kFzPnv5wWWeEFeXE_dV3E3e-pjlqmP5IaT3&c=riyNkmveZlZJYSK31NLlhjX6KYTFVEv4RueP3IUhBLX12E-1VCoSZw==&ch=efDBOXziNMms72EXm0rVzfM8GHn5muIJcJIqu3KRUM0TWXA_B5GcLw==)
---
| | |
---
| About Erik Aadland
---
Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a new course in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This $300,000,000 project resulted in Israel becoming a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
| |
---
| About Aadland For Congress
---
Erik's effort to represent Colorado Congressional District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign.
There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in March of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of pundits, professional people and neighbors.
If you are interested in an Area Coordinator opportunity with Erik's campaign, use the link below to send your information, or contact:
[staff@aadlandforcolorado.com](mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com)
